namespace University;

class Scheduler {
    public function calculateRooms(int $n, array $schedule): int {
        $rooms = array_fill(0, 7, 0);
        for ($i = 0; $i < $n; $i++) {
            for ($j = 0; $j < 7; $j++) {
                if ($schedule[$i][$j] == 1) {
                    $rooms[$j]++;
                }
            }
        }
        return max($rooms);
    }
}

namespace Contest;

class DataProcessor {
    private array $data;

    public function __construct(array $input) {
        $this->data = $input;
    }

    public function process(): void {
        foreach ($this->data as $key => $values) {
            $this->handleTask($key, $values);
        }
    }

    private function handleTask(int $taskNumber, array $values): void {
        switch ($taskNumber) {
            case 0:
                $this->taskOne($values);
                break;
            case 1:
                $this->taskTwo($values);
                break;
            // Additional tasks can be added here
        }
    }

    private function taskOne(array $values): void {
        $result = array_sum($values);
        echo "Task One Result: $result\n";
    }

    private function taskTwo(array $values): void {
        $count = array_count_values($values);
        print_r($count);
    }
}

namespace App;

use Illuminate\Support\Collection;

class CakeBaking
{
    private array $teeth;
    private array $blocks;

    public function __construct(array $teeth)
    {
        $this->teeth = $teeth;
        $this->blocks = [];
    }

    private function gcd(int $a, int $b): int
    {
        while ($b) {
            [$a, $b] = [$b, $a % $b];
        }
        return $a;
    }

    public function updateTeeth(int $index, int $value): void
    {
        $this->teeth[$index] = $value;
    }

    public function addBlock(int $a, int $b): void
    {
        $this->blocks[$a][] = $b;
        $this->blocks[$b][] = $a;
    }

    public function processRequests(Collection $requests): array
    {
        $results = [];
        foreach ($requests as $request) {
            $x = $request[0];
            $y = $request[1];
            $v = $request[2] / $this->teeth[$x - 1];
            $res = 0;
            $visited = [];
            $queue = [$y - 1];

            while (!empty($queue)) {
                $currentY = array_shift($queue);
                if (!isset($visited[$currentY])) {
                    $visited[$currentY] = true;
                    $r = $this->teeth[$currentY] / $this->teeth[$x - 1] * $v;

                    if (abs($r) < 1) continue;

                    $numerator = (int)abs($r * 10000);
                    $denominator = 10000;
                    $g = $this->gcd($numerator, $denominator);
                    $r = $numerator / $g;

                    if (abs($r) === 1) {
                        $res = 1;
                    } else {
                        $res = $r;
                    }

                    $queue = array_merge($queue, $this->blocks[$currentY] ?? []);
                }
            }
            $results[] = $res ? $this->gcd($res, 10000) : 0;
        }
        return $results;
    }
}

// Usage

$teethInput = explode(" ", readline());
$teeth = array_map('intval', $teethInput);
$cakeBaking = new CakeBaking($teeth);
$m = (int) readline();

for ($i = 0; $i < $m; $i++) {
    $line = explode(" ", readline());
    $t = (int) $line[0];

    if ($t === 1) {
        $cakeBaking->updateTeeth((int)$line[1] - 1, (int)$line[2]);
    } elseif ($t === 2) {
        $a = (int)$line[1] - 1;
        $b = (int)$line[2] - 1;
        $r = $cakeBaking->teeth[$a] / $cakeBaking->teeth[$b];

        if (abs($r) >= 1) {
            $cakeBaking->addBlock($a, $b);
        }
    }
}

}

    echo $result . "\n";

namespace Algorithm;

class MaxMinFinder
{
    public function processTestCases(int $testCases, array $data): array
    {
        $results = [];
        for ($i = 0; $i < $testCases; $i++) {
            $n = $data[$i][0];
            $arr = $data[$i][1];
            $results[] = $this->findMaxMin($n, $arr);
        }
        return $results;
    }

    private function findMaxMin(int $n, array $arr): int
    {
        return max(min($arr), $arr[0]);
    }
}

namespace FrogSimulation;

use Ds\Deque;
use Ds\Map;

class FrogPosition
{
    public function calculate($n, $edges, $t, $target)
    {
        $graph = new Map();
        
        foreach ($edges as $edge) {
            list($u, $v) = $edge;
            $graph->put($u, $graph->get($u, []));
            $graph->put($v, $graph->get($v, []));
            $graph->get($u)[] = $v;
            $graph->get($v)[] = $u;
        }

        $queue = new Deque();
        $queue->push([1, 1.0, -1]);
        $visited = array_fill(0, $n + 1, false);
        $visited[1] = true;

        while (!$queue->isEmpty() && $t >= 0) {
            for ($i = 0, $len = $queue->count(); $i < $len; $i++) {
                [$current, $prob, $parent] = $queue->pop();

                $unvisitedNeighbors = [];
                foreach ($graph->get($current) as $neighbor) {
                    if (!$visited[$neighbor]) {
                        $unvisitedNeighbors[] = $neighbor;
                    }
                }

                $numUnvisitedNeighbors = count($unvisitedNeighbors);

                if ($current === $target) {
                    if ($t === 0 || $numUnvisitedNeighbors === 0) {
                        return $prob;
                    } else {
                        break;
                    }
                }

                foreach ($unvisitedNeighbors as $neighbor) {
                    $visited[$neighbor] = true;
                    $queue->push([$neighbor, $prob / $numUnvisitedNeighbors, $current]);
                }
            }
            $t--;
        }

        return 0.0;
    }
}

// Example usage
$frog = new FrogPosition();
$n1 = 7; $edges1 = [[1,2],[1,3],[1,7],[2,4],[2,6],[3,5]]; $t1 = 2; $target1 = 4;

$n2 = 7; $edges2 = [[1,2],[1,3],[1,7],[2,4],[2,6],[3,5]]; $t2 = 1; $target2 = 7;
echo $frog->calculate($n2, $edges2, $t2, $target2) . PHP_EOL;  // Output: 0.3333333333333333

$n3 = 7; $edges3 = [[1,2],[1,3],[1,7],[2,4],[2,6],[3,5]]; $t3 = 20; $target3 = 6;
echo $frog->calculate($n3, $edges3, $t3, $target3) . PHP_EOL;  // Output: 0

namespace BracketCorrection;

class BracketValidator
{
    public static function correctBrackets(string $s): int
    {
        $openCount = substr_count($s, "(");
        $closeCount = substr_count($s, ")");
        
        if ($openCount === $closeCount) {
            return 0;
        } elseif ($openCount > $closeCount) {
            $unmatchedBrackets = array_fill(0, $openCount - $closeCount, "(");
        } else {
            $unmatchedBrackets = array_fill(0, $closeCount - $openCount, ")");
        }
        
        $totalSteps = count($unmatchedBrackets) * 2;
        
        return $totalSteps <= strlen($s) ? $totalSteps : -1;
    }
}

namespace TrieNamespace;

class TrieNode {
    public array $children;
    public int $count;

    public function __construct() {
        $this->children = [];
        $this->count = 0;
    }
}

function findPrefixes(array $arr, int $N): array {
    $root = new TrieNode();
    foreach ($arr as $word) {
        $node = $root;
        foreach (str_split($word) as $char) {
            if (!isset($node->children[$char])) {
                $node->children[$char] = new TrieNode();
            }
            $node = $node->children[$char];
            $node->count++;
        }
    }

    $result = [];
    foreach ($arr as $word) {
        $node = $root;
        $prefix = "";
        foreach (str_split($word) as $char) {
            $prefix .= $char;
            $node = $node->children[$char];
            if ($node->count === 1) {
                break;
            }
        }
        $result[] = $prefix;
    }
    return $result;
}

namespace Algorithm;

class MinSumDiff {
    public static function calculate(array $a, array $b): int {
        sort($a);
        sort($b);
        $sum = 0;

        for ($i = 0; $i < count($a) - 1; $i++) {
            $sum += abs($a[$i] - $a[$i + 1]) + abs($b[$i] - $b[$i + 1]);
        }
        
        return $sum;
    }
}

namespace RoadCostCalculator;

class Solution {
    private const INF = PHP_INT_MAX;

    public function minCost(array $costs): int {
        $n = count($costs);
        $dp = array_fill(0, $n, self::INF);
        $dp[0] = 0;

        for ($i = 0; $i < $n; $i++) {
            for ($j = $i + 1; $j < min($i + 3, $n); $j++) {
                $dp[$j] = min($dp[$j], $dp[$i] + $costs[$i]);
            }
        }

        return $dp[$n - 1] < self::INF ? $dp[$n - 1] : self::INF;
    }
}

namespace FrogJump;

class FrogPathCalculator {
    public function calculateMinJumpDistance(array $testCases): array {
        $results = [];
        foreach ($testCases as $s) {
            $n = strlen($s);
            $maxDistance = 0;
            $currentJump = 0;

            for ($i = 0; $i < $n; $i++) {
                if ($s[$i] === '1') {
                    $maxDistance = max($maxDistance, $currentJump);
                    $currentJump = 0;
                } else {
                    $currentJump++;
                }
            }

            $maxDistance = max($maxDistance, $currentJump);
            $results[] = $maxDistance + 1;
        }
        
        return $results;
    }
}

namespace Algorithm;

class Solution {
    public function canDistribute(array $nums, array $quantity): bool {
        return $this->dfs(count($nums) - 1, count($quantity) - 1, $nums, $quantity);
    }

    private function dfs(int $i, int $j, array &$nums, array &$quantity): bool {
        if ($j < 0) {
            return true;
        }

        if ($i < 0) {
            return false;
        }

        $cur = $nums[$i];
        if ($j + 1 > $cur) {
            return false;
        }

        $quantity[$j] = 0;
        $nums[$i] -= $j + 1;
        $nextJ = $j - $quantity[$j];
        
        if ($this->dfs($i, $nextJ, $nums, $quantity)) {
            return true;
        }

        $this->dfs($i - 1, $j, $nums, $quantity);
        $nums[$i] = $cur;
        $quantity[$j] = $nextJ;

        return false;
    }
}

namespace Algorithm;

class DuplicateRemover {
    public static function removeDuplicate(array &$A, int $N): int {
        if ($N === 0) {
            return 0;
        }

        $i = 0;
        $j = 1;

        while ($j < $N) {
            if ($A[$i] !== $A[$j]) {
                $i++;
                $A[$i] = $A[$j];
            }
            $j++;
        }

        return $i + 1;
    }
}

namespace Solution;

class MinDiffFinder {
    public function findMinDiff(string $A, string $B): int {
        $countFunction = function($A, $B) {
            $l = strlen($A);
            $m = strlen($B);
            $dp = array_fill(0, $m + 1, array_fill(0, $l + 1, -1));
            for ($i = 0; $i <= $l; $i++) {
                $dp[0][$i] = $i;
            }
            for ($i = 0; $i <= $m; $i++) {
                $dp[$i][0] = $i;
            }
            for ($i = 1; $i <= $m; $i++) {
                for ($j = 1; $j <= $l; $j++) {
                    if ($A[$j - 1] === $B[$i - 1]) {
                        $dp[$i][$j] = $dp[$i - 1][$j - 1];
                    } else {
                        $dp[$i][$j] = min($dp[$i - 1][$j - 1] + 1, min($dp[$i][$j - 1], $dp[$i - 1][$j]));
                    }
                }
            }
            return $dp[$m][$l];
        };

        $result = $countFunction($A, $B);
        $t = 0;
        $n = strlen($B);
        for ($i = 1; $i < strlen($A); $i++) {
            if ($A[$i] === $A[$i - 1]) {
                $t++;
                continue;
            }
            if ($countFunction(substr($A, $t), $B) > $countFunction(substr($A, 0, $t), $B)) {
                break;
            }
            $t++;
        }
        $result = min($result, $t);

        $l = strlen($A);
        $m = strlen($B);
        $dp = array_fill(0, $m + 1, array_fill(0, $l + 1, -1));
        for ($i = 0; $i <= $l; $i++) {
            $dp[0][$i] = $i;
        }
        for ($i = 0; $i <= $m; $i++) {
            $dp[$i][0] = $i;
        }
        for ($i = 1; $i <= $m; $i++) {
            for ($j = 1; $j <= $l; $j++) {
                if ($A[$j - 1] === $B[$i - 1]) {
                    $dp[$i][$j] = $dp[$i - 1][$j - 1];
                } else {
                    $dp[$i][$j] = min($dp[$i - 1][$j - 1] + 1, min($dp[$i][$j - 1], $dp[$i - 1][$j]));
                }
            }
        }
        return min($result, $dp[$m][$l]);
    }
}

class SortedSquares {
    public function sortedSquares(array $arr): array {
        $lower = 0;
        $upper = count($arr) - 1;
        $ret = [];
        while ($lower <= $upper) {
            if (abs($arr[$lower]) < abs($arr[$upper])) {
                array_unshift($ret, $arr[$upper] ** 2);
                $upper--;
            } else {
                array_unshift($ret, $arr[$lower] ** 2);
                $lower++;
            }
        }
        return $ret;
    }
}

namespace ImageProcessing;

class ImageAnalyzer
{
    public function countFaces(array $image): int
    {
        $count = 0;
        $index = 0;

        while ($index < count($image) - 1) {
            $x_left = 0;
            $x_right = 2;
            $y_up = 0;
            $y_down = 2;

            $sub_img = array_slice($image, $index, $x_right);
            while ($sub_img[$y_up][$x_left] !== 'x') {
                $y_up++;
            }

            $sub_img = array_map(fn($row) => substr($row, $x_left, $x_right), array_slice($image, $index + $y_up, $y_down));

            while ($image[$index + $y_up + $y_down - 1][$x_right] !== 'x') {
                $count++;
                $y_down--;
            }

            if ($this->isFace($sub_img)) {
                $count++;
            }
            
            $index += $y_down + ($x_right - $x_left) * $y_down + 2 * $y_down;
        }

        return $count;
    }

    private function isFace(array $sub_img): bool
    {
        return count($sub_img) === 2 && $sub_img[0] === 'f' && $sub_img[1] === 'a';
    }
}

namespace Algorithm;

class Solution {
    public function arrangeOddAndEven(array $arr, int $n): array {
        $mod = [];
        $ans = [];
        $cur = 0;

        if ($n % 2 === 0) {
            if ($n === 0) {
                return [];
            }

            $mod[] = $arr[$n - 1];

            while ($n > 0) {
                for ($i = 0; $i < $n - 1; $i++) {
                    if ($i % 2 !== 0 && $arr[$i] % 2 !== 0) {
                        if (in_array($arr[$i], $mod)) {
                            continue;
                        }
                        $mod[] = $arr[$i];
                        $ans[] = $arr[$i];
                        $cur++;
                    }
                }
                $n--;
            }
        }
        return array_reverse($ans);
    }
}

        }
    }
}

namespace Algorithm;

class DistinctValuesCounter {
    public static function countDistinctValues(string $instructions, array $queries): array {
        $n = strlen($instructions);
        $distinctValues = [];
        $value = 0;

        for ($i = 0; $i < $n; $i++) {
            $instr = $instructions[$i];
            $value += ($instr === '+') ? 1 : -1;
            $distinctValues[$value] = true;
        }

        $results = [];
        foreach ($queries as [$l, $r]) {
            $sliceUpToR = [];
            foreach (array_keys($distinctValues) as $v) {
                if ($v < $value + $i + $r - $l + 1) {
                    $sliceUpToR[$v] = true;
                }
            }
            $results[] = count($sliceUpToR);
        }

        return $results;
    }
}

namespace Algorithm\CourseScheduling;

class CourseScheduler
{
    private array $courses = [[], [], [], []];
    private array $forbiddenPairs = [[], [], []];
    private int $n1, $n2, $n3, $n4;
    private array $dp;

    public function __construct(int $n1, int $n2, int $n3, int $n4)
    {
        $this->n1 = $n1;
        $this->n2 = $n2;
        $this->n3 = $n3;
        $this->n4 = $n4;
        $this->dp = array_fill(0, $n1, array_fill(0, $n2, array_fill(0, $n3, array_fill(0, $n4, PHP_INT_MAX))));
    }

    public function addForbiddenPair(int $level, array $pair): void
    {
        $this->forbiddenPairs[$level][] = $pair;
    }

    public function printMinCost(): int
    {
        $minCost = PHP_INT_MAX;
        
        for ($i = 0; $i < $this->n1; $i++) {
            for ($j = 0; $j < $this->n2; $j++) {
                if ($this->containsForbiddenPair(0, [$i + 1, $j + 1])) continue;
                for ($k = 0; $k < $this->n3; $k++) {
                    if ($this->containsForbiddenPair(1, [$j + 1, $k + 1])) continue;
                    for ($l = 0; $l < $this->n4; $l++) {
                        if ($this->containsForbiddenPair(2, [$k + 1, $l + 1])) continue;
                        $minCost = min($minCost, $this->dp[$i][$j][$k][$l] + $this->courses[0][$i] + $this->courses[1][$j] + $this->courses[2][$k] + $this->courses[3][$l]);
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        return $minCost === PHP_INT_MAX ? -1 : $minCost;
    }

    private function containsForbiddenPair(int $level, array $pair): bool
    {
        foreach ($this->forbiddenPairs[$level] as $forbiddenPair) {
            if ($forbiddenPair === $pair) {
                return true;
            }
        }
        return false;
    }

    public function setCourseCost(int $index, int $cost): void
    {
        $this->courses[$index] = $cost;
    }
}

declare(strict_types=1);

class PathFinder {
    private array $path;

    public function __construct(int $n) {
        $this->path = [str_repeat('R', $n - 1), str_repeat('D', $n - 1)];
    }

    private function ask(int $r1, int $c1, int $r2, int $c2): bool {
        echo "? $r1 $c1 $r2 $c2\n";
        return trim(fgets(STDIN)) === "YES";
    }

    public function findPath(): void {
        while (strlen($this->path[count($this->path) - 1]) + strlen($this->path[count($this->path) - 2]) < 2 * (count($this->path[0]) + 1) - 2) {
            if ($this->ask(1, 1, strlen($this->path[count($this->path) - 1]) + 2, count($this->path[0]) + 1)) {
                $this->path[] = 'R' . $this->path[count($this->path) - 1];
            } else {
                $this->path[] = 'D' . $this->path[count($this->path) - 2];
            }
            echo "! " . implode('', $this->path) . "\n";
            fgets(STDIN);
        }
        echo "! " . implode('', $this->path) . "\n";
    }
}

namespace Algorithm;

class BeautifulArray
{
    public function minRemovalsToBeautiful(array $a): int
    {
        $count = array_count_values($a);
        $freqCount = array_count_values(array_values($count));
        
        $minRemovals = PHP_INT_MAX;
        
        foreach ($freqCount as $freq => $c) {
            $removals = 0;
            foreach ($freqCount as $f => $count) {
                $removals += ($f - $freq) * $count;
            }
            $minRemovals = min($minRemovals, $removals);
        }
        
        return $minRemovals;
    }

    {

            $results[] = $this->minRemovalsToBeautiful($a);
        }

        }

<?php

namespace Algorithm\Solutions;

class MinSumOfLengths {
    public function minSumOfLengths(array $arr, int $target): int {
        $n = count($arr);
        $inf = PHP_INT_MAX;
        $dp = array_fill(0, $n, $inf);
        $best = $inf;
        $left = 0;
        $right = 0;
        $sums = 0;

        while ($right < $n) {
            $sums += $arr[$right];
            while ($sums > $target) {
                $sums -= $arr[$left];
                $left++;
            }
            if ($sums === $target) {
                if ($left > 0 && $dp[$left - 1] !== $inf) {
                    $best = min($best, $right - $left + 1 + $dp[$left - 1]);
                }
                $dp[$right] = min($right - $left + 1, $dp[$right - 1]);
            } else {
                $dp[$right] = $right > 0 ? $dp[$right - 1] : $inf;
            }
            $right++;
        }
        return $best === $inf ? -1 : $best;
    }
}

function splitIntoFibonacci($num) {
    if (empty($num)) {
        return [];
    }

    $length = strlen($num);
    
    for ($i = 1; $i < $length; $i++) {
        for ($j = $i + 1; $j < $length; $j++) {
            $a = $b = $c = 0;
            $seq = [];

            // Generate the first number
            for ($index = 0; $index < $i; $index++) {
                $a = $a * 10 + (int)$num[$index];
            }
            // Generate the second number
            for ($index = $i; $index < $j; $index++) {
                $b = $b * 10 + (int)$num[$index];
            }
            // Compute the third number and check Fibonacci condition
            for ($index = $j; $index < $length; $index++) {
                $c = $c * 10 + (int)$num[$index];
                if ($a + $b == $c) {
                    $seq = [$a, $b, $c];
                    if (count($seq) >= 3) {
                        return $seq;
                    }
                }
                $b = 0; // Reset b for next iteration
            }
        }
    }

    return [];
}

// Example usage:

print_r(splitIntoFibonacci("112358130"));  // Output: []
print_r(splitIntoFibonacci("0123"));       // Output: []

                    $ans[$i + 1] = min($ch - $ans[$i], $ans[$i + 1]);

                $ch = min($ch - $ans[$i], $ans[$i]);
            }

namespace Algorithm;

class Solver {
    private array $lastPos;
    private \SplDoublyLinkedList $minQueue;

    public function solve(int $N, int $K, array $A): int {
        $this->lastPos = array_fill(0, $N + 1, 0);
        $this->minQueue = new \SplDoublyLinkedList();
        
        for ($i = 0; $i < $N; $i++) {
            while (!$this->minQueue->isEmpty() && $this->minQueue->bottom() <= $i - $K) {
                $this->minQueue->shift();
            }

            while (!$this->minQueue->isEmpty() && $A[$this->minQueue->top()] >= $A[$i]) {
                $this->minQueue->pop();
            }

            $this->minQueue->push($i);
            $pos = $this->minQueue->top();

            $changePoint = $this->lastPos[$this->minQueue->top()];
            if ($i >= $K - 1 && ($A[$pos] < $A[$this->lastPos[$A[$pos]]] || $i == $N - 1)) {
                $changePoint = $i;
            }
            $this->lastPos[$A[$i]] = $changePoint;
        }

        return count(array_unique(array_slice($this->lastPos, 0, $N - $K + 1)));
    }
}

namespace CandyDistribution;

class CandyDistributor
{
    public function distributeCandies(int $n, array $l, array $r): string
    {
        $a = [];
        
        for ($i = 0; $i < $n; $i++) {
            $a[$i] = $n - $l[$i] - $r[$i];
        }

        for ($i = 0; $i < $n; $i++) {
            $leftCount = 0;
            for ($j = 0; $j < $i; $j++) {
                if ($a[$j] > $a[$i]) {
                    $leftCount++;
                }
            }

            $rightCount = 0;
            for ($j = $i + 1; $j < $n; $j++) {
                if ($a[$j] > $a[$i]) {
                    $rightCount++;
                }
            }

            if ($leftCount !== $l[$i] || $rightCount !== $r[$i]) {
                return "NO";
            }
        }

        return "YES";
    }
}

namespace Algorithm;

class CandyDistributor {
    public static function distributeCandies(int $N, int $K): array {
        $freq = array_fill(0, $K, 0);
        $count = $N;

        for ($i = $K; $i >= 1; $i--) {
            $freq[$K - $i] += log($count) / log($i);
        }

        $freq[$K - 1] += intdiv($count, $K);

        $ans = [];
        foreach ($freq as $f) {
            $ans[] = round($K * $f);
        }

        $ans[$K - 1] += $N % $K;
        return $ans;
    }
}

namespace Geometry;

class Circle {
    public function remainingCircle(float $R, int $N, int $M): float {
        $total_area = pi() * $R ** 2;
        $per_piece = $total_area / $M;
        $rem_area = $per_piece * $N;
        $rem_length = ($rem_area * (2 * $R)) / $total_area;
        return round($rem_length, 2);
    }
}

namespace GraphAlgorithms;

class BFS
{
    public function bfsOfGraph(int $V, array $adj): array
    {
        $bfs = [];
        $visited = array_fill(0, $V, false);
        $queue = new \SplQueue();

        $queue->enqueue(0);
        $visited[0] = true;

        while (!$queue->isEmpty()) {
            $node = $queue->dequeue();
            $bfs[] = $node;

            foreach ($adj[$node] as $i) {
                if (!$visited[$i]) {
                    $queue->enqueue($i);
                    $visited[$i] = true;
                }
            }
        }
        return $bfs;
    }
}

namespace Algorithm;

class MaxValueCalculator {
    private array $P;
    private array $C;
    private array $dp;
    private int $n;
    private int $k;

    public function __construct(int $n, int $k, array $P, array $C) {
        $this->n = $n;
        $this->k = $k;
        $this->P = array_merge([0], array_reverse($P));
        $this->C = array_merge([0], $C);
        $this->dp = array_fill(0, $n + 1, array_fill(0, $n + 1, -PHP_INT_MAX));
        $this->dp[0][0] = 0;
    }

    public function calculate(): int {
        for ($i = 1; $i <= $this->n; $i++) {
            for ($j = 0; $j < $this->n; $j++) {
                $this->dp[$i][$j] = max($this->dp[$i][$j], $this->dp[$i - 1][$j]);
                if ($j - $this->P[$i] >= 0) {
                    $this->dp[$i][$j] = max($this->dp[$i][$j], $this->dp[$i - 1][$j - $this->P[$i]] + $this->C[$i]);
                }
            }
        }
        return $this->dp[$this->n][$this->k - 1];
    }
}

namespace Algorithm;

class SequenceFinder
{
    public function findMissingNumber(array $input): int
    {
        $n = (int)$input[0];
        $a = array_map('intval', explode(' ', $input[1]));
        sort($a);

        if ($a[0] === 1) {
            return -1;
        } elseif ($n === 1) {
            return $a[0] + 1;
        } else {
            for ($i = 1; $i < $n; $i++) {
                if ($a[$i] !== $a[$i - 1] + 1) {
                    return $a[$i] - 1;
                }
            }
            return $a[$n - 1] + 1;
        }
    }
}

namespace Algorithm;

class ProductPairs
{
    public function countPairs(array $products): int
    {
        $count = 0;
        $precision = 1e-9;

        $fractionsList = array_map(function ($x) {
            return $this->toFraction($x);
        }, $products);

        for ($i = 0; $i < count($products); $i++) {
            for ($j = $i + 1; $j < count($products); $j++) {
                $numerator = $fractionsList[$i] * $fractionsList[$j];
                $denominator = 1;

                if (abs($numerator / $denominator - $products[$i] * $products[$j]) < $precision) {
                    $count++;
                }
            }
        }

        return $count;
    }

    private function toFraction(float $value): float
    {
        $fraction = explode('.', (string)$value);
        $numerator = isset($fraction[1]) ? (int)($value * pow(10, strlen($fraction[1]))) : (int)$value;
        $denominator = isset($fraction[1]) ? pow(10, strlen($fraction[1])) : 1;

        return $numerator / $denominator;
    }
}

function main()
{
    $n = (int)trim(fgets(STDIN));
    $products = array_map('floatval', explode(' ', trim(fgets(STDIN))));

    $pairs = new ProductPairs();
    $result = $pairs->countPairs($products);
    echo $result . PHP_EOL;
}

namespace Algorithm;

class Solution {
    public function solve(): string {
        $data = file('php://stdin', FILE_IGNORE_NEW_LINES);
        $test_cases = (int)$data[0];

        for ($t = 1; $t <= $test_cases; $t++) {
            $n = (int)$data[$t];
            $a = array_map('intval', explode(' ', $data[$t + 1]));
            $mod = 1 << 30;
            $count = 0;
            $overlap = 0;
            $odd_sum = 0;

            foreach ($a as $value) {
                if ($value === 0) {
                    $count >>= 1;
                    $overlap >>= 1;
                } elseif ($value === $mod) {
                    $count >>= 1;
                    $overlap >>= 1;
                    $odd_sum >>= 1;
                } elseif ($value >= $mod - $value) {
                    $count += $mod - $value;
                    if ($count < 2 * $mod + 1) {
                        $overlap >>= 1;
                    } else {
                        $overlap += intdiv($value - $mod + 1, $mod - $value) + 1;
                    }
                    if (($value - $mod + 1) % ($mod - $value) === 0) {
                        $odd_sum += intdiv($value - $mod + 1, $mod - $value);
                    }
                } else {
                    $count += $value;
                }
                $odd_sum += max(0, $count - ($value === $mod ? 1 : 0)) - max(0, $count - ($value === 0 ? 1 : 0));
            }

            if ($overlap === 2 * $mod + 1 || $odd_sum % 2 === 0) {
                return "YES";
            }
        }
        return "NO";
    }
}

namespace Algorithm;

class CommonElements 
{
    public function find(array $A, array $B, array $C): array 
    {
        $n1 = count($A);
        $n2 = count($B);
        $n3 = count($C);
        $count = [];
        $i = $j = $k = 0;

        while ($k < $n3) {
            $i = $this->binarySearch($B, $C[$k], 0, $n2 - 1);
            while ($i < $n2 && $B[$i] == $C[$k]) {
                if (!in_array($C[$k], $count)) {
                    $count[] = $C[$k];
                }
                $i++;
            }
            $k++;
        }

        return $count;
    }

    private function binarySearch(array $arr, int $x, int $low, int $high): int 
    {
        while ($low <= $high) {
            $mid = (int)(($low + $high) / 2);
            if ($arr[$mid] < $x) {
                $low = $mid + 1;
            } elseif ($arr[$mid] > $x) {
                $high = $mid - 1;
            } else {
                return $mid;
            }
        }
        return $low;
    }
}

namespace Algorithm;

class SequenceAnalyzer {
    private array $p;
    private int $n;

    public function __construct(array $input) {
        $this->n = (int)$input[0];
        $this->p = array_map('intval', array_slice($input, 1));
    }

    public function countMiddleElements(): int {
        $count = 0;
        for ($i = 1; $i < $this->n - 1; $i++) {
            if ($this->p[$i] === $this->getMedian($this->p[$i - 1], $this->p[$i], $this->p[$i + 1])) {
                $count++;
            }
        }
        return $count;
    }

    private function getMedian(int $a, int $b, int $c): int {
        return $a + $b + $c - min($a, $b, $c) - max($a, $b, $c);
    }
}

namespace Algorithm;

class MaxErasing
{
    public static function calculate(int $n, array $a): int
    {
        $maxErase = 0;
        for ($i = 0; $i < $n; $i++) {
            for ($j = $i + 1; $j < $n; $j++) {
                if ($a[$j] - $a[$i] - 1 >= $j - $i - 1) {
                    $maxErase = max($maxErase, $j - $i - 1);
                }
            }
        }
        return $maxErase;
    }
}

namespace NumberRestoration;

class RestoreInitialNumber {
    public static function restore(string $S): string {
        $zeroCount = substr_count($S, 'zero');
        $oneCount = substr_count($S, 'one');
        $twoCount = substr_count($S, 'two');
        $threeCount = substr_count($S, 'three');
        $fourCount = substr_count($S, 'four');

        $digits = [
            [$zeroCount, 'zero'],
            [$oneCount, 'one'],
            [$twoCount, 'two'],
            [$threeCount, 'three'],
            [$fourCount, 'four']
        ];

        usort($digits, function($a, $b) {
            return $b[0] <=> $a[0];
        });

        $result = str_repeat(' ', strlen($S));

        foreach ($digits as [$count, $digit]) {
            if ($digit === 'one') {
                $result = substr_replace($result, str_repeat('1', $count), 0, $count * strlen($digit));
            }
        }

        return str_repeat("0 ", $zeroCount) . trim($result) . str_repeat("0 ", $zeroCount);
    }
}

namespace Algorithm;

class Main {
    private array $XYU;
    private array $X;
    private array $Y;
    private array $U;
    private array $dx;
    private array $dy;

    public function __construct(array $input) {
        $this->XYU = $input;
        $this->init();
    }

    private function init(): void {
        $this->X = array_column($this->XYU, 0);
        $this->Y = array_column($this->XYU, 1);
        $this->U = array_column($this->XYU, 2);
        $this->dx = array_map([$this, 'calcDxDy'], $this->U);
        $this->dy = array_map([$this, 'calcDxDy'], $this->U);
    }

    private function calcDxDy(int $U): array {
        return match ($U) {
            0 => [0, 0],
            1 => [0, 1],
            2 => [0, -1],
            default => [1, 0],
        };
    }

    private function check(int $t): bool {
        $Xn = array_map(fn($x, $dx) => $x + $dx * $t, $this->X, $this->dx);
        $Yn = array_map(fn($y, $dy) => $y + $dy * $t, $this->Y, $this->dy);
        
        $Xn = array_unique($Xn);
        $Yn = array_unique($Yn);
        sort($Xn);
        sort($Yn);

        for ($i = 0; $i < count($Xn) - 1; $i++) {
            for ($j = 0; $j < count($Yn) - 1; $j++) {
                if ($Xn[$i] === $Xn[$i + 1] && $Yn[$j] === $Yn[$j + 1]) {
                    return true;
                }
            }
        }
        return false;
    }

    public function solve(): void {
        $l = 0;
        $r = 10 ** 9;
        while ($l + 1 < $r) {
            $m = (int)(($l + $r) / 2);
            if ($this->check($m)) {
                $r = $m;
            } else {
                $l = $m;
            }
        }
        if ($this->check($l)) {
            echo $l;
        } else {
            echo "SAFE";
        }
    }
}

namespace GraphTraversal;

class Graph {
    private array $graph;
    private array $visited = [];
    private int $n;

    public function __construct(int $n) {
        $this->n = $n;
        $this->graph = array_fill(0, $n + 1, []);
    }

    public function addEdge(int $a, int $b): void {
        $this->graph[$a][] = $b;
        $this->graph[$b][] = $a;
    }

    public function dfs(int $node): int {
        $this->visited[$node] = 0;
        foreach ($this->graph[$node] as $child) {
            if (!isset($this->visited[$child])) {
                $this->visited[$node] += $this->dfs($child);
            }
        }
        return ++$this->visited[$node];
    }

    public function getVisited(): array {
        return $this->visited;
    }
}

{
    public static function correctWord(string $s): string
    {
        $uppercaseCount = 0;
        $lowercaseCount = 0;

        for ($char of str_split($s)) {
            if (ctype_upper($char)) {
                $uppercaseCount++;
            } elseif (ctype_lower($char)) {
                $lowercaseCount++;
            }
        }

    }

namespace Algorithms;

class StringTransformer
{
    public static function minFlipsToGood(string $s): int
    {
        $n = strlen($s);
        $minFlips = $n;

        for ($i = 0; $i <= $n; $i++) {
            $cost0Left1Right = 0;
            $cost1Left0Right = 0;

            for ($j = 0; $j < $i; $j++) {
                if ($s[$j] === '1') {
                    $cost0Left1Right++;
                } else {
                    $cost1Left0Right++;
                }
            }

            for ($j = $i; $j < $n; $j++) {
                if ($s[$j] === '0') {
                    $cost0Left1Right++;
                } else {
                    $cost1Left0Right++;
                }
            }

            $minFlips = min($minFlips, $cost0Left1Right, $cost1Left0Right);
        }

        return $minFlips;
    }
}

// Example of how to use the class
function processTestCases(array $testCases): array
{
    $results = [];
    foreach ($testCases as $testCase) {
        $results[] = StringTransformer::minFlipsToGood($testCase);
    }
    return $results;
}

namespace Algorithm;

class ContestSolution {
    public function execute($a, $b) {
        if ($a > $b) {
            echo -1;
            exit();
        }

        $r = [[$a, $b]];
        $res = [];
        $n = 0;

        while (empty($res) || end($res) != 2 * $b / $a) {
            $n = 0;

            if ($r[count($r) - 1] !== [$b - $a, $a]) {
                $r[] = [$r[count($r) - 1][0] - $a, $r[count($r) - 1][1]];
            }

            if ($r[count($r) - 1] !== [$b, $r[count($r) - 1][1] - $a]) {
                $r[] = [$r[count($r) - 1][0], $r[count($r) - 1][1] - $a];
            }

            foreach ($r as $e) {
                $n += intdiv($b, max($e[0], $e[1]));
            }
            $res[] = $n;
        }

        echo json_encode($r) . "\n";
        echo json_encode($res) . "\n";

        $result = array_fill(0, count($res), 0);
        for ($i = count($res) - 1; $i >= 0; $i--) {
            $result[$i] = $res[$i];
            foreach ($result as $e) {
                $result[] += intdiv($res[$i] * $a, $e);
            }
        }

        echo array_sum($result) . "\n";
        echo $n . "\n";
    }
}

namespace Algorithm;

use \Countable;

class StringComparer implements Countable {
    private string $inputString;
    private array $charCount;

    public function __construct(string $input) {
        $this->inputString = $input;
        $this->charCount = count_chars($input, 1);
    }

    public function compare(): void {
        $count = 0;
        $count1 = 0;
        $r = 'abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz';
        $b = 0;

        for ($i = 0; $i < strlen($this->inputString); $i++) {
            if ($this->inputString[$i] != $r[$b]) {
                $charCounter = array_count_values(str_split($this->inputString));
                $c = array_keys($charCounter);
                $currentCharCount = $charCounter[$r[$b]] ?? 0;

                for ($x = 0; $x < $currentCharCount; $x++) {
                    $s1 = $c[$x % count($c)];
                }

                for ($x = $currentCharCount; $x < $currentCharCount + ($charCounter['b'] ?? 0); $x++) {
                    $s2 = $c[$x % count($c)];
                }

                for ($x = $currentCharCount + ($charCounter['b'] ?? 0); $x < $currentCharCount + ($charCounter['b'] ?? 0) + ($charCounter['c'] ?? 0); $x++) {
                    $s3 = $c[$x % count($c)];
                }

                $p1 = '';
                $p2 = '';
                $p3 = '';

                for ($i = 0; $i < strlen($this->inputString); $i++) {
                    if ($i < strlen($this->inputString) / 3) {
                        $p1 .= $this->inputString[$i];
                    } elseif ($i < (2 * strlen($this->inputString)) / 3) {
                        $p2 .= $this->inputString[$i];
                    } else {
                        $p3 .= $this->inputString[$i];
                    }
                }

                $resultString = $s1 . $p1 . $s2 . $p2 . $s3 . $p3;

                if ($resultString == $this->inputString) {
                    $count++;
                    echo "YES\n";
                } else {
                    echo "NO\n";
                    $count1++;
                }
                $b++;
            }
        }

        echo "count1: $count1\n";
        echo "count: $count\n";
    }

    public function count(): int {
        return count($this->charCount);
    }
}

namespace Algorithm;

class Solver {
    const MOD = 998244353;

    public function run() {
        $t = (int)fgets(STDIN);

        while ($t--) {
            $line = fgets(STDIN);
            list($n, $k) = array_map('intval', explode(' ', $line));
            $v = array_map('intval', explode(' ', fgets(STDIN)));

            if (!$this->isValid($v, $n)) {
                echo 0 . PHP_EOL;
                continue;
            }

            $ans = $this->calculateAnswer($v, $n, $k);
            echo $ans . PHP_EOL;
        }
    }

    private function isValid(array $v, int $n): bool {
        for ($i = 0; $i < $n; $i++) {
            if ($v[$i] > $i) {
                return false;
            }
        }
        return true;
    }

    private function calculateAnswer(array $v, int $n, int $k): int {
        $ans = 1;
        for ($i = 0; $i < $k; $i++) {
            $ans = ($ans * ($i + 1)) % self::MOD;
        }

        for ($i = $k; $i < $n; $i++) {
            if ($v[$i - $k] === -1 || $v[$i - $k] === 0) {
                $ans = ($ans * ($k + 1)) % self::MOD;
            }
        }

        return $ans;
    }
}

(new Solver())->run();

namespace Algorithm;

class Solution {
    public function stoneGameV(array $stoneValue): int {
        $n = count($stoneValue);
        $dp = array_fill(0, $n, array_fill(0, $n, 0));
        $sum = array_fill(0, $n + 1, 0);
        
        for ($i = 0; $i < $n; $i++) {
            $sum[$i + 1] = $sum[$i] + $stoneValue[$i];
        }
        
        for ($i = $n - 1; $i >= 0; $i--) {
            for ($j = $i + 1; $j < $n; $j++) {
                $res = 0;
                for ($k = $i + 1; $k <= $j; $k++) {
                    $lsum = $sum[$k] - $sum[$i];
                    $rsum = $sum[$j + 1] - $sum[$k];
                    if ($lsum < $rsum) {
                        $res = max($res, $lsum + $dp[$i][$k - 1]);
                    } else {
                        $res = max($res, $rsum + $dp[$k][$j]);
                    }
                }
                $dp[$i][$j] = $res;
            }
        }
        return $dp[0][$n - 1];
    }
}

namespace Algorithm;

class Solution
{
    public function minimumEnergy($n, $m, $v, $edges)
    {
        $graph = [];
        for ($i = 1; $i <= $n; $i++) {
            $graph[$i] = [];
        }
        foreach ($edges as [$u, $v]) {
            $graph[$u][] = $v;
            $graph[$v][] = $u;
        }

        return $this->dfs(1, 0, $graph, $v);
    }

    private function dfs($cur, $cnt, &$graph, $v)
    {
        if (empty($graph[$cur])) {
            return $cnt;
        }

        $res = PHP_INT_MAX;
        foreach ($graph[$cur] as $key => $next) {
            unset($graph[$cur][$key]);
            $res = min($res, $this->dfs($next, $cnt + $v[$cur - 1], $graph, $v));
            $graph[$cur][$key] = $next;
        }

        return $res;
    }
}

namespace Algorithm;

class Contest {
    private array $a;
    private int $n;

    public function __construct(array $a) {
        $this->a = $a;
        $this->n = count($a);
    }

    public function solution(): int {
        for ($i = $this->n - 2; $i >= 0; $i--) {
            if ($this->a[$i] > $this->a[$i + 1]) {
                $this->a[$i + 1] = -INF;
            }
        }

        if ($this->n == 2) {
            return $this->a[0] < $this->a[1] ? $this->a[1] : $this->a[0];
        }

        return $this->isValid();
    }

    private function isValid(array $contest = []): int {
        if (count($contest) > 1 && count($contest) <= $this->n) {
            $lastmax = end($contest);
            for ($i = 1; $i < $this->n; $i++) {
                if ($lastmax < $this->a[$i]) {
                    return 0;
                }
            }
        }

        $last2max = $this->a[$this->n - 2];
        for ($i = $this->n - 1; $i > 0; $i--) {
            if ($this->a[$i] > $this->a[$i - 1] * 2) {
                return 0;
            }
        }

        sort($contest);
        return ($lastmax ?? 0) || $this->isValid(array_slice($contest, 1)) || $last2max;
    }
}

function main(): void {
    $t = intval(trim(fgets(STDIN)));
    while ($t--) {
        $n = intval(trim(fgets(STDIN)));
        $a = array_map('intval', explode(' ', trim(fgets(STDIN))));
        $contest = new Contest($a);
        $result = $contest->solution();
        echo $result, PHP_EOL;
    }
}

main();

class IntReverser

    {
        $isNegative = $n < 0;
        $n = abs($n);
        $numStr = strval($n);

class MaximizeBeauty {
    public function maximizeBeauty(array $items, array $queries): array {
        usort($items, fn($a, $b) => $a[0] <=> $b[0]);

        $result = [];
        foreach ($queries as $query) {
            $maxBeauty = 0;
            foreach ($items as $item) {
                if ($item[0] <= $query) {
                    $maxBeauty = max($maxBeauty, $item[1]);
                }
            }
            $result[] = $maxBeauty;
        }
        return $result;
    }

class JuiceCanBuyer {
    public static function canBuyJuice(int $A, int $B, int $C, int $D): string {
        while ($A - $B >= $C) {
            $A -= $B;
            $A += $D;
            if ($A >= $B) {
                return "Yes";
            }
        }
        return "No";
    }

        return array_map(function($query) {
            return self::canBuyJuice(...$query);
        }, $queries);
    }

class BracketSolver {
    public static function minMoves(string $s): int {
        $stack = [];
        $count = 0;
        foreach (str_split($s) as $char) {
            if ($char === '(') {
                array_push($stack, $char);
            } elseif ($char === ')') {
                if (!empty($stack)) {
                    array_pop($stack);
                } else {
                    $count++;
                }
            }
        }
        return $count;
    }

    public static function solveTestCase(): void {
        $n = intval(trim(fgets(STDIN)));
        $s = trim(fgets(STDIN));
        echo self::minMoves($s) . PHP_EOL;
    }

    public static function main(): void {
        $t = intval(trim(fgets(STDIN)));
        for ($i = 0; $i < $t; $i++) {
            self::solveTestCase();
        }
    }
}

BracketSolver::main();

namespace PermutationChecker;

class PermutationGenerator
{
    public static function generatePermutation(int $n): bool
    {
        $p = array_fill(0, $n, -1);
        $filled = array_fill(0, $n, false);
        
        for ($i = 1; $i <= $n; $i++) {
            $r = array_fill(0, $n, -1);
            $count = array_fill(0, $n, 0);
            
            for ($j = 1; $j <= $n; $j++) {
                $k = $j - 1;
                while ($k < $n && $filled[$k]) {
                    $k++;
                }
                if ($k < $n) {
                    $r[$j - 1] = $k;
                    $count[$k]++;
                }
            }
            
            $maxCount = max($count);
            $possiblePos = array_filter(range(0, $n - 1), fn($k) => $count[$k] === $maxCount && !$filled[$k]);
            $pos = array_keys(array_filter($p, fn($v) => $v === -1))[$i - 1] ?? null;
            
            if (!in_array($pos, $possiblePos)) {
                return false;
            }
            $p[$pos] = $i;
            $filled[$pos] = true;
        }
        
        return true;
    }

    public static function run()
    {
        $handle = fopen("php://stdin", "r");
        $t = (int)trim(fgets($handle));
        
        for ($i = 0; $i < $t; $i++) {
            $n = (int)trim(fgets($handle));
            $p = array_map(fn($x) => (int)$x - 1, explode(" ", trim(fgets($handle))));
            
            echo self::generatePermutation($n) ? "Yes\n" : "No\n";
        }
        
        fclose($handle);
    }
}

namespace RopeCutting;

class Solution {
    public function cutRopeEasy(int $n, array $cuts): int {
        $costs = array_map(fn($x) => max($n - $x, 0), $cuts);
        for ($i = 0; $i < $n; $i++) {
            if ($i == $n - 1) {
                continue;
            }
            $costs[$i] += $costs[$i + 1];
        }
        return min($costs);
    }

    public function cutRopeNoSort(int $n, array $cuts): int {
        $memo = array_fill(0, $n + 1, 999);
        return $this->cutRod($n, $cuts, $memo);
    }

    private function cutRod(int $rodLength, array $cuts, array &$memo): int {
        if ($rodLength < 2) {
            return 0;
        }
        if ($memo[$rodLength] != 999) {
            return $memo[$rodLength];
        }
        $steps = array_map(fn($x) => $this->cutRod($rodLength - $x, $cuts, $memo), $cuts);
        $maxCost = -1;
        foreach ($steps as $i => $step) {
            $cost = $rodLength + $step;
            if ($cost > $maxCost) {
                $maxCost = $cost;
            }
        }
        $memo[$rodLength] = $maxCost;
        return $maxCost;
    }

    public function cutRopeMaxHeap(int $n, array $cuts): int {
        $maxHeap = [-1];
        $memo = [];
        for ($i = 1; $i <= $n; $i++) {
            $memo[] = [$this->cutRodHeap($i, $cuts, $maxHeap), $i];
        }
        usort($memo, fn($a, $b) => $b[0] <=> $a[0]);
        return array_sum(array_column($memo, 0));
    }

    private function cutRodHeap(int $rodLength, array $cuts, array &$maxHeap): int {
        if ($rodLength < 2) {
            return 0;
        }
        while ($maxHeap && $maxHeap[0] < $rodLength) {
            $pos = array_shift($maxHeap);
            $cutRodInPos = $rodLength - $pos;
            if ($cutRodInPos > 0 && $maxHeap[0] > $cutRodInPos) {
                $maxHeap[] = $cutRodInPos;
            }
        }
        $cost = -array_pop($maxHeap);
        return $cost + $this->cutRodHeap($rodLength - $cuts[array_search($pos, $cuts)], $cuts, $maxHeap);
    }

    public function cutRope(int $n, array $cuts): int {
        $dp = array_fill(0, $n + 1, 0);
        for ($i = 1; $i <= $n; $i++) {
            $cost = -1;
            foreach ($cuts as $cut) {
                if ($cut <= $i) {
                    $currentCut = $i - $cut;
                    $cost = ($cost === -1) ? $dp[$i] + $currentCut : min($cost, $dp[$i] + $currentCut);
                    break;
                }
            }
            $dp[$i] = $cost;
        }
        return min($dp);
    }
}

namespace ElephantCounting;

class ElephantCounter {
    public function countElephants(array $bearWall, array $eleWall): int {
        $n = count($bearWall);
        $w = count($eleWall);
        $bearQueue = [];
        $eleIndices = array_fill(0, $w, -1);
        $count = 0;

        for ($i = 0; $i < $n; $i++) {
            while (!empty($bearQueue) && $bearWall[end($bearQueue)] > $bearWall[$i]) {
                array_pop($bearQueue);
            }

            if (!empty($bearQueue)) {
                $idx = $i - reset($bearQueue);
                while ($idx + 1 < $w && $eleWall[$eleIndices[$idx + 1]] === $bearWall[$i]) {
                    $eleIndices[$idx + 1]++;
                    $idx++;
                }

                if ($eleIndices[$idx] === $idx && $eleIndices[$idx] !== -1) {
                    $count++;
                    $eleIndices[$idx]++;
                }
            }

            $bearQueue[] = $i;
        }

        return $count;
    }
}

namespace HotelManagement;

class RoomAllocator
{
    public function findSequence(int $n, int $k): string
    {
        if ($n === 2) {
            return 'aa';
        } elseif ($n === 1) {
            return 'a';
        }

        $tmp1R = [];
        for ($i = 0; $i < $n - 2; $i++) {
            for ($j = 0; $j < $n - 1; $j++) {
                $tmp1S = str_repeat('a', $i) . 'b' . 'ab' . str_repeat('a', $n - 3 - $i - $j) . 'a';
                $tmp1R[] = $tmp1S;
            }
        }

        $k = $k % count($tmp1R);
        return $tmp1R[$n - 3];
    }

    public function findAlternativeSequence(int $n, int $k): string
    {
        if ($n === 2) {
            return 'aa';
        } elseif ($n === 1) {
            return 'a';
        }

        $cnt = $k + 1;
        $i = 1;
        while ($i < $n - 2) {
            $cnt %= $n;
            if ($cnt == $n - 3) {
                $st = str_repeat('a', $n - 3 - $i) . 'a';
                return $st;
            }
            $cnt -= 1;
            $i += 1;
        }

        $cnt = $k + 1;
        $i = 1;
        $st = '';
        while ($i < $n - 2) {
            $cnt %= $n;
            if ($cnt == $n - 3) {
                $st = str_repeat('a', $n - 3) . $st;
                return $st;
            }
            $cnt -= 1;
            $i += 1;
        }

        return '';
    }
}

namespace Algorithm;

use Countable;

class Solution {
    private string $A;
    private string $B;

    public function __construct(string $A, string $B) {
        $this->A = $A;
        $this->B = $B;
    }

    public function getCarries(): int {
        $carry = 0;
        $i = strlen($this->A) - 1;
        $j = strlen($this->B) - 1;

        while ($j >= 0) {
            $x = ($i >= 0) ? (int)$this->A[$i] : 0;
            $y = ($j >= 0) ? (int)$this->B[$j] : 0;

            if ($x + $y > 9) {
                return -1;
            } else {
                $carry += $x + $y;
            }

            $i--;
            $j--;
        }

        return $carry;
    }

    public static function calculateDifference(array $A, array $B): int {
        $cnt_A = array_count_values($A);
        $cnt_B = array_count_values($B);
        $keys = array_intersect_key($cnt_A, $cnt_B);
        $result = 0;

        foreach ($keys as $key => $value) {
            $result += abs($cnt_A[$key] - $cnt_B[$key]);
        }

        return $result;
    }
}

namespace PopulationGraph;

class GraphSolver {
    private array $population;
    private array $graph;
    private array $ans;
    private int $maxIndex;

    public function solve(): void {
        $n = intval(fgets(STDIN));
        $this->population = array_map('intval', explode(' ', trim(fgets(STDIN))));
        $this->graph = array_fill(0, $n, []);
        
        for ($i = 0; $i < $n - 1; $i++) {
            list($u, $v) = array_map('intval', explode(' ', trim(fgets(STDIN))));
            $u--; $v--;
            $this->graph[$u][] = $v;
            $this->graph[$v][] = $u;
        }

        $this->maxIndex = array_keys($this->population, max($this->population))[0];
        $this->ans = array_fill(0, $n, -1);
        $this->dfs($this->maxIndex, -1);
        
        foreach ($this->ans as $index => $value) {
            echo $value === -1 ? "0 " : ($value + 1) . " ";
        }
        echo "\n";
    }

    private function dfs(int $u, int $p): void {
        if ($this->population[$u] === $this->maxIndex) {
            $this->ans[$u] = $u;
        } else {
            $maxPop = -1;
            $maxPopIndex = -1;

            foreach ($this->graph[$u] as $v) {
                if ($v != $p) {
                    $this->dfs($v, $u);
                    if ($this->population[$this->ans[$v]] > $maxPop) {
                        $maxPop = $this->population[$this->ans[$v]];
                        $maxPopIndex = $this->ans[$v];
                    }
                }
            }
            $this->ans[$u] = $maxPopIndex === -1 ? $u : $maxPopIndex;
        }
    }
}

    (new GraphSolver())->solve();

function snukeSatisfaction() {
    $N = intval(trim(fgets(STDIN)));
    $a = array_map('intval', explode(' ', trim(fgets(STDIN))));

    $b = array_fill(0, $N + 1, 0);
    for ($i = 0; $i < $N; $i++) {
        if ($a[$i] <= $N) {
            $b[$a[$i]] = $i + 1;
        }
    }

    $p = array_fill(0, $N + 1, 0);
    for ($i = 1; $i <= $N; $i++) {
        $p[$i] = $p[$i - 1] + ($b[$i] == 0 || $b[$i] < $b[$i - 1] ? 1 : 0);
    }

    $ans = $p[$N];
    for ($i = 1; $i < $N; $i++) {
        $ans = min($ans, $p[$i] + ($N - $i - 1));
    }

    if ($ans == $N) {
        $ans = -1;
    }

    echo $ans . PHP_EOL;
}

namespace App;

use JetBrains\PhpStorm\ArrayShape;

class TupleValidator {
    public static function valid(array $tuples1, array $tuples2): int {
        $cc1 = self::countProducts($tuples1);
        $cc2 = self::countProducts($tuples2);
        
        if (array_sum($cc1) === 0 || array_sum($cc2) === 0) {
            return 0;
        }
        
        $maxCount1 = max($cc1);
        $maxCount2 = max($cc2);

        if ($maxCount1 < $maxCount2) {
            return 0;
        }
        if ($maxCount2 < $maxCount1) {
            return 1;
        }
        
        return self::countLargeOccurrences($cc1) + self::countLargeOccurrences($cc2);
    }

    private static function countProducts(array $tuples): array {
        $counter = [];
        foreach ($tuples as [$a, $b, $c, $d]) {
            foreach ([$a, $b] as $x) {
                foreach ([$c, $d] as $y) {
                    $product = $x * $y;
                    if (isset($counter[$product])) {
                        $counter[$product]++;
                    } else {
                        $counter[$product] = 1;
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        return $counter;
    }

    private static function countLargeOccurrences(array $counter): int {
        return array_sum(array_filter($counter, fn($c) => $c >= 1e6));
    }
}

namespace App;

class Main {
    const MOD = 1000000007;

    public static function run() {
        $N = intval(trim(fgets(STDIN)));
        $X = array_map('intval', explode(' ', trim(fgets(STDIN))));

        $factorial = array_fill(0, $N, 1);
        for ($i = 1; $i < $N; $i++) {
            $factorial[$i] = ($factorial[$i - 1] * $i) % self::MOD;
        }

        $inv_factorial = array_fill(0, $N, 1);
        $inv_factorial[$N - 1] = self::modularExponentiation($factorial[$N - 1], self::MOD - 2);
        for ($i = $N - 2; $i >= 0; $i--) {
            $inv_factorial[$i] = ($inv_factorial[$i + 1] * ($i + 1)) % self::MOD;
        }

        $dp = array_fill(0, $N, 0);
        for ($i = 0; $i < $N - 1; $i++) {
            $dp[$i + 1] = ($dp[$i] + ($X[$i + 1] - $X[$i]) * ($N - $i - 1) * $factorial[$N - $i - 2]) % self::MOD;
        }

        $ans = array_reduce($X, fn($carry, $item) => ($carry + $item - $X[0]) % self::MOD, 0);
        $ans = ($ans * $factorial[$N - 1]) % self::MOD;

        echo $ans . "\n";
    }

    private static function modularExponentiation($base, $exp) {
        $result = 1;
        while ($exp > 0) {
            if ($exp % 2 == 1) {
                $result = ($result * $base) % self::MOD;
            }
            $base = ($base * $base) % self::MOD;
            $exp = intval($exp / 2);
        }
        return $result;
    }
}

Main::run();

namespace Algorithm;

class AnagramComparator {
    public function compareAnagrams(int $t): void {
        for ($i = 0; $i < $t; $i++) {
            $str1 = strtolower(trim(fgets(STDIN)));
            $str2 = strtolower(trim(fgets(STDIN)));
            $str1Array = str_split($str1);
            $str2Array = str_split($str2);

            if (count(array_count_values($str1Array)) == count(array_count_values($str2Array)) && count(array_diff($str1Array, $str2Array)) === 0) {
                echo array_count_values($str2Array)[$str2Array[0]] . PHP_EOL;
            } else {
                while ($str1Array != $str2Array) {
                    $li = [];
                    $final = [];
                    $j = 0;

                    foreach ($str1Array as $char) {
                        if ($str2Array[$j] !== $char) {
                            $li[] = ord($str2Array[$j]) - ord($char);
                        } else {
                            $j++;
                        }
                    }

                    foreach ($li as $item) {
                        if (count($final) != 0 && $item < end($li)) {
                            if (end($final) == 0) {
                                $final[count($final) - 1] = $item;
                            } else {
                                $final[] = $item;
                            }
                        } elseif ($item == 0) {
                            $final[] = $item;
                        } else {
                            $final[] = $item;
                        }
                    }
                    echo array_sum($final) . PHP_EOL;
                    break;
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

<?php

namespace Algorithm;

class Solution {
    public function countOnesAndRespond(int $n, string $s): string {
        $count = 0;
        for ($i = 0; $i < $n; $i++) {
            if ($s[$i] === '1') {
                $count++;
            }
        }
        return $count === 0 ? "EASY" : "HARD";
    }

    public function intersection(array $nums1, array $nums2): array {
        return array_values(array_intersect($nums1, $nums2));
    }

    public function canBeEqual(array $target, array $arr): bool {
        sort($target);
        sort($arr);
        return $target === $arr;
    }

    public function countSegments(string $s): int {
        $count = 0;
        $prev = ' ';
        for ($i = 0; $i < strlen($s); $i++) {
            if ($s[$i] === ' ' && $prev !== ' ') {
                $count++;
            }
            $prev = $s[$i];
        }
        return $count + ($s[strlen($s) - 1] !== ' ' ? 1 : 0);
    }

    public function constructArr(array $a): array {
        $res = array_fill(0, count($a), 1);
        $left = $right = 1;

        for ($i = 0; $i < count($a); $i++) {
            $res[$i] *= $left;
            $res[count($a) - 1 - $i] *= $right;
            $left *= $a[$i];
            $right *= $a[count($a) - 1 - $i];
        }
        return $res;
    }

    public function removeDuplicates(string $s): string {
        $out = [];
        foreach (str_split($s) as $ch) {
            if (!empty($out) && $ch === end($out)) {
                array_pop($out);
            } else {
                $out[] = $ch;
            }
        }
        return implode('', $out);
    }

    public function maxProduct(array $nums): int {
        $dpMax = $dpMin = $globalMax = $nums[0];
        for ($i = 1; $i < count($nums); $i++) {
            $tempDpMin = $dpMin;
            $tempDpMax = $dpMax;
            $dpMax = max($tempDpMin * $nums[$i], $tempDpMax * $nums[$i], $nums[$i]);
            $dpMin = min($tempDpMin * $nums[$i], $tempDpMax * $nums[$i], $nums[$i]);
            $globalMax = max($globalMax, $dpMax);
        }
        return $globalMax;
    }

    public function findMaxConsecutiveOnes(array $nums): int {
        $left = $right = 0;
        $count = $output = 0;

        while ($right < count($nums)) {
            if ($nums[$right] === 0) {
                $count++;
            }
            while ($count > 1) {
                if ($nums[$left] === 0) {
                    $count--;
                }
                $left++;
            }
            $output = max($output, $right - $left + 1);
            $right++;
        }
        return $output;
    }
}

namespace App\Algorithm;

class MoveCalculator
{
    public function minimumMoves(int $n, int $k, array $a): int
    {
        sort($a);
        $minVal = $a[0];
        $maxVal = $a[$n - 1];
        $minCount = count(array_keys($a, $minVal));
        $maxCount = count(array_keys($a, $maxVal));
        $moves = 0;

        while ($maxCount < $k) {
            $index = array_search($maxVal, $a);
            $a[$index]--;
            $moves++;
            $maxCount = count(array_keys($a, $maxVal));
        }

        while ($minCount < $k) {
            $index = array_search($minVal, $a);
            $a[$index]++;
            $moves++;
            $minCount = count(array_keys($a, $minVal));
        }

        return $moves;
    }
}

namespace Algorithm\Heap;

class CeilingHeap {
    public function ceilingHeap(array $A, int $v): int {
        $maxValue = max($A);
        $cnts = array_fill(0, $maxValue + 1, 0);
        
        foreach ($A as $v_) {
            $cnts[$v_]++;
        }

        $h = array_fill(0, $maxValue + 1, 0);
        for ($h_i = count($h) - 1; $h_i >= 0; $h_i--) {
            $cnts[$h_i] += $cnts[$h_i + 1];
        }

        $i = 0;
        $next_i = 0;
        
        foreach ($h as $h_i) {
            while ($next_i < count($h) && $h[$h_i] == $cnts[$next_i]) {
                $i++;
                $next_i++;
            }

            if ($h[$h_i] <= 0) {
                return -1;
            }

            while ($next_i < count($h) && ($h[$h_i] + $h[$next_i]) <= 0) {
                $i++;
                $next_i++;
            }
        }

        return $i;
    }
}

namespace StringSwapper;

class Solution {
    public function solve(array $s, array $t): array {
        $n = count($s);
        $count = 0;
        $operations = [];

        for ($i = 0; $i < $n; $i++) {
            if ($s[$i] !== $t[$i]) {
                for ($j = $i + 1; $j < $n; $j++) {
                    if ($s[$j] === $t[$i]) {
                        [$s[$i], $s[$j]] = [$s[$j], $s[$i]];
                        $operations[] = [$i + 1, $j + 1]; // 1-indexed
                        $count++;
                        break;
                    }
                }
            }
            if ($s !== $t) {
                return [-1];
            }
        }
        return [$count, $operations];
    }
}

namespace Contest;

class CategorySolver
{
    private function getCategory(int $x): string
    {
        return match ($x % 4) {
            0 => 'D',
            1 => 'A',
            2 => 'C',
            default => 'B',
        };
    }

    public function solve(): void
    {
        $x = (int)fgets(STDIN);
        $bestCategory = $this->getCategory($x);
        $bestIncrease = 0;

        for ($i = 1; $i <= 2; $i++) {
            $newX = $x + $i;
            $newCategory = $this->getCategory($newX);
            if (($newCategory === 'A' && $bestCategory !== 'A') ||
                ($newCategory === 'B' && !in_array($bestCategory, ['A', 'B'])) ||
                ($newCategory === 'C' && $bestCategory === 'D')) {
                $bestCategory = $newCategory;
                $bestIncrease = $i;
            }
        }

        echo $bestIncrease . ' ' . $bestCategory . PHP_EOL;
    }
}

        $this->year = (int) substr($date, 0, 4);

        $this->year += $delta->year;
        $this->month += $delta->month;

            $this->month %= 12;

    }

namespace Tree;

class TreeNode {
    public int $val;
    public ?TreeNode $left;
    public ?TreeNode $right;

    public function __construct(int $x = 0, ?TreeNode $left = null, ?TreeNode $right = null) {
        $this->val = $x;
        $this->left = $left;
        $this->right = $right;
    }
}

class Solution {
    public function distributeCoins(?TreeNode $root): int {
        $res = 0;
        $left = $this->leftSum($root);
        $right = $this->rightSum($root);
        return abs($left - $right);
    }

    private function leftSum(?TreeNode $node): int {
        if (!$node) return 0;
        $left = $this->leftSum($node->left);
        $right = $this->leftSum($node->right);
        return $left + $right + $node->val;
    }

    private function rightSum(?TreeNode $node): int {
        if (!$node) return 0;
        $right = $this->rightSum($node->right);
        $left = $this->rightSum($node->left);
        return $right + $left + $node->val;
    }
}

namespace Algorithm;

class Solution {
    private function is_possible(array $arr): bool {
        $n = count($arr);
        if ($n <= 2) {
            return true;
        }

        for ($i = 0; $i < $n; $i++) {
            if ($arr[$i] >= $arr[($i - 1 + $n) % $n] + $arr[($i + 1) % $n]) {
                return false;
            }
        }

        return true;
    }

    public function solve(int $n, array $arr): array {
        if (!$this->is_possible($arr)) {
            return ["NO"];
        }

        return array_merge(["YES"], $arr);
    }
}

namespace Algorithm;

class Solver {
    public function solve(): void {
        [$n, $l, $r] = array_map('intval', explode(' ', trim(fgets(STDIN))));
        $a = array_map('intval', explode(' ', trim(fgets(STDIN))));
        $c1 = array_fill(0, $n + 1, 0);
        $c2 = array_fill(0, $n + 1, 0);
        
        for ($i = 0; $i < $l; ++$i) {
            $c1[$a[$i]]++;
        }
        
        for ($i = $l; $i < $n; ++$i) {
            $c2[$a[$i]]++;
        }
        
        $res = 0;
        for ($i = 1; $i <= $n; ++$i) {
            $res += abs($c1[$i] - $c2[$i]);
        }
        
        $res /= 2;
        $d = abs($l - $r);
        
        if ($d > $res) {
            echo $d . "\n";
        } else {
            $res -= $d;
            echo $d + ($res / 2 * 2) . "\n";
        }
    }
}

class PatternGenerator

    public function generatePattern(array $array)
    {
        $m = $array[0];
        $n = $array[1];

        if ($n > 1) {
            for ($i = 1; $i < $n; $i += 2) {
                $line = [];
                if ($i % 2 !== 0) {
                    $line = array_fill(0, $m, '#');
                } else {
                    $line = array_fill(0, intval($m / 2), '#');
                    array_push($line, '.');
                    if ($m % 2 !== 0) {
                        array_push($line, '#');
                    }
                }
                echo implode('', $line) . "\n";
            }
        } else {
            echo $array[0];
        }
    }
}

namespace ChocolateChallenge;

use function max;

class ChocolateMaximizer {
    public function calculateMaxChocolates(array $chocolates): int {
        $n = count($chocolates);
        $accumulatedChocolates = $this->accumulate($chocolates);
        $maxChocolates = 0;

        foreach ($accumulatedChocolates as $totalChocolates) {
            $maxChocolates = max($maxChocolates, $totalChocolates);
        }

        for ($i = 1; $i < $n; $i++) {
            for ($j = 0; $j < $i; $j++) {
                if ($accumulatedChocolates[$i] > $accumulatedChocolates[$j]) {
                    $maxChocolates = max($maxChocolates, 
                                         $accumulatedChocolates[$i] - $accumulatedChocolates[$j]);
                }
            }
        }

        return $maxChocolates;
    }

    private function accumulate(array $numbers): array {
        $result = [];
        $sum = 0;
        foreach ($numbers as $number) {
            $sum += $number;
            $result[] = $sum;
        }
        return $result;
    }
}

namespace Algorithm;

class CostMinimizer {
    public function minimizeCost(array $a, int $k): int {
        $n = count($a);
        $s = [];

        for ($i = 0; $i < $n - 1; $i++) {
            $s[] = $a[$i] + $a[$i + 1];
        }

        sort($s);
        $initialCost = array_sum(array_map(fn($i) => $a[$i + 1] - $a[$i], range(0, $n - 2)));

        $minCost = $initialCost;

        for ($i = 0; $i < $k - 1; $i++) {
            $tempCost = 0;
            for ($j = $i + 1; $j < $k; $j++) {
                $tempCost -= ($s[$j] - $s[$j - 1]);
            }
            if ($tempCost < $minCost) {
                $minCost = $tempCost;
            }
        }

        return $minCost;
    }
}

namespace Algorithm;

class Solver {
    public static function solve(int $N, int $M, array $A): int {
        $count = array_fill(0, $M, 0);
        $count[0] = 1;
        $sum = 0;
        $ans = 0;

        foreach ($A as $a) {
            $sum = ($sum + $a) % $M;
            $ans += $count[$sum];
            $count[$sum]++;
        }

        return $ans;
    }
}

namespace Algorithm;

class BeautifulNumbers {
    public function multiplyBeautifulNumbers() {
        $n = (int)fgets(STDIN);
        $numbers = array_map('intval', explode(' ', trim(fgets(STDIN))));

        $nonBeautifulIdx = -1;
        foreach ($numbers as $i => $num) {
            if (!$this->isBeautiful($num)) {
                $nonBeautifulIdx = $i;
                break;
            }
        }

        if ($nonBeautifulIdx !== -1) {
            $numbers[$nonBeautifulIdx] = 1;
        }

        $product = array_reduce($numbers, fn($carry, $num) => $carry * $num, 1);
        return ltrim((string)$product, '0') ?: '0';
    }

    private function isBeautiful($num) {
        return substr_count((string)$num, '1') <= 1;
    }
}

namespace Algorithm;

class WonderfulColoring
{
    public static function count(string $s): int
    {
        $letterCount = array_count_values(str_split($s));
        $uniqueLetters = count($letterCount);
        $maxPairs = intdiv($uniqueLetters, 2);
        $k = 0;

        foreach ($letterCount as $count) {
            $k += intdiv($count, 2);
        }

        return min($k, $maxPairs);
    }
}

namespace Geometry;

class Triangle {
    private array $vertices;

    public function __construct(array $vertices) {
        $this->vertices = $vertices;
    }

    private function distance(array $p1, array $p2): float {
        return sqrt(pow($p1[0] - $p2[0], 2) + pow($p1[1] - $p2[1], 2));
    }

    private function isTriangleInequalitySatisfied(float $a, float $b, float $c): bool {
        return ($a + $b > $c) && ($a + $c > $b) && ($b + $c > $a);
    }

    private function heronArea(float $a, float $b, float $c): float {
        $s = ($a + $b + $c) / 2;
        return sqrt($s * ($s - $a) * ($s - $b) * ($s - $c));
    }

    private function circumcircleRadius(float $a, float $b, float $c): float {
        $area = $this->heronArea($a, $b, $c);
        return ($a * $b * $c) / (4 * $area);
    }

    public function maxRadiusInsideTriangle(): float {
        [$x1, $y1] = $this->vertices[0];
        [$x2, $y2] = $this->vertices[1];
        [$x3, $y3] = $this->vertices[2];

        $a = $this->distance([$x1, $y1], [$x2, $y2]);
        $b = $this->distance([$x2, $y2], [$x3, $y3]);
        $c = $this->distance([$x3, $y3], [$x1, $y1]);

        if (!$this->isTriangleInequalitySatisfied($a, $b, $c)) {
            throw new \InvalidArgumentException("The points do not form a valid triangle.");
        }

        $inradius = 2 * $this->heronArea($a, $b, $c) / ($a + $b + $c);
        $circumradius = $this->circumcircleRadius($a, $b, $c);

        return min($inradius, $circumradius);
    }
}

namespace Cipher;

class RepeatingCipher {
    public static function decryption(int $n, string $t): string {
        $s = '';
        for ($i = 0; $i < $n; $i++) {
            $c = round($i / ($n - $i));
            $s .= substr($t, $i * $c, $c);
        }
        return strrev($s);
    }
}

namespace Mailbox;

class MailBox {
    public static function extract(string $str): string {
        $parts = preg_split('/\b(from|to|subject:)\b/', $str);
        $result = array_filter($parts, fn($inp) => trim($inp) !== '' && self::isValid($inp));
        return count($result) > 0 ? trim(array_shift($result)) : '';
    }

    private static function isValid(string $input): bool {
        return preg_match('/^from:/', $input) || preg_match('/^to:/', $input) || preg_match('/^subject:/', $input);
    }
}

<?php

namespace TextAligner;

class CenterAlignText
{
    public static function align(array $textLines): string
    {
        $maxLength = max(array_map('strlen', $textLines));
        $lines = [str_repeat('*', $maxLength + 2)];

        $leftBias = true;

        foreach ($textLines as $line) {
            $padding = $maxLength - strlen($line);
            $leftPadding = intval($padding / 2);
            $rightPadding = $padding - $leftPadding;

            if ($padding % 2 !== 0) {
                if ($leftBias) {
                    $leftPadding++;
                } else {
                    $rightPadding++;
                }
                $leftBias = !$leftBias;
            }

            $lines[] = '*' . str_repeat(' ', $leftPadding) . $line . str_repeat(' ', $rightPadding) . '*';
        }

        $lines[] = str_repeat('*', $maxLength + 2);
        return implode(PHP_EOL, $lines);
    }
}

namespace ClimbingAlgorithm;

class Spider {
    public static function minStep(int $H, int $U, int $D): int {
        $effective_climb = $U - $D;
        $final_climb_height = $H - $U;

        $steps_to_final_climb = intdiv($final_climb_height, $effective_climb);
        
        if ($final_climb_height % $effective_climb !== 0) {
            $steps_to_final_climb++;
        }

        return $steps_to_final_climb + 1;
    }
}

namespace Algorithm;

class Solver {
    public function solve(int $n, array $r, array $b): int {
        if (array_sum($r) <= array_sum($b)) {
            return -1;
        }

        $l = 1;
        $h = array_sum($r);
        $best = $h;

        while ($l <= $h) {
            $m = intdiv($l + $h, 2);
            $rPoints = $bPoints = 0;

            for ($i = 0; $i < $n; $i++) {
                if ($r[$i]) {
                    $rPoints += min($m, $i + 1);
                }
                if ($b[$i]) {
                    $bPoints += min($m, $i + 1);
                }
            }

            if ($rPoints > $bPoints) {
                $best = $m;
                $h = $m - 1;
            } else {
                $l = $m + 1;
            }
        }

        return $best;
    }
}

function calculatePaths(int $n): int {
    $matrix = array_fill(0, $n, array_fill(0, $n, 1));

    for ($i = 1; $i < $n; $i++) {
        for ($j = 1; $j < $n; $j++) {
            $matrix[$i][$j] = $matrix[$i][$j - 1] + $matrix[$i - 1][$j];
        }
    }
    
    return $matrix[$n - 1][$n - 1];
}

namespace Algorithm;

class BitwiseOperations
{
    public function calculate(int $n): int
    {
        return $this->optimizedCalculation($n);
    }

    private function optimizedCalculation(int $n): int
    {
        $result = 0;

        for ($i = 0; $i < 32; $i++) {
            if (($n & (1 << $i)) !== 0) {
                $result++;
            }
        }

        return $result;
    }
}

namespace FuelCalculator;

class FuelUsage {
    public static function remainingDistance(float $consumption, float $petrol): float {
        $distance = ($petrol / $consumption) * 100;
        return round($distance, 2);
    }

    public static function fuelUsageReport(float $distance, float $consumption, float $petrol): array|string {
        if ($distance > self::remainingDistance($consumption, $petrol)) {
            return "You will need to refuel";
        }

        $reportDistance = floor(self::remainingDistance($consumption, $petrol) / 100) * 100;
        $reports = [];
        $interval = 100;

        while ($reportDistance <= $distance) {
            $remainingPetrol = min($petrol, ($distance - $reportDistance) * ($consumption / 100));
            $reports[] = [
                round($reportDistance, 2),
                $interval,
                round($remainingPetrol, 2)
            ];
            $interval += 100;
            $reportDistance += 100;
        }

        return $reports;
    }
}

namespace App;

class Solution {
    private const MOD = 1000000007;

    public function sumOfPower(array $nums, int $k): int {
        $dp = [0 => 1]; // Base case: one way to sum to 0 (empty subsequence)

        foreach ($nums as $num) {
            $newDp = $dp; // Create a copy of the current state

            foreach (array_keys($dp) as $sum) {
                if ($sum + $num <= $k) {
                    $newDp[$sum + $num] = ($newDp[$sum + $num] ?? 0 + $dp[$sum]) % self::MOD;
                }
            }
            $dp = $newDp;
        }

        $totalPower = 0;
        if (isset($dp[$k])) {
            $totalPower = $dp[$k];
        }

        return (int)$totalPower;
    }
}

    public static function calculateProfit(int $n, int $m, array $a): int
    {
        usort($a, fn($x, $y) => $y <=> $x);
        $moneyBought = 0;
        $i = 0;
        
        while ($n > 0) {
            if ($a[$i] >= $n) {
                $moneyBought += $a[$i] * $n;
                break;
            }
            $moneyBought += $a[$i] * $a[$i];
            $n -= $a[$i];
            $i++;
        }
        
        return $moneyBought;
    }
}
