<?php

namespace App;

class Adder 
{
    public function add(string $s1, string $s2): string 
    {
        $this->validateInput($s1);
        $this->validateInput($s2);
        
        $i = strlen($s1) - 1;
        $j = strlen($s2) - 1;
        $carry = 0;
        $result = [];
        
        while ($i >= 0 || $j >= 0 || $carry) {
            $digit1 = ($i >= 0) ? (int)$s1[$i] : 0;
            $digit2 = ($j >= 0) ? (int)$s2[$j] : 0;
            
            $total = $digit1 + $digit2 + $carry;
            $carry = intdiv($total, 10);
            $result[] = (string)($total % 10);

            $i--;
            $j--;
        }
        
        return implode('', array_reverse($result));
    }

    private function validateInput(string $input): void 
    {
        if (!preg_match('/^\d+$/', $input)) {
            throw new \InvalidArgumentException('Input must be a non-negative integer string.');
        }
    }
}

// Example usage:
try {
    $adder = new Adder();
    echo $adder->add("63457", "645") . PHP_EOL;  // Output: "64102"
    echo $adder->add("101", "102") . PHP_EOL;    // Output: "203"
} catch (\Exception $e) {
    error_log($e->getMessage());
    echo "An error occurred. Please check the logs.";
}

namespace App;

use Exception;
use Psr\Log\LoggerInterface;

class InputProcessor
{
    private int $n;
    private int $m;
    private array $x;
    private LoggerInterface $logger;

    public function __construct(LoggerInterface $logger)
    {
        $this->logger = $logger;
    }

    public function processInput(int $n, int $m, array $inputData): void
    {
        $this->validateInputs($n, $m);
        $this->n = $n;
        $this->m = $m;
        $this->x = array_fill(0, $n, true);
        
        $ss = false;
        $t = $inputData[0];

        if ($t === 1) {
            $ss = true;
        }

        if ($n === $m && ($ss || $m > 1)) {
            echo 0;
            return;
        }
        
        echo 1 . PHP_EOL;
        array_shift($inputData);  // Remove first element, already processed

        foreach ($inputData as $index => $str) {
            $this->processString($index, $str);
        }
    }

    private function validateInputs(int $n, int $m): void
    {
        if ($n <= 0 || $m < 0) {
            throw new Exception("Invalid inputs: n must be > 0 and m must be >= 0");
        }
    }

    private function processString(int $lineIndex, string $str): void
    {
        for ($j = 0; $j < strlen($str); $j++) {
            if ($str[$j] === '1') {
                if ($this->x[$j]) {
                    $this->x[$j] = false;
                } else {
                    $this->x[$j] = true;
                    $this->logger->info("Flipping index: " . ($j + 1));
                    echo ($j + 1) . PHP_EOL;
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

<?php

namespace ProblemSolver;

class InputValidator
{
    public static function validateResponses(array $responses): void
    {
        foreach ($responses as $response) {
            if ($response !== 0 && $response !== 1) {
                throw new \InvalidArgumentException("Responses must be 0 or 1.");
            }
        }
    }
}

class ProblemSolver
{
    public function solve(int $n, array $responses): string
    {
        InputValidator::validateResponses($responses);
        
        if (in_array(1, $responses)) {
            return "HARD";
        }
        
        return "EASY";
    }
}

// Logging class
class Logger
{
    public static function log(string $message): void
    {
        // Simplified logging mechanism
        echo $message . PHP_EOL;
    }
}

        $n = (int)readline("Enter number of responses: ");
        $responses = array_map('intval', explode(" ", readline("Enter responses (0 or 1): ")));

        $result = $solver->solve($n, $responses);
        
        Logger::log($result);
    } else {
        throw new \RuntimeException("This script can only be run in CLI mode.");
    }
} catch (\Exception $e) {
    Logger::log("Error: " . $e->getMessage());

namespace App;

class StringSolver
{
    public static function solve(string $input): string
    {
        $n = strlen($input);
        $chars = str_split($input);

        for ($i = 0; $i < $n; $i++) {
            if ($i % 2 === 0) {
                $chars[$i] = chr(min(ord($chars[$i]), ord($chars[$i]) + 1));
            } else {
                $chars[$i] = chr(max(ord($chars[$i]), ord($chars[$i]) - 1));
            }
        }

        return implode('', $chars);
    }
}

class Application
{
    public function run(): void
    {
        try {
            fwrite(STDOUT, "Enter number of test cases: ");
            $t = intval(trim(fgets(STDIN)));
            if ($t <= 0) {
                throw new \InvalidArgumentException("Test cases must be a positive integer.");
            }

            for ($i = 0; $i < $t; $i++) {
                fwrite(STDOUT, "Enter string for test case " . ($i + 1) . ": ");
                $s = trim(fgets(STDIN));

                if (empty($s)) {
                    throw new \InvalidArgumentException("Input string cannot be empty.");
                }

                $result = StringSolver::solve($s);
                fwrite(STDOUT, "Result: " . $result . PHP_EOL);
            }
        } catch (\Exception $e) {
            fwrite(STDERR, "Error: " . $e->getMessage() . PHP_EOL);
        }
    }
}

<?php

namespace GraphValidation;

class Graph
{
    private array $graph;
    
    public function __construct(int $n)
    {
        $this->graph = array_fill(0, $n + 1, []);
    }

    public function addEdge(int $a, int $b): void
    {
        if ($a < 1 || $b < 1 || $a >= count($this->graph) || $b >= count($this->graph)) {
            throw new \InvalidArgumentException("Invalid edge: ($a, $b)");
        }
        $this->graph[$a][] = $b;
        $this->graph[$b][] = $a;
    }

    public function isPossible(): bool
    {
        $oddNodes = $this->getOddDegreeNodes();
        $m = count($oddNodes);

        switch ($m) {
            case 0:
                return true;
            case 2:
                return $this->canConnectTwoOddNodes($oddNodes);
            case 4:
                return $this->canConnectFourOddNodes($oddNodes);
            default:
                return false;
        }
    }

    private function getOddDegreeNodes(): array
    {
        return array_filter(range(1, count($this->graph) - 1), function ($node) {
            return count($this->graph[$node]) % 2 === 1;
        });
    }

    private function canConnectTwoOddNodes(array $oddNodes): bool
    {
        [$a, $b] = $oddNodes;
        if (!in_array($b, $this->graph[$a])) {
            return true;
        }

        foreach (range(1, count($this->graph) - 1) as $c) {
            if (!in_array($c, $this->graph[$a]) && !in_array($c, $this->graph[$b])) {
                return true;
            }
        }

        return false;
    }

    private function canConnectFourOddNodes(array $oddNodes): bool
    {
        [$a, $b, $c, $d] = $oddNodes;
        if ((!in_array($b, $this->graph[$a]) && !in_array($d, $this->graph[$c])) ||
            (!in_array($c, $this->graph[$a]) && !in_array($d, $this->graph[$b])) ||
            (!in_array($d, $this->graph[$a]) && !in_array($c, $this->graph[$b]))) {
                return true;
        }

        return false;
    }
}

// Usage example with logging for error handling (not included in the main functionality)
try {
    $graph = new Graph(5); // Example number of nodes
    $graph->addEdge(1, 2);
    $graph->addEdge(2, 3);
    $graph->addEdge(3, 4);
    $graph->addEdge(1, 4);
    
    if ($graph->isPossible()) {
        echo "It's possible to connect the nodes.";
    } else {
        echo "It's not possible to connect the nodes.";
    }
} catch (\Exception $e) {
    error_log($e->getMessage());
}

namespace PolyhedronCalculator;

class PolyhedronCounter {
    private array $facesPerPolyhedron = [0, 0, 0, 0, 0];

    public function countFacesFromInput(array $inputs): int {
        foreach ($inputs as $input) {
            $this->updateFaceCount(trim($input));
        }
        return array_sum($this->facesPerPolyhedron);
    }

    private function updateFaceCount(string $polyhedron): void {
        $facesMap = [
            'Tetrahedron' => 4,
            'Cube' => 6,
            'Octahedron' => 8,
            'Dodecahedron' => 12,
            'Icosahedron' => 20,
        ];

        foreach ($facesMap as $name => $faces) {
            if (str_ends_with($polyhedron, $name)) {
                $this->facesPerPolyhedron[array_search($faces, array_values($facesMap))] += $faces;
                return;
            }
        }
    }
}

class HouseNumberCalculator {
    public function getHouseNumbers(array $iakeys): int {
        $houseNumbers = array_map(fn($iakey) => $iakey * 1000 + $iakey, $iakeys);
        $houseNumberString = implode('', array_map('strval', $houseNumbers));
        return array_sum(array_map('intval', str_split($houseNumberString)));
    }
}

function main(array $inputs, array $iakeys): void {
    $polyhedronCounter = new PolyhedronCounter();
    $houseNumberCalculator = new HouseNumberCalculator();

    $totalFaces = $polyhedronCounter->countFacesFromInput($inputs);
    $sumHouseNumbers = $houseNumberCalculator->getHouseNumbers($iakeys);

    echo "Total Faces: " . $totalFaces . PHP_EOL;
    echo "Sum of House Numbers: " . $sumHouseNumbers . PHP_EOL;
}

// Example Usage
if (php_sapi_name() === 'cli') {
    $inputs = explode(PHP_EOL, trim(fread(STDIN, 1024)));
    $iakeys = array_map('intval', explode(' ', trim(fgets(STDIN))));
    main($inputs, $iakeys);
}

<?php

namespace FrameDrawer;

class Frame
{
    private int $height;
    private int $width;

    public function __construct(int $height, int $width)
    {
        $this->validateDimensions($height, $width);
        $this->height = $height;
        $this->width = $width;
    }

    private function validateDimensions(int $height, int $width): void
    {
        if ($height < 2 || $width < 2) {
            throw new \InvalidArgumentException("Height and Width must be at least 2.");
        }
    }

    public function drawFrame(): array
    {
        $pattern = [];
        if ($this->height === 2 || $this->width === 2) {
            return $this->handleCaseTwo();
        }

        return $this->handleCaseOther();
    }

    private function handleCaseTwo(): array
    {
        $pattern[] = str_repeat('#', $this->width) . PHP_EOL;
        $pattern[] = '#' . str_repeat('.', $this->width - 4) . '#' . PHP_EOL;
        $pattern[] = str_repeat('#', $this->width) . PHP_EOL;

        return $this->finalizePattern($pattern);
    }

    private function handleCaseOther(): array
    {
        $pattern = [];
        $matrix = range(0, $this->width - 1);

        for ($i = 2; $i <= ($this->height / 2) + 1; $i++) {
            $pattern[] = '#' . str_repeat('.', $matrix[$i]) . '#' . PHP_EOL;
        }

        for ($i = $this->height / 2; $i >= 1; $i--) {
            $pattern[] = '#' . str_repeat('.', $matrix[$i]) . '#' . PHP_EOL;
        }

        return $this->finalizePattern($pattern);
    }

    private function finalizePattern(array $pattern): array
    {
        $patternString = implode('', $pattern);
        $this->logPattern($patternString);
        $result = ['success-or-failure' => ''];

        return [$patternString, $result];
    }

    private function logPattern(string $patternString): void
    {
        // Simple logging mechanism
        error_log("Generated Frame:\n" . $patternString);
    }
}

// Usage

<?php

namespace App\Utils;

class ResourceManager {
    private array $customers;

    public function __construct(array $customers) {
        $this->customers = $customers;
    }

    public function processResources(): array {
        $validResources = 0;
        foreach ($this->customers as $customer) {
            $resources = $customer['resources'];
            if ($resources > 0) {
                $validResources++;
            }
        }
        return [
            'validCount' => $validResources,
            'totalCount' => count($this->customers)
        ];
    }

    public function logCustomers(array $results): void {
        error_log("Valid resource customers: {$results['validCount']}, Total: {$results['totalCount']}");
    }
}

class ArrayProcessor {
    public static function simpleArraySum(array $ar): void {
        if (empty($ar)) {
            throw new InvalidArgumentException("Array cannot be empty.");
        }

        $n = count($ar);
        $totalCount = $n;
        $totalSum = 0;

        foreach ($ar as $value) {
            if ($value > 0) {
                $totalSum += $value;
            }
        }

        $average = $n !== 0 ? round($totalSum / $n) : 0;
        self::outputResults($average, $totalCount);
    }

    private static function outputResults(int $average, int $totalCount): void {
        echo "Average: " . $average . PHP_EOL;
        echo "Total Count: " . $totalCount . PHP_EOL;
        error_log("Calculated average: {$average}");
    }
}

// Example usage
$customers = [
    ['id' => 1, 'resources' => 1],
    ['id' => 2, 'resources' => 1],
    // Additional customer data
    ['id' => 20, 'resources' => 1],
];

$resourceManager = new ResourceManager($customers);
$results = $resourceManager->processResources();
$resourceManager->logCustomers($results);

$arrayInput = [7, 5, 3, 3, 2, 2, 11, 19, 14, 19];
ArrayProcessor::simpleArraySum($arrayInput);

<?php

namespace StringUtilities;

class StringManipulator
{
    private string $inputString;

    public function __construct(string $inputString)
    {
        $this->validateInput($inputString);
        $this->inputString = $inputString;
    }

    private function validateInput(string $inputString): void
    {
        if (empty($inputString) || !preg_match('/^[01]+$/', $inputString)) {
            throw new \InvalidArgumentException('Input must be a non-empty string of 0s and 1s.');
        }
    }

    public function smallestStringWithOneDeletion(): string
    {
        $s = str_split($this->inputString);
        $minCount = min(count(array_filter($s, fn($x) => $x === '1')), count(array_filter($s, fn($x) => $x === '0')));
        $n = count($s);

        foreach ($s as $key => $c) {
            unset($s[$key]);
            if ($this->countOnes($s) + $this->countZeros($s) + $minCount < $n) {
                break;
            }
            $s[] = $c;
        }

        return implode('', $s);
    }

    private function countOnes(array $s): int
    {
        return count(array_filter($s, fn($x) => $x === '1'));
    }

    private function countZeros(array $s): int
    {
        return count(array_filter($s, fn($x) => $x === '0'));
    }
}

// Example usage
try {
    $input = readline("Enter a binary string: ");
    $manipulator = new StringManipulator($input);
    echo $manipulator->smallestStringWithOneDeletion();
} catch (\Exception $e) {
    echo 'Error: ' . $e->getMessage();
}

declare(strict_types=1);

namespace App;

class JumpCalculator
{
    private array $heights;
    private int $n;
    private int $k;

    public function __construct(array $heights, int $k)
    {
        if (empty($heights) || $k <= 0) {
            throw new \InvalidArgumentException('Heights cannot be empty and k must be greater than 0.');
        }

        $this->heights = $heights;
        $this->n = count($heights);
        $this->k = $k;
    }

    public function calculateMinimumEnergy(): int
    {
        $dp = array_fill(0, $this->n, PHP_INT_MAX);
        $dp[0] = 0;

        for ($i = 0; $i < $this->n; $i++) {
            for ($j = 1; $j <= $this->k; $j++) {
                if ($i + $j < $this->n) {
                    $energyCost = abs($this->heights[$i] - $this->heights[$i + $j]);
                    $dp[$i + $j] = min($dp[$i + $j], $dp[$i] + $energyCost);
                }
            }
        }

        return $dp[$this->n - 1];
    }
}

function solve(): int
{
    $input = trim(fgets(STDIN));
    list($n, $k) = array_map('intval', explode(' ', $input));
    
    $heightsInput = trim(fgets(STDIN));
    $heights = array_map('intval', explode(' ', $heightsInput));
    
    try {
        $jumpCalculator = new JumpCalculator($heights, $k);
        return $jumpCalculator->calculateMinimumEnergy();
    } catch (\Exception $e) {
        fwrite(STDERR, 'Error: ' . $e->getMessage() . PHP_EOL);
        return -1; // Return an error code
    }
}

$result = solve();
echo $result . PHP_EOL;

<?php

namespace App\Utils;

class ZeroEraser
{
    private const ERROR_INVALID_INPUT = 'Invalid input provided.';
    private const ERROR_LOG_FILE = '/var/log/zero_eraser.log';

    public function minZerosToErase(string $s): int
    {
        $this->validateInput($s);

        $minZeros = strlen($s);
        $currentZeros = 0;
        $i = 0;

        while ($i < strlen($s)) {
            if ($s[$i] === '0') {
                $currentZeros++;
            } elseif ($i + 1 < strlen($s) && $s[$i + 1] === '1') {
                $minZeros = min($minZeros, $currentZeros);
                $i += 2;
            } else {
                $i++;
            }
        }

        return $minZeros > 0 ? strlen($s) - 2 * ($minZeros - 1) : 0;
    }

    private function validateInput(string $s): void
    {
        if (!preg_match('/^[01]+$/', $s)) {
            $this->logError(self::ERROR_INVALID_INPUT);
            throw new \InvalidArgumentException(self::ERROR_INVALID_INPUT);
        }
    }

    private function logError(string $message): void
    {
        error_log($message, 3, self::ERROR_LOG_FILE);
    }
}

    }
}

namespace App\Math;

class PrimeFinder
{
    public function solution(int $n): array
    {
        $this->validateInput($n);

        $a = 4;
        while (true) {
            if ($a % $n === 0) {
                $b = $a - $n;
                if (!$this->isPrime($b)) {
                    return [$a, $b];
                }
            }
            $a += 2;
        }
    }

    private function isPrime(int $n): bool
    {
        if ($n < 2) {
            return false;
        }
        for ($d = 2; $d * $d <= $n; $d++) {
            if ($n % $d === 0) {
                return false;
            }
        }
        return true;
    }

    private function validateInput(int $n): void
    {
        if ($n <= 0) {
            throw new \InvalidArgumentException('Input must be a positive integer.');
        }
    }
}

try {

    $n = 1;
    echo implode(', ', $finder->solution($n)) . PHP_EOL;

    $n = 512;
    echo implode(', ', $finder->solution($n)) . PHP_EOL;
} catch (\Exception $e) {
    error_log($e->getMessage());
    echo 'An error occurred. Please check the logs for more details.' . PHP_EOL;
}

namespace App;

use InvalidArgumentException;

class Solution
{
    private array $dp;

    public function solve(): void
    {
        $n = intval(trim(fgets(STDIN)));
        $tag = array_map('intval', explode(' ', trim(fgets(STDIN))));
        $s = array_map('intval', explode(' ', trim(fgets(STDIN))));
        
        if ($n !== count($tag) || $n !== count($s)) {
            throw new InvalidArgumentException("Input sizes do not match");
        }

        $this->initializeDP($n);
        $this->calculateDP($n, $tag, $s);
        echo $this->dp[$n][$n] . PHP_EOL;
    }

    private function initializeDP(int $n): void
    {
        $this->dp = array_fill(0, $n + 1, array_fill(0, $n + 1, 0));
    }

    private function calculateDP(int $n, array $tag, array $s): void
    {
        for ($i = 0; $i < $n; $i++) {
            for ($j = 0; $j <= $i; $j++) {
                if ($tag[$i] === $tag[$j]) {
                    $this->dp[$i + 1][$j + 1] = $this->dp[$i][$j];
                } else {
                    $this->dp[$i + 1][$j + 1] = max($this->dp[$i][$j] + abs($s[$i] - $s[$j]), $this->dp[$i][$j + 1]);
                }
            }
        }
    }

    public static function main(): void
    {
        $testCases = intval(trim(fgets(STDIN)));
        for ($i = 0; $i < $testCases; $i++) {
            (new self())->solve();
        }
    }
}

Solution::main();

namespace Utility;

class MathHelper {
    public static function gcd(int $a, int $b): int {
        while ($b !== 0) {
            $temp = $b;
            $b = $a % $b;
            $a = $temp;
        }
        return $a;
    }

    public static function reduceGcd(array $distances): int {
        return array_reduce($distances, 'self::gcd');
    }
}

class Main {
    private array $args;

    public function __construct(array $args) {
        $this->args = $args;
    }

    public function run(): void {
        try {
            $N = (int)$this->args[1];
            $X = (int)$this->args[2];
            $x = array_map('intval', array_slice($this->args, 3));
            $x[] = $X;

            if (!$this->validateInput($N, $x)) {
                throw new \InvalidArgumentException("Invalid input values.");
            }

            sort($x);
            $distances = $this->calculateDistances($x);
            $result = MathHelper::reduceGcd($distances);
            echo $result . PHP_EOL;

        } catch (\Exception $e) {
            error_log("Error: " . $e->getMessage());
            echo "An error occurred. Please check the logs." . PHP_EOL;
        }
    }

    private function validateInput(int $N, array $x): bool {
        return $N === count($x) - 1 && $N >= 0 && $x !== [];
    }

    private function calculateDistances(array $x): array {
        $distances = [];
        for ($i = 1; $i < count($x); $i++) {
            $distances[] = $x[$i] - $x[$i - 1];
        }
        return $distances;
    }
}

if (PHP_SAPI === 'cli') {
    $app = new Main($argv);
    $app->run();
}

<?php

namespace MathUtilities;

class LCMAndGCDCalculator
{
    private const MOD = 1000000007;

    public function calculateSum($n)
    {
        if ($n < 3) {
            throw new InvalidArgumentException("Value of n must be at least 3.");
        }

        $totalSum = 0;

        for ($c = 1; $c <= $n - 2; $c++) {
            $nMinusC = $n - $c;
            foreach ($this->getDivisors($nMinusC) as $d) {
                $pairsCount = $this->countGCDPairs($nMinusC / $d);
                $gcd = $this->gcd($c, $d);
                $totalSum = ($totalSum + ($this->lcm($c, $gcd) * $pairsCount) % self::MOD) % self::MOD;
            }
        }

        return $totalSum;
    }

    private function countGCDPairs($m)
    {
        return $this->phi($m);
    }

    private function getDivisors($n)
    {
        $divisors = [];
        for ($i = 1; $i * $i <= $n; $i++) {
            if ($n % $i === 0) {
                $divisors[] = $i;
                if ($i !== $n / $i) {
                    $divisors[] = $n / $i;
                }
            }
        }
        return $divisors;
    }

    private function phi($n)
    {
        $result = $n;
        for ($i = 2; $i * $i <= $n; $i++) {
            if ($n % $i === 0) {
                while ($n % $i === 0) {
                    $n /= $i;
                }
                $result -= $result / $i;
            }
        }
        
        if ($n > 1) {
            $result -= $result / $n;
        }
        
        return $result;
    }

    private function gcd($a, $b)
    {
        while ($b) {
            $temp = $b;
            $b = $a % $b;
            $a = $temp;
        }
        return $a;
    }

    private function lcm($x, $y)
    {
        return ($x * $y) / $this->gcd($x, $y);
    }
}

// Example usage
try {
    $calculator = new LCMAndGCDCalculator();
    $result = $calculator->calculateSum(10);  // Replace 10 with desired n
    echo "Total Sum: " . $result;
} catch (Exception $e) {
    error_log($e->getMessage());
    echo "An error occurred. Please check the logs.";
}

<?php

namespace MyApp;

class DataProcessor
{
    private array $first;
    private array $second;
    private array $third;

    public function __construct(array $data)
    {
        $this->validateInput($data);
        $this->parseInput($data);
    }

    private function validateInput(array $data): void
    {
        if (count($data) < 3) {
            throw new \InvalidArgumentException("Insufficient data provided.");
        }
    }

    private function parseInput(array $data): void
    {
        [$k1, $k2, $k3] = array_map('intval', array_slice($data, 0, 3));
        $this->first = array_map('intval', array_slice($data, 3, $k1));
        $this->second = array_map('intval', array_slice($data, 3 + $k1, $k2));
        $this->third = array_map('intval', array_slice($data, 3 + $k1 + $k2));
    }

    public function process(): void
    {
        $maxPref = $this->calculateMaxPrefix($this->first);
        $minSuff = $this->calculateMinSuffix($this->third);

        // Further processing could be added here
    }

    private function calculateMaxPrefix(array $arr): array
    {
        $maxPref = array_fill(0, count($arr) + 1, 0);
        for ($i = 1; $i <= count($arr); $i++) {
            $maxPref[$i] = max($maxPref[$i - 1], $arr[$i - 1]);
        }
        return $maxPref;
    }

    private function calculateMinSuffix(array $arr): array
    {
        $minSuff = array_fill(0, count($arr) + 1, PHP_INT_MAX);
        $minSuff[count($arr)] = PHP_INT_MAX; // Initial infinity
        for ($i = count($arr) - 1; $i >= 0; $i--) {
            $minSuff[$i] = min($minSuff[$i + 1], $arr[$i]);
        }
        return $minSuff;
    }
}

function main(): void
{
    $data = explode(' ', trim(file_get_contents("php://stdin")));
    $processor = new DataProcessor($data);
    $processor->process();
}

main();

<?php

declare(strict_types=1);

namespace App;

use InvalidArgumentException;

class ScoreCalculator
{
    private array $scores = [];
    private int $maxPoints = 0;
    private int $earliestRound = PHP_INT_MAX;
    private ?string $winner = null;

    public function run(): void
    {
        try {
            $n = $this->getInputCount();
            for ($i = 0; $i < $n; $i++) {
                $this->processInput();
            }
            $this->outputWinner();
        } catch (InvalidArgumentException $e) {
            $this->logError('Input Error: ' . $e->getMessage());
        } catch (\Exception $e) {
            $this->logError('Unexpected Error: ' . $e->getMessage());
        }
    }

    private function getInputCount(): int
    {
        $input = trim(fgets(STDIN));
        if (!is_numeric($input) || (int)$input <= 0) {
            throw new InvalidArgumentException('The input must be a positive integer.');
        }
        return (int)$input;
    }

    private function processInput(): void
    {
        $input = trim(fgets(STDIN));
        [$name, $scoreStr] = explode(' ', $input);
        $score = (int)$scoreStr;

        if ($score < 0) {
            throw new InvalidArgumentException('Score cannot be negative.');
        }

        if (!isset($this->scores[$name])) {
            $this->scores[$name] = 0;
        }
        $this->scores[$name] += $score;

        $this->updateWinner($name);
    }

    private function updateWinner(string $name): void
    {
        if ($this->scores[$name] > $this->maxPoints || 
            ($this->scores[$name] === $this->maxPoints && count($this->scores) < $this->earliestRound)) {
            $this->winner = $name;
            $this->maxPoints = $this->scores[$name];
            $this->earliestRound = count($this->scores);
        }
    }

    private function outputWinner(): void
    {
        if ($this->winner) {
            echo $this->winner . PHP_EOL;
        } else {
            echo 'No winner' . PHP_EOL;
        }
    }

    private function logError(string $message): void
    {
        error_log($message);
    }
}

$scoreCalculator = new ScoreCalculator();
$scoreCalculator->run();

namespace UnstoppableGaming;

class DigitCombinations
{
    private array $validDigits = ['0', '1', 'a', 'b', 'c', 'd', 'e'];
    
    public function generateCombinations(int $length): array
    {
        if ($length < 1) {
            throw new \InvalidArgumentException('Length of combinations must be at least 1.');
        }

        return $this->combine($this->validDigits, $length);
    }

    private function combine(array $digits, int $length, string $current = '', array &$result = []): array
    {
        if ($length === 0) {
            $result[] = $current;
            return $result;
        }

        foreach ($digits as $digit) {
            $this->combine($digits, $length - 1, $current . $digit, $result);
        }

        return $result;
    }
}

class Logger
{
    public function log(string $message): void
    {
        // Sensible logging implementation
        error_log($message);
    }
}

namespace App;

class IntervalHandler
{
    private int $left;
    private int $right;

    public function __construct()
    {
        $this->left = 0;
        $this->right = 0;
    }

    public function processIntervals(array $intervals, int $x): int
    {
        foreach ($intervals as $interval) {
            [$curLeft, $curRight] = $interval;

            if ($this->left <= $curLeft && $curRight <= $this->right) {
                $this->left = min($this->left, $curLeft);
                $this->right = max($this->right, $curRight);
            } else {
                $this->left = $curLeft;
                $this->right = $curRight;
            }
        }

        return ($this->left <= $x && $x <= $this->right) ? 
            ($this->right - $this->left + 1) : 1;
    }
}

class Main
{
    public function run(): void
    {
        $tc = (int)readline("Number of test cases: ");
        
        while ($tc--) {
            [$n, $x, $m] = array_map('intval', explode(' ', readline("Enter n, x, m: ")));
            $intervals = [];

            for ($i = 0; $i < $m; $i++) {
                $intervals[] = array_map('intval', explode(' ', readline("Enter interval $i: ")));
            }

            $handler = new IntervalHandler();
            $result = $handler->processIntervals($intervals, $x);

            echo $result . PHP_EOL;
        }
    }
}

    echo "An error occurred. Please check the logs.\n";

<?php

namespace TreeNodeCalculator;

class TreeNodeCounter
{
    private int $nodeCount;
    private array $leaves;
    private array $internalNodes;

    public function __construct(int $N, array $A)
    {
        $this->validateInputs($N, $A);
        $this->nodeCount = $N;
        $this->leaves = array_fill(0, $N + 1, 0);
        $this->internalNodes = array_fill(0, $N + 1, 0);
        $this->leaves[0] = $A[0];
        
        if ($this->processNodes($A)) {
            $this->calculateTotalNodes();
        }
    }

    private function validateInputs(int $N, array $A): void
    {
        if ($N <= 0 || count($A) !== $N + 1) {
            throw new \InvalidArgumentException("Invalid input values.");
        }
    }

    private function processNodes(array $A): bool
    {
        for ($d = 0; $d < $this->nodeCount; $d++) {
            if ($this->leaves[$d] > 0) {
                $this->internalNodes[$d + 1] = $this->leaves[$d];
                $this->leaves[$d + 1] += $this->internalNodes[$d + 1] * 2;

                if ($this->leaves[$d + 1] < $A[$d + 1]) {
                    $this->logError("Insufficient leaves at index $d");
                    return false;
                }

                $this->leaves[$d + 1] = $A[$d + 1];
            } elseif ($A[$d + 1] > 0) {
                $this->logError("Invalid state at index $d with positive leaves.");
                return false;
            }
        }

        if ($this->leaves[$this->nodeCount] !== $A[$this->nodeCount]) {
            $this->logError("Final leaves do not match expected value.");
            return false;
        }

        return true;
    }

    private function calculateTotalNodes(): void
    {
        $totalNodes = array_sum($this->internalNodes) + array_sum($this->leaves);
        echo $totalNodes . PHP_EOL;
    }

    private function logError(string $message): void
    {
        error_log($message);
        echo "-1" . PHP_EOL;
    }
}

<?php

declare(strict_types=1);

namespace App;

class ResponseCalculator
{
    private array $results = [];

    public function processInputs(int $n): array
    {
        for ($i = 0; $i < $n; $i++) {
            $input = $this->getInput();
            if ($this->validateInput($input)) {
                [$A, $B] = $this->parseInput($input);
                $this->results[] = $this->compareValues($A, $B);
            } else {
                $this->logError("Invalid input format on iteration $i.");
            }
        }

        return $this->results;
    }

    private function getInput(): string
    {
        return trim(fgets(STDIN));
    }

    private function validateInput(string $input): bool
    {
        return preg_match('/^\d+\s+\d+$/', $input) === 1;
    }

    private function parseInput(string $input): array
    {
        return array_map('intval', explode(' ', $input));
    }

    private function compareValues(int $A, int $B): string
    {
        return $A === $B ? "Yes" : "No";
    }

    private function logError(string $message): void
    {
        // Here you can integrate a logging library or simply use echo for simplicity
        error_log($message);
    }
}

// Usage example

$n = (int) trim(fgets(STDIN));  // Assuming n is provided as the first input

namespace BoxVolumeCalculator;

class VolumeCalculator
{
    private int $A;
    private int $B;

    public function __construct(int $A, int $B)
    {
        $this->validateInputs($A, $B);
        $this->A = $A;
        $this->B = $B;
    }

    public function getMaxVolume(): int
    {
        $s = 100;  
        if ($this->isValidVolume($s)) {
            return $s;
        } else {
            return (int)($s ** 3 / 64);
        }
    }

    private function validateInputs(int $A, int $B): void
    {
        if ($A < 1 || $A > 1000000 || $B < 1 || $B > 1000000) {
            throw new \InvalidArgumentException('Inputs must be in the range 1 to 1,000,000.');
        }
    }

    private function isValidVolume(int $s): bool
    {
        return $s ** 3 >= 36 * $this->A * $this->B;
    }
}

namespace App;

use InvalidArgumentException;
use Exception;

class Processor
{
    protected array $answer;

    public function __construct()
    {
        $this->answer = array_fill(0, 7, 0);
        $this->answer[0] = 1;
        $this->answer[6] = 1;
    }

    public function func(array $arr, int $idx = 0): array
    {
        if ($idx === count($arr) - 1) {
            return $this->answer;
        }

        for ($i = 1; $i <= 5; $i++) {
            if ($arr[$idx][$i] === 1) {
                $this->answer[$i] = 1;
            }
        }

        return $this->func($arr, $idx + 1);
    }

    public function readInput(): array
    {
        $arr = array_fill(0, 7, 0);
        for ($idx = 0; $idx < 7; $idx++) {
            $input = trim(fgets(STDIN));
            if (!is_numeric($input)) {
                throw new InvalidArgumentException("Invalid input, expected an integer.");
            }
            $arr[$idx] += (int)$input;
        }
        return $arr;
    }

    public function run()
    {
        $n = (int) trim(fgets(STDIN));
        if ($n <= 0) {
            throw new Exception("Number of test cases must be positive.");
        }

        for ($i = 0; $i < $n; $i++) {
            $arr = $this->readInput();
            echo array_sum($this->func($arr)) . PHP_EOL;
        }
    }
}

<?php

namespace App\Utils;

class SumFinder
{
    private array $data;
    private int $size;
    private int $target;

    public function __construct(array $data, int $target)
    {
        if (empty($data) || count($data) < 3) {
            throw new \InvalidArgumentException("Input array must contain at least three integers.");
        }

        $this->data = $data;
        $this->size = count($data);
        $this->target = $target;
    }

    public function threeSumClosest(): int
    {
        sort($this->data);  // Sort the array for two-pointer technique
        $closestSum = PHP_INT_MAX;  // Initialize closest sum as maximum integer value

        for ($i = 0; $i < $this->size - 2; $i++) {
            $left = $i + 1;
            $right = $this->size - 1;

            while ($left < $right) {
                $currentSum = $this->data[$i] + $this->data[$left] + $this->data[$right];

                if (abs($this->target - $currentSum) < abs($this->target - $closestSum) || 
                    (abs($this->target - $currentSum) === abs($this->target - $closestSum) && $currentSum > $closestSum)) {
                    $closestSum = $currentSum;  // Update if current sum is better
                }

                if ($currentSum < $this->target) {
                    $left++;  // Move left pointer right
                } else {
                    $right--;  // Move right pointer left
                }
            }
        }

        return $closestSum;
    }
}

<?php

declare(strict_types=1);

namespace GeometryChecker;

class PointAnalyzer
{
    private array $points;

    public function __construct(int $numberOfTests)
    {
        $this->points = [];
        $this->processTests($numberOfTests);
    }

    private function processTests(int $numberOfTests): void
    {
        for ($i = 0; $i < $numberOfTests; $i++) {
            $this->readPoints();
            $this->evaluatePoints();
        }
    }

    private function readPoints(): void
    {
        $this->points = [];
        for ($j = 0; $j < 4; $j++) {
            $input = trim(fgets(STDIN));
            if (!$this->validateInput($input)) {
                echo "Invalid input. Please enter three integers.\n";
                return;
            }
            $this->points[] = array_map('intval', explode(' ', $input));
        }
    }

    private function validateInput(string $input): bool
    {
        $values = explode(' ', $input);
        return count($values) === 3 && all(fn($val) => is_numeric($val), $values);
    }

    private function evaluatePoints(): void
    {
        if ($this->checkZCoordinatesEqual()) {
            echo "YES\n";
        } else {
            echo "NO\n";
        }
    }

    private function checkZCoordinatesEqual(): bool
    {
        return array_reduce($this->points, function ($carry, $point) {
            return $carry && $point[2] === $this->points[0][2];
        }, true);
    }
}

function run(): void
{
    $numberOfTests = (int) trim(fgets(STDIN));
    if ($numberOfTests <= 0) {
        echo "Number of tests must be positive.\n";
        return;
    }
    
    new PointAnalyzer($numberOfTests);
}

run();

<?php

namespace App\Utils;

class NumberProcessor
{
    private int $x;
    private int $y;
    private int $v = 1;

    public function __construct(int $x, int $y)
    {
        if ($y <= 0) {
            throw new InvalidArgumentException('Y must be greater than 0.');
        }

        $this->x = $x;
        $this->y = $y;
    }

    public function compute(): void
    {
        while ($this->y + $this->v - 1 >= $this->x) {
            $this->v++;
            $p = intdiv($this->x, $this->y) * pow(10, $this->y - 1) / 10;

            if ($p == $this->y - 1) {
                $this->y--;
                $this->v++;
            }

            if ($this->y === 1) {
                break;
            } else {
                $this->y--;
            }
        }

        if ($this->v > log10($this->y) + 1) {
            $this->y = 1;
            $this->v = log10($this->y) + 1;
            $z = $this->y * $this->v;
            $z = ($this->y - 1) * pow(10, ($this->v - 2)) / 10;
        } else {
            $this->x = $this->x * pow(10, ($this->y - $this->v));
        }

        $z = $this->x % $this->y;
        $this->x = intdiv($this->x, $this->y);
        $a = log10($z);

        if ($a === $this->v) {
            $this->printResult("YES", $this->v);
        } else {
            $this->printResult("NO");
        }
    }

    private function printResult(string $message, int $v = null): void
    {
        echo $message;
        if ($v !== null) {
            echo "\n{$v}\n";
        }
    }
}

}

<?php

namespace MastermindGame;

class Mastermind
{
    public function play(int $t, array $testCases): array
    {
        $results = [];
        
        foreach ($testCases as $case) {
            [$n, $x, $y, $guess] = $case;
            $colors = array_fill(1, $n + 1, []);
            
            foreach ($guess as $i => $color) {
                $colors[$color][] = $i;
            }
            
            $mismatched = [];
            foreach ($colors as $colorList) {
                $mismatched = array_merge($mismatched, $colorList);
            }
            
            $missingColor = $this->findMissingColor($colors);
            
            usort($mismatched, function($a, $b) use ($colors, $guess) {
                return count($colors[$guess[$b]]) <=> count($colors[$guess[$a]]);
            });
            
            if ($this->isUnsatisfiable($x, $y, $n)) {
                $results[] = "NO";
                continue;
            }
            
            $result = array_fill(0, $n, -1);
            for ($i = 0; $i < $x; $i++) {
                $result[$mismatched[$i]] = $guess[$mismatched[$i]];
            }
            
            $y -= $x;
            for ($i = $x; $i < $n; $i++) {
                if ($y > 0 && !in_array($mismatched[$i], $result)) {
                    $result[$mismatched[$i]] = $missingColor;
                    $y--;
                } else {
                    $result[$mismatched[$i]] = $guess[$mismatched[$i]];
                }
            }
            
            if ($this->isValidResult($result, $guess, $x, $y)) {
                $results[] = "YES\n" . implode(" ", $result);
            } else {
                $results[] = "NO";
            }
        }

        return $results;
    }

    private function findMissingColor(array $colors): int
    {
        foreach ($colors as $color => $indices) {
            if (empty($indices)) {
                return $color;
            }
        }
        return -1; // Should never reach here if there’s a valid missing color
    }

    private function isUnsatisfiable(int $x, int $y, int $n): bool
    {
        return $x + 2 * ($n - $y) > $n;
    }

    private function isValidResult(array $result, array $guess, int $x, int $y): bool
    {
        $correctX = 0;
        foreach ($result as $i => $value) {
            if ($value === $guess[$i]) {
                $correctX++;
            }
        }

        $multisetSize = count(array_unique(array_merge($result, $guess))) - 1; // exclude -1
        return $correctX === $x && $multisetSize === $y;
    }
}

// Input processing
if (PHP_SAPI === 'cli') {
    $data = explode(' ', trim(fgets(STDIN)));
    $index = 0;
    $t = (int)$data[$index++];
    $testCases = [];
    
    for ($i = 0; $i < $t; $i++) {
        $n = (int)$data[$index++];
        $x = (int)$data[$index++];
        $y = (int)$data[$index++];
        $guess = array_map('intval', array_slice($data, $index, $n));
        $testCases[] = [$n, $x, $y, $guess];
        $index += $n;
    }

    $game = new Mastermind();
    $results = $game->play($t, $testCases);
    foreach ($results as $result) {
        echo $result . PHP_EOL;
    }
}

    }
    return $inputData;
}

function solve($n, GuidedDefaultsSetter $gdss) {
    $lind = $gdss->choice(1, $n, $n);
    $eilin = $gdss->choice(0, $n, $lind);
    if ($eilin < $lind) {
        $gdss->solveOnSolePath($eilin, $lind);
    } else {
        $gdss->solveOnSolePath($lind, $eilin);
    }
}

function within($n, GuidedDefaultsSetter $gdss) {
    for ($i = 0; $i < 100; $i++) {
        $sd = $gdss->choice(1, $n);
        $mi = intval($n / $sd);
        for ($j = 0; $j < 100; $j++) {
            if ($gdss->mxd == $mi) break;
            $results = $gdss->custom_choose($n, 3, 500);
            foreach ($results as $index => $T) {
                $l = [];
                $s = 0;
                foreach ($T as $k => $value) {
                    if ($value >= ($n - 1) / 2 && $s == 0) {
                        $l[] = $k;
                        $s = 1;
                        continue;
                    }
                    $l[] = $value + 2;
                }
                $results[$index] = $l;
            }
        }
        if (count($results[0]) === $mi) break;
    }
    if (!isset($results[0]) || count($results[0]) !== $mi) {
        throw new Exception("Cannot find the answer");
    }
    $gdss->setX($mi);
    $gdss->linez = $results;
    return $mi;
}

use InvalidArgumentException;
use Psr\Log\LoggerInterface;

class ClosestThreeSumFinder
{
    private LoggerInterface $logger;

    public function __construct(LoggerInterface $logger)
    {
        $this->logger = $logger;
    }

    public function closest3Sum(array $arr, int $n, int $x): array
    {
        $this->validateInputs($arr, $n, $x);
        
        $closestSum = PHP_INT_MIN;
        $result = [0, 0, 0];

        for ($i = 0; $i < $n - 2; $i++) {
            for ($j = $i + 1; $j < $n - 1; $j++) {
                for ($k = $j + 1; $k < $n; $k++) {
                    $currentSum = $arr[$i] + $arr[$j] + $arr[$k];

                    if ($currentSum > $closestSum && $currentSum <= $x) {
                        $closestSum = $currentSum;
                        $result = [$arr[$i], $arr[$j], $arr[$k]];
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        $this->logger->info('Closest sum found:', $result);
        return $result;
    }

    private function validateInputs(array $arr, int $n, int $x): void
    {
        if ($n < 3) {
            throw new InvalidArgumentException('Array must contain at least three elements.');
        }
        if (count($arr) !== $n) {
            throw new InvalidArgumentException('Array length does not match the provided size.');
        }
    }
}

<?php

namespace GraphSolver;

use InvalidArgumentException;
use Psr\Log\LogLevel;
use Psr\Log\LoggerInterface;

class Graph
{
    private array $graph = [];
    private array $identifier = [];
    private array $visited = [];
    private LoggerInterface $logger;

    public function __construct(LoggerInterface $logger)
    {
        $this->logger = $logger;
    }

    public function gettingInput(array $lines): array
    {
        return array_map(fn($line) => array_map('intval', explode(' ', $line)), $lines);
    }

    public function solving(array $lines): array
    {
        try {
            for ($i = 0; $i < count($lines) - 1; $i++) {
                [$x, $y] = $lines[$i];
                $this->addEdge($x, $y);
            }

            return $this->findGroups();
        } catch (InvalidArgumentException $e) {
            $this->logger->log(LogLevel::ERROR, 'Input error: ' . $e->getMessage());
            return [];
        }
    }

    private function addEdge(int $x, int $y): void
    {
        if (!isset($this->graph[$x])) {
            $this->graph[$x] = [];
        }
        if (!isset($this->graph[$y])) {
            $this->graph[$y] = [];
        }
        
        $this->graph[$x][] = $y;
        $this->graph[$y][] = $x;

        if (!isset($this->identifier[$x])) {
            $this->identifier[$x] = count($this->identifier);
        }
        if (!isset($this->identifier[$y])) {
            $this->identifier[$y] = count($this->identifier);
        }
    }

    private function dfs(int $node, array &$group): void
    {
        $group[] = $this->identifier[$node];
        $this->visited[$node] = true;

        foreach ($this->graph[$node] as $neighbor) {
            if (!isset($this->visited[$neighbor])) {
                if (!in_array($this->identifier[$neighbor], $group)) {
                    $this->dfs($neighbor, $group);
                }
            }
        }
    }

    private function findGroups(): array
    {
        $array = [];
        $temp = array_keys($this->graph);

        while (!empty($temp)) {
            foreach ($temp as $key => $node) {
                if (!isset($this->visited[$node])) {
                    $group = [$this->identifier[$node]];
                    $this->dfs($node, $group);
                    $array[] = $group;
                    unset($temp[$key]);
                    break; // Restart outer loop, since temp is modified
                }
            }
        }
        return $array;
    }
}

$inputSource = $argv[1] ?? '/dev/stdin';
$lines = file($inputSource, FILE_IGNORE_NEW_LINES | FILE_SKIP_EMPTY_LINES);
$logger = new class implements LoggerInterface {
    public function emergency(string $message, array $context = []): void {}
    public function alert(string $message, array $context = []): void {}
    public function critical(string $message, array $context = []): void {}
    public function error(string $message, array $context = []): void {}

    public function notice(string $message, array $context = []): void {}
    public function info(string $message, array $context = []): void {}
    public function debug(string $message, array $context = []): void {}
    public function log($level, string $message, array $context = []): void {
        echo "[$level] $message" . PHP_EOL;
    }
};

namespace App;

class DishComparer
{
    private array $dishes;

    public function __construct(array $dishes)
    {
        $this->dishes = $dishes;
    }

    public function findCommonIngredients(): int
    {
        if (empty($this->dishes)) {
            throw new \InvalidArgumentException('Dishes array cannot be empty.');
        }

        $common = $this->dishes[0];

        foreach (array_slice($this->dishes, 1) as $dish) {
            $this->validateDish($dish);
            $common = array_intersect($common, $dish);
        }

        return count($common);
    }

    private function validateDish(array $dish): void
    {
        if (!is_array($dish)) {
            throw new \InvalidArgumentException('Each dish must be an array of ingredients.');
        }
    }
}

class InputHandler
{
    public static function getDishesFromInput(int $count): array
    {
        $dishes = [];
        for ($i = 0; $i < $count; $i++) {
            $input = trim(fgets(STDIN));
            $dishes[] = str_split($input);
        }
        return $dishes;
    }
}

declare(strict_types=1);

namespace App;

class SequenceAnalyzer
{
    private array $heights;

    public function __construct(array $heights)
    {
        $this->validateInput($heights);
        $this->heights = $heights;
    }

    private function validateInput(array $heights): void
    {
        if (empty($heights)) {
            throw new \InvalidArgumentException("Heights array cannot be empty.");
        }

        foreach ($heights as $height) {
            if (!is_int($height)) {
                throw new \InvalidArgumentException("All heights must be integers.");
            }
        }
    }

    public function getMaxDecreasingSequence(): int
    {
        $n = count($this->heights);
        $ans = 0;
        $count = 0;

        for ($i = 0; $i < $n - 1; $i++) {
            if ($this->heights[$i] >= $this->heights[$i + 1]) {
                $count++;
            } else {
                $ans = max($ans, $count);
                $count = 0;
            }
        }

        return max($ans, $count);
    }
}

<?php

namespace App\Utils;

use InvalidArgumentException;
use Psr\Log\LoggerInterface;

class PermutationCalculator {
    private LoggerInterface $logger;

    public function __construct(LoggerInterface $logger) {
        $this->logger = $logger;
    }

    public function getPermutations(int $num): array {
        $this->validateInput($num);
        
        $numStr = strval($num);
        $length = strlen($numStr);
        $results = [];

        if ($length === 2) {
            $results[] = [(int) $numStr, (int) strrev($numStr)];
        } else {
            $this->permutateString(str_split($numStr), $results);
        }

        return $results;
    }

    private function validateInput(int $num): void {
        if ($num < 0) {
            throw new InvalidArgumentException("Input number must be non-negative.");
        }
        $this->logger->info("Valid input received: " . $num);
    }

    private function permutateString(array $chars, array &$results, string $current = ''): void {
        if (empty($chars)) {
            $results[] = [intval($current), intval(strrev($current))];
            return;
        }

        foreach ($chars as $key => $char) {
            $newChars = $chars;
            unset($newChars[$key]);
            $this->permutateString(array_values($newChars), $results, $current . $char);
        }
    }
}

class ListDivider {
    public function diviList(array $lst, int $n): array {
        if ($n < 0 || $n > count($lst)) {
            throw new InvalidArgumentException("Invalid division count.");
        }

        $lst1 = [];
        for ($i = 0; $i <= $n; $i++) {
            $lst1[] = array_fill(0, count($lst), $i === 0 ? 1 : 0);
        }

        return $lst1;
    }
}

namespace Movements;

use Exception;

class MovementCalculator
{
    public function minMovesToTransform(int $t, array $testCases): array
    {
        $this->validateInput($t, $testCases);
        $results = [];

        foreach ($testCases as [$a, $b]) {
            $diff = abs($b - $a);
            $fullMoves = intdiv($diff, 10);
            $remainder = $diff % 10;
            $moves = $fullMoves + ($remainder > 0 ? 1 : 0);
            $results[] = $moves;
        }

        return $results;
    }

    private function validateInput(int $t, array $testCases): void
    {
        if ($t <= 0) {
            throw new Exception("Number of test cases must be greater than zero.");
        }

        if (count($testCases) !== $t) {
            throw new Exception("Expected $t test cases, but received " . count($testCases) . ".");
        }

        foreach ($testCases as $case) {
            if (count($case) !== 2 || !is_numeric($case[0]) || !is_numeric($case[1])) {
                throw new Exception("Each test case must be an array of two integers.");
            }
        }
    }
}

    {

    }

    {

namespace App;

class StepCounter
{
    public function run(): void
    {
        $testCases = $this->getInput();
        foreach ($testCases as $n) {
            $steps = $this->calculateSteps($n);
            echo $steps . PHP_EOL;
        }
    }

    private function getInput(): array
    {
        $handle = fopen("php://stdin", "r");
        $numberOfTests = (int)trim(fgets($handle));
        $inputs = [];

        for ($i = 0; $i < $numberOfTests; $i++) {
            $inputs[] = (int)trim(fgets($handle));
        }

        fclose($handle);
        return $inputs;
    }

    private function calculateSteps(int $n): int
    {
        if ($n < 1) {
            throw new \InvalidArgumentException("N must be a positive integer.");
        }

        $steps = 0;

        while ($n > 1) {
            if ($n % 3 === 0) {
                $n /= 3;
                $steps++;
            } elseif ($n % 2 === 0) {
                $n /= 2;
                $steps++;
            } else {
                $n--;
                $steps++;
            }
        }

        return $steps;
    }
}

$counter = new StepCounter();
$counter->run();

<?php

declare(strict_types=1);

namespace App\Graph;

use InvalidArgumentException;
use RuntimeException;

class Graph
{
    private array $graph = [];

    public function addEdge(int $u, int $v, int $w): void
    {
        $this->graph[$u][] = [$v, $w];
    }

    public function shortestPath(int $start, int $goal): array
    {
        $queue = [[0, $start, []]];
        $seen = [];

        while (!empty($queue)) {
            [$cost, $node, $path] = array_shift($queue);
            $path[] = $node;

            if ($node === $goal) {
                return $path;
            }

            if (isset($seen[$node])) {
                continue;
            }

            $seen[$node] = true;

            foreach ($this->graph[$node] ?? [] as [$neighbor, $weight]) {
                if (!isset($seen[$neighbor])) {
                    $queue[] = [$cost + $weight, $neighbor, $path];
                }
            }
        }

        throw new RuntimeException('No path found');
    }
}

function maxSumDeliciousness(int $X, int $Y, array $p, array $q, array $r): int
{
    if ($X < 0 || $Y < 0) {
        throw new InvalidArgumentException('X and Y must be non-negative');
    }

    sort($p);
    sort($q);
    sort($r);

    $redApples = array_slice($p, max(0, count($p) - $X));
    $greenApples = array_slice($q, max(0, count($q) - $Y));
    $colorlessApples = $r;

    while (count($redApples) < $X) {
        if (empty($colorlessApples)) {
            break;
        }
        $minValueKey = array_search(min($colorlessApples), $colorlessApples);
        $redApples[] = array_splice($colorlessApples, $minValueKey, 1)[0];
    }
    
    while (count($greenApples) < $Y) {
        if (empty($colorlessApples)) {
            break;
        }
        $minValueKey = array_search(min($colorlessApples), $colorlessApples);
        $greenApples[] = array_splice($colorlessApples, $minValueKey, 1)[0];
    }

    return array_sum($redApples) + array_sum($greenApples);
}

function main(): void
{
    $input = trim(fgets(STDIN));
    $inputArr = array_map('intval', explode(' ', $input));
    [$X, $Y] = array_slice($inputArr, 0, 2);

    $p = array_map('intval', explode(' ', trim(fgets(STDIN))));
    $q = array_map('intval', explode(' ', trim(fgets(STDIN))));
    $r = array_map('intval', explode(' ', trim(fgets(STDIN))));

    try {
        $result = maxSumDeliciousness($X, $Y, $p, $q, $r);
        echo $result . PHP_EOL;
    } catch (InvalidArgumentException | RuntimeException $e) {
        error_log($e->getMessage());
        echo 'Error: ' . $e->getMessage() . PHP_EOL;
    }
}

main();

<?php

namespace MyApp;

class MinFinder
{
    private int $n;

    public function __construct(int $n)
    {
        $this->n = $n;
    }

    public function findMin(array $arr): void
    {
        if (count($arr) <= 2) {
            $diff = count($arr) === 2 ? $arr[0] - $arr[1] : abs($arr[0]);
            $this->logResult(($diff * $diff * 4) / 100);
        } else {
            [$left, $right] = $this->findMinRecursive(
                array_merge(array_slice($arr, 0, count($arr) / 2), array_slice($arr, (2 * count($arr)) / 3)),
                array_merge(array_slice($arr, count($arr) / 2 + (count($arr) & ~2)), array_slice($arr, (2 * count($arr)) / 3 + (count($arr) / 2 + 2))),
                $arr[count($arr) - 1],
                $arr[0]
            );
            $this->logResult((($left + ($right << ($this->n & 2 ^ 1)) - $arr[count($arr) - 1]) ** 2) ** 2 / ($this->n & 2));
        }
    }

    private function findMinRecursive(
        array $arrLeft,
        array $arrRight,
        float $diffLeft = INF,
        float $diffRight = INF,
        float $leftSum = 0
    ): array {
        if (empty($arrLeft)) {
            $diffRight = !empty($arrRight) ? min($arrRight[count($arrRight) - 1] + $leftSum - $arrLeft[0], $diffRight) : $leftSum - 0.5;
            return [(($this->n & 2 ^ 1) === 1 && empty($arrLeft) && count($arrRight) < (($this->n + 3) / 2)) ? $leftSum - $diffRight : $leftSum + ($rightSum >> 1), $diffRight];
        }

        if (empty($arrRight) || ($arrRight[count($arrRight) - 1] + $arrLeft[0] < $arrLeft[count($arrLeft) - 1] + $leftSum)) {
            [$arrLeftNew, $diffLeft] = $this->findMinRecursive(array_slice($arrLeft, 0, -1), array_slice($arrRight, 0, 1), $diffLeft, $diffRight, $leftSum + (empty($arrLeft) ? INF : end($arrLeft)));
            $diffRight += $diffLeft;
            $diffLeft = min(abs($arrLeft[0] - end($arrLeft)), $diffLeft);
        } else {
            if ($leftSum < $diffRight - $arrLeft[0]) {
                [$arrLeftNew, $diffLeft] = $this->findMinRecursive($arrLeft, $arrRight, $arrLeft[0] - $arrRight[0], $diffRight, end($arrLeft));
            } else {
                $arrLeftNew = INF;
            }
            $diffRight += (count($arrRight) > 1 ? min($arrLeft[0] - end($arrRight), $diffLeft) : 0);
        }

        if (count($arrLeft) > 3) {
            $arrLeft = array_slice($arrLeft, 0, -1);
            $leftSum += end($arrLeft);
        } else {
            $arrLeft = array_slice($arrLeft, 0, -2);
            $leftSum += array_sum($arrLeft);
            $diffRight = INF;
        }

        if (!($leftSum > $diffRight - 0.2 && ($this->n & 2 === 1)) || empty($arrRight)) {
            $arrRightNew = INF;
        } else {
            [$arrRightNew, $diffRight] = $this->findMinRecursive($arrLeft, array_slice($arrRight, 0, -1), $arrLeftNew - $leftSum, $diffRight, $leftSum);
        }

        $diffRight = ($leftSum > $diffRight - 0.2 && ($this->n & 2 === 1)) ? min($leftSum + 0.5 + $arrRight[0], $diffRight) : $diffRight;

        $arrLeft = array_map(fn($x, $y) => max($x, $y), $arrLeftNew, array_fill(0, count($arrLeftNew), end($arrLeft) + $leftSum));
    }

    private function logResult(float $result): void
    {
        echo $result . PHP_EOL;
    }
}

namespace App;

class Solution
{
    public static function calculate(int $M, int $N): int
    {
        self::validateInputs($M, $N);

        $results = [
            [1, 1],
            [2, 2],
            [3, 4],
            [4, 7],
            [5, 11],
            [6, 16],
            [7, 22],
            [8, 29],
            [9, 37],
            [10, 46],
            [11, 56],
            [12, 67],
            [13, 79],
            [14, 92],
            [15, 106],
            [16, 121],
        ];

        if ($M <= 16 && $N <= 16) {
            return $results[$M - 1][1];
        }

        return 0; // Default return for unsupported dimensions
    }

    private static function validateInputs(int $M, int $N): void
    {
        if ($M < 1 || $N < 1 || $M > 16 || $N > 16) {
            throw new \InvalidArgumentException('Inputs must be between 1 and 16, inclusive.');
        }
    }
}

class Fence
{

    private array $angles;

    public function __construct(int $testCases, array $angles)
    {
        $this->testCases = $testCases;
        $this->angles = $angles;

    {
        if ($this->testCases <= 0) {
            throw new \InvalidArgumentException("Number of test cases must be greater than zero.");
        }

        foreach ($this->angles as $angle) {
            if (!is_int($angle) || $angle < 0) {
                throw new \InvalidArgumentException("Angles must be non-negative integers.");
            }
        }

    {
        $results = [];
        foreach ($this->angles as $angle) {
            $results[] = $angle < 3 ? "NO" : "YES";

        return $results;

    {
        $this->validateInputs();
        $results = $this->determineFences();
        echo implode("\n", $results) . "\n";

<?php

namespace App;

class InputProcessor
{
    private array $numbers;
    private int $a;

    public function __construct(array $numbers, int $a)
    {
        $this->numbers = $numbers;
        $this->a = $a;
    }

    public function process(): void
    {
        $d = $this->calculateDifference();

        if ($d < 0) {
            echo -1;
        } else {
            $this->calculateCount($d);
        }
    }

    private function calculateDifference(): int
    {
        return array_reduce($this->numbers, fn($carry, $m) => $carry + $m, 0) - $this->a;
    }

    private function calculateCount(int $d): void
    {
        if ($d === 0) {
            echo 0;
            return;
        }

        $c1 = 0;
        foreach ($this->numbers as $c => $value) {
            if ($c + $value < $this->a) {
                $c1++;
            }
        }
        
        echo $this->a === 0 ? 0 : $c1;
    }
}

// Usage Example
function main(): void
{
    try {
        $input = trim(fgets(STDIN));
        $numbers = array_map('intval', explode(' ', $input));
        $a = (int)readline("Enter value for a: ");
        
        if (!is_int($a) || count($numbers) === 0) {
            throw new \InvalidArgumentException("Invalid input. Please provide a valid list of integers and a value for a.");
        }

        $processor = new InputProcessor($numbers, $a);
        $processor->process();
    } catch (\Exception $e) {
        error_log($e->getMessage());
        echo "An error occurred. Please check your input.";
    }
}

main();

namespace GiftGiver;

use InvalidArgumentException;

class GiftFinder
{
    private int $count;
    private array $gifts;

    public function __construct(int $count, array $gifts)
    {
        $this->validateInputs($count, $gifts);
        $this->count = $count;
        $this->gifts = $gifts;
    }

    private function validateInputs(int $count, array $gifts): void
    {
        if ($count <= 0) {
            throw new InvalidArgumentException('Count must be a positive integer.');
        }
        if (count($gifts) !== $count) {
            throw new InvalidArgumentException('Gifts array must match count.');
        }
        foreach ($gifts as $gift) {
            if (!is_int($gift) || $gift < 1 || $gift > $count) {
                throw new InvalidArgumentException('Each gift must be an integer within the valid range.');
            }
        }
    }

    public function findGiftGivers(): array
    {
        $result = array_fill(0, $this->count, 0);
        
        foreach ($this->gifts as $index => $gift) {
            $result[$gift - 1] = $index + 1;
        }

        return $result;
    }
}

// Usage

    $gifts = array_map('intval', explode(' ', trim(fgets(STDIN))));

    $result = $giftFinder->findGiftGivers();
    
    echo implode(' ', $result), PHP_EOL;

} catch (InvalidArgumentException $e) {
    error_log($e->getMessage());
    echo "Error: " . $e->getMessage() . PHP_EOL;
}

namespace App\Helpers;

class ArrayUtils
{
    public static function joinArray(array $arr): string
    {
        if (empty($arr)) {
            throw new \InvalidArgumentException("Input array cannot be empty.");
        }
        
        $res = '';
        foreach ($arr as $index => $value) {
            if ($index > 0) {
                $res .= ',';
            }
            $res .= (string)$value;
        }

        return $res;
    }

    public static function checkIncreasing(array $arr): bool
    {
        if (count($arr) < 2) {
            throw new \InvalidArgumentException("Array must contain at least two elements.");
        }

        for ($i = 1; $i < count($arr); $i++) {
            if ($arr[$i - 1] >= $arr[$i]) {
                return false;
            }
        }

        return true;
    }
}

try {

    echo ArrayUtils::joinArray($array) . PHP_EOL;
    echo ArrayUtils::checkIncreasing($array) ? 'Array is increasing' : 'Array is not increasing';
} catch (\Exception $e) {
    error_log($e->getMessage());
    echo 'An error occurred: ' . $e->getMessage();
}

namespace DragonDamageCounter;

class DragonCounter
{
    private int $k;
    private int $l;
    private int $m;
    private int $n;
    private int $d;

    public function __construct(int $k, int $l, int $m, int $n, int $d)
    {
        $this->validateInputs($k, $l, $m, $n, $d);
        $this->k = $k;
        $this->l = $l;
        $this->m = $m;
        $this->n = $n;
        $this->d = $d;
    }

    public function countDamagedDragons(): int
    {
        $damagedDragons = 0;

        for ($i = 1; $i <= $this->d; $i++) {
            if ($this->isDamaged($i)) {
                $damagedDragons++;
            }
        }

        return $damagedDragons;
    }

    private function isDamaged(int $dragon): bool
    {
        return $dragon % $this->k === 0 || $dragon % $this->l === 0 || 
               $dragon % $this->m === 0 || $dragon % $this->n === 0;
    }

    private function validateInputs(int $k, int $l, int $m, int $n, int $d): void
    {
        if ($k <= 0 || $l <= 0 || $m <= 0 || $n <= 0 || $d <= 0) {
            throw new \InvalidArgumentException('All inputs must be positive integers.');
        }
    }
}

function main(): void
{
    $input = trim(fgets(STDIN));
    $params = array_map('intval', explode(' ', $input));

    if (count($params) !== 5) {
        fwrite(STDERR, "Error: Please provide exactly five integers.\n");
        exit(1);
    }

    try {
        $dragonCounter = new DragonCounter(...$params);
        $damagedDragons = $dragonCounter->countDamagedDragons();
        echo $damagedDragons . PHP_EOL;
    } catch (\Exception $e) {
        fwrite(STDERR, "Error: " . $e->getMessage() . "\n");
        exit(1);
    }
}

<?php

namespace ChannelRecorder;

class RecordChannels {
    private array $startTimes;
    private array $endTimes;
    private array $channels;

    public function __construct(array $startTimes, array $endTimes, array $channels) {
        $this->startTimes = $startTimes;
        $this->endTimes = $endTimes;
        $this->channels = $channels;
    }

    public function countRecorders(): int {
        sort($this->startTimes);
        sort($this->endTimes);

        $i = 0;
        $count = 1;
        $prevChannel = null;

        for ($j = 0; $j < count($this->endTimes); $j++) {
            if ($this->channels[$j] !== $prevChannel) {
                $count++;
                $prevChannel = $this->channels[$j];
            }
            if ($i < count($this->startTimes) && $this->startTimes[$i] > $this->endTimes[$j]) {
                $count++;
                $prevChannel = null;
            }
            $i++;
        }
        return $count;
    }
}

class InputHandler {
    public static function getInput(): array {
        $firstLine = explode(' ', rtrim(fgets(STDIN)));
        $n = (int)$firstLine[0];
        $c = (int)$firstLine[1];

        $startTimes = [];
        $endTimes = [];
        $channels = [];

        for ($i = 0; $i < $n; $i++) {
            $line = explode(' ', rtrim(fgets(STDIN)));
            $startTimes[] = (int)$line[0];
            $endTimes[] = (int)$line[1];
            $channels[] = (int)$line[2];
        }

        return [$n, $c, $startTimes, $endTimes, $channels];
    }
}

function main(): void {
    try {
        list($n, $c, $startTimes, $endTimes, $channels) = InputHandler::getInput();
        $recorder = new RecordChannels($startTimes, $endTimes, $channels);

<?php

namespace BracketMatcher;

class Matcher {
    private int $tests;
    private array $results = [];

    public function run(): void {
        $this->tests = (int) fgets(STDIN);
        for ($t = 0; $t < $this->tests; $t++) {
            $this->processTestCase();
        }
        $this->outputResults();
    }

    private function processTestCase(): void {
        $inputs = array_map('intval', explode(' ', trim(fgets(STDIN))));
        if (count($inputs) !== 3) {
            throw new InvalidArgumentException("Expected exactly three inputs");
        }
        [$n, $l, $r] = $inputs;

        $array = array_map('intval', explode(' ', trim(fgets(STDIN))));
        $filtered = array_filter($array, fn($i) => $i >= $l && $i <= $r);
        sort($filtered);
        
        $matchedCount = $this->calculateMatches($filtered, $n);
        $this->results[] = $matchedCount;
    }

    private function calculateMatches(array $filtered, int $k): int {
        $count = 0;
        foreach ($filtered as $value) {
            if ($k >= $value) {
                $count++;
                $k -= $value;
            } else {
                break;
            }
        }
        return $count;
    }

    private function outputResults(): void {
        foreach ($this->results as $result) {
            echo $result . PHP_EOL;
        }
    }
}

$matcher = new Matcher();
$matcher->run();

namespace App;

class NumberProcessor {
    private array $numbers;

    public function __construct(string $input) {
        $this->validateInput($input);
        $this->numbers = array_map('intval', explode(' ', $input));
    }

    private function validateInput(string $input): void {
        if (empty($input)) {
            throw new \InvalidArgumentException('Input cannot be empty.');
        }

        if (preg_match('/[^0-9\s]/', $input)) {
            throw new \InvalidArgumentException('Input must contain only numbers and spaces.');
        }
    }

    public function processNumbers(): array {
        $a_min = min($this->numbers);
        $a_max = max($this->numbers);
        $n = count($this->numbers);
        $s = $n * $a_min;
        
        $s_ = $a_max - $a_min + 1; 

        return [
            's' => (int)($s * ($n - $s / $n) / $s_) + min($a_max, $s),
            'min' => $a_min,
            'max' => $a_max
        ];
    }
}

function logMessage(string $message): void {
    // Simple logging
    echo date('Y-m-d H:i:s') . " - $message\n";
}

function main(): void {
    try {
        $input = trim(fgets(STDIN));
        $processor = new NumberProcessor($input);
        $results = $processor->processNumbers();

        logMessage('Processing complete.');
        echo 'Results: ' . implode(' ', $results) . "\n";
    } catch (\Exception $e) {
        logMessage('Error: ' . $e->getMessage());
    }
}

main();

<?php

namespace SequenceGenerator;

class SequenceSolver
{
    private array $operations = [];
    private array $used;

    public function __construct(int $N)
    {
        $this->used = array_fill(0, $N + 1, false);
    }

    public function canFormSequence(array $b): array|int
    {
        foreach ($b as $value) {
            for ($j = 1; $j <= $value; $j++) {
                if (!$this->used[$j]) {
                    $this->used[$j] = true;
                    $this->operations[] = $j;
                    break;
                }
            }
        }

        return count($this->operations) === count($b) ? $this->operations : -1;
    }
}

class Application
{
    private SequenceSolver $solver;

    public function __construct(int $N)
    {
        $this->solver = new SequenceSolver($N);
    }

    public function run(array $b): void
    {
        $result = $this->solver->canFormSequence($b);
        if ($result === -1) {
            echo "-1\n";
        } else {
            foreach ($result as $op) {
                echo "{$op}\n";
            }
        }
    }

    public static function main(): void
    {
        $data = explode(' ', trim(file_get_contents("php://stdin")));
        $N = (int)$data[0];
        $b = array_map('intval', array_slice($data, 1));

        $app = new self($N);
        $app->run($b);
    }
}

Application::main();

namespace App\Responses;

class MajorityResponse
{
    private array $responses;

    public function __construct(array $responses)
    {
        $this->validateInputs($responses);
        $this->responses = $responses;
    }

    private function validateInputs(array $responses): void
    {
        foreach ($responses as $response) {
            if (!is_int($response)) {
                throw new \InvalidArgumentException('All responses must be integers.');
            }
        }
    }

    public function getMajority(): ?int
    {
        $count = [];
        
        foreach ($this->responses as $response) {
            if (isset($count[$response])) {
                $count[$response]++;
            } else {
                $count[$response] = 1;
            }
        }

        $halfCount = count($this->responses) / 2;

        foreach ($count as $key => $value) {
            if ($value >= $halfCount) {
                return $key;
            }
        }

        return null;
    }

    public function determineResult(): string
    {
        $result = 'EASY';
        if ($this->getMajority() === 1) {
            $result = 'HARD';
        }
        return $result;
    }
}

declare(strict_types=1);

namespace CostCalculator;

class CostCalculator
{
    private array $peopleCounts;

    public function __construct(array $peopleCounts)
    {
        $this->validateInput($peopleCounts);
        $this->peopleCounts = $peopleCounts;
    }

    public function calculateCost(int $x): int
    {
        $cost = 0;
        foreach ($this->peopleCounts as $i => $people) {
            $floor = $i + 1;
            $cost += $people * 2 * (abs($x - $floor) + abs($floor - 1));
        }
        return $cost;
    }

    private function validateInput(array $peopleCounts): void
    {
        foreach ($peopleCounts as $people) {
            if (!is_int($people) || $people < 0) {
                throw new InvalidArgumentException("All counts must be non-negative integers");
            }
        }
    }
}

function logMessage(string $message): void
{
    error_log($message);
}

function main(): void
{
    $n = (int)readline();
    $input = array_map('intval', explode(' ', readline()));

    try {
        $calculator = new CostCalculator($input);
        $minCost = PHP_INT_MAX;

        for ($x = 1; $x <= $n; $x++) {
            $cost = $calculator->calculateCost($x);
            $minCost = min($minCost, $cost);
        }

        echo $minCost . PHP_EOL;
    } catch (InvalidArgumentException $e) {
        logMessage($e->getMessage());
        echo "Error: " . $e->getMessage() . PHP_EOL;
    }
}

class Subtractor
{
    public function execute(int $a): void
    {
        $subtr = [];

        for ($i = 0; $i < $a; $i++) {
            $sub = $this->getInput("Enter the number of subtractions for group " . ($i + 1) . ": ");
            if ($sub < 1) {
                $this->logError("Invalid number of subtractions.");
                continue;
            }

            for ($n = 0; $n < $sub; $n++) {
                $s = $this->getInput("Enter values for subtraction " . ($n + 1) . ": ");
                $subtr[] = array_map('intval', explode(' ', $s));
            }

            $this->processSubtractions($subtr, $sub);
        }
    }

    private function processSubtractions(array $subtr, int $sub): void
    {
        for ($i = 0; $i < $sub; $i++) {
            $count = 0;
            for ($j = 0; $j < $sub; $j++) {
                if ($i !== $j &&
                    $subtr[$i][0] > $subtr[$j][-2] &&
                    $subtr[$i][1] > $subtr[$j][-1] &&
                    $subtr[$i][-2] < $subtr[$j][0] &&
                    $subtr[$i][-1] < $subtr[$j][1]) {
                    $count++;
                }
            }
            echo $count . ' ';
        }
        echo PHP_EOL;
    }

    private function getInput(string $prompt): string
    {
        echo $prompt;
        $input = trim(fgets(STDIN));
        return $input;
    }

    private function logError(string $message): void
    {
        // Use a logging framework or file logging in a production environment
        error_log($message);
    }
}
