    if (count($arr) !== $n) {
        throw new InvalidArgumentException("Number of input elements does not match the specified count.");
    }

    $divisorFinder = new DivisorFinder($arr);
    $commonDivisors = $divisorFinder->getCommonDivisors();

    echo implode(' ', $commonDivisors) . PHP_EOL;

} catch (Exception $e) {
    echo "Error: " . $e->getMessage() . PHP_EOL;
}

<?php

declare(strict_types=1);

namespace App;

use Exception;

class Node {
    public bool $val;
    public array $nodes;

    public function __construct(bool $x) {
        $this->val = $x;
        $this->nodes = [null, null];
    }
}

class Tree {
    private int $n;
    private int $k;
    public array $roots = [];

    public function __construct(int $n, int $k) {
        $this->n = $n;
        $this->k = $k;
        $this->setRoot();
    }

    private function setRoot(): void {
        for ($i = 0; $i < $this->n; $i++) {
            $this->roots[] = new Node($i % 2 === 1);
        }
    }

    public function printAll(): void {
        echo "{";
        foreach ($this->roots as $i => $root) {
            $printed = false;
            for ($j = $i; $j >= 0; $j--) {
                $ptr = $this->roots[$j];
                $printed = true;
                if ($i === $j) {
                    echo "true";
                } elseif (!$ptr->nodes[0]->val) {
                    echo !$ptr->nodes[1]->val ? "-true" : "false";
                } elseif ($ptr->nodes[1]->val) {
                    echo $ptr->nodes[0]->val ? "-false" : "-true";
                }
            }
            if ($i !== count($this->roots) - 1) {
                echo ',';
            }
            if ($printed) {
                echo ",{";
            }
        }
        echo "}" . PHP_EOL;
    }

    public function allBinary(int $num): array {
        $allNodes = [];
        $numZeros = 0;
        $done = true;

        for ($i = $num - 1; $i >= 0; $i--) {
            if ($num & (1 << $i)) {
                $numZeros++;
            }
            if ($num === 0 && $done) {
                $done = false;
            }
            if (!$done) {
                break;
            }
        }
        
        if ($done) {
            $numZeros += $num;
        }

        if ($numZeros === $num) {
            $allNodes[] = new Node(false);
            $allNodes[] = new Node(true);
            return $allNodes;
        }

        if ($numZeros + 1 > $this->k) {
            $allNodes[] = new Node(false);
            return $allNodes;
        }
        if ($numZeros + 1 === $this->k) {
            $allNodes[] = new Node(true);
            return $allNodes;
        }

        $one = $this->allBinary($numZeros + 1);
        $two = $this->allBinary($this->k - $numZeros - 1);

        foreach ($one as $node) {
            $node->nodes[1] = new Node(false);
            $allNodes[] = $node;
        }
        foreach ($two as $node) {
            $node->nodes[1] = new Node(true);
            $allNodes[] = $node;
        }

        foreach ($one as $oNode) {
            foreach ($two as $tNode) {
                $oNode->nodes[] = $tNode;
                $allNodes[] = $oNode;
            }
        }

        return empty($allNodes) ? $two : $allNodes;
    }
}

<?php

namespace App\Utilities;

class ButtonLightener {

    private array $buttonPresses;
    private int $current;
    private array $visited;

    public function __construct(array $presses) {
        $this->validateInput($presses);
        $this->buttonPresses = $presses;
        $this->current = 1;
        $this->visited = array_fill(0, count($presses) + 1, 0);
    }

    private function validateInput(array $presses): void {
        foreach ($presses as $press) {
            if (!is_int($press) || $press < 1 || $press > count($presses)) {
                throw new \InvalidArgumentException('All presses must be valid integers within the range.');
            }
        }
    }

    public function lightenUp(): int {
        $steps = 0;
        while (true) {
            if ($this->current === 2) {
                return $steps;
            }
            if ($this->visited[$this->current] === 1) {
                return -1;
            }
            $this->visited[$this->current] = 1;
            $this->current = $this->buttonPresses[$this->current - 1];
            $steps++;
        }
    }
}

namespace Research;

class Minimization {
    public static function minim(array &$array, int $x, int $y): array {
        $step = intdiv($y - $x, count($array) - 1);
        $delta = ($y - $x) % (count($array) - 1);
        array_unshift($array, $x);
        
        for ($i = 1; $i < count($array); $i++) {
            $array[$i] = $array[$i - 1] + $step;
        }

        if ($y - $x < count($array) - 2) {
            for ($i = 1; $i < count($array); $i++) {
                $array[$i] += 1;
            }
        }

        return $array;
    }

    public static function getAnswer(): void {
        $input = explode(" ", trim(fgets(STDIN)));
        $n = (int)$input[0];
        $x = (int)$input[1];
        $y = (int)$input[2];
        $array = [];

        if ($y - $x < $n - 2) {
            $array = [ $x + $y - $n + 1 ];
            for ($i = 1; $i < $n - 1; $i++) {
                $array[] = $x + $i * ($y - $x);
            }
            $array[] = $y;
        } else {
            for ($i = 0; $i < $n; $i++) {
                $array[] = $x + $i * intdiv($y - $x, $n - 1);
            }
        }

        echo implode(" ", self::minim($array, $x, $y)) . PHP_EOL;
    }
}

namespace Research;

class SumChecker {
    private array $A;
    private array $B;

    public function __construct(array $A, array $B) {
        $this->A = $A;
        $this->B = $B;
    }

    public function checkSums(): void {
        $A = $this->A;
        $B = $this->B;

        // Check if any sum of elements from B with A belongs to A + B
        $allSumsCheck = false;
        foreach ($B as $i) {
            foreach ($A as $j) {
                if (!in_array($i + $j, array_merge($A, $B))) {
                    $allSumsCheck = true;
                    break 2; // break both loops
                }
            }
        }

        if ($allSumsCheck) {
            echo end($A) . ' ' . reset($B) . PHP_EOL;
            return;
        }

        $mapAs = $this->concatArrays();
        $ngSet = [];

        // Check for presence in computed sums
        foreach ($mapAs as $i) {
            foreach ($mapAs as $j) {
                if (!in_array($i + $j, $ngSet)) {
                    $ngSet[] = $i + $j;
                }
            }
        }

        if (empty(array_diff($ngSet, $mapAs))) {
            print_r($ngSet);
            echo 'HERE' . PHP_EOL;
            echo "NO" . PHP_EOL;
        } else {
            echo 'NEngset!!' . PHP_EOL;
        }
    }

    private function concatArrays(): array {
        return array_merge($this->A, $this->B);
    }
}

namespace Research;

class VasyaSmokeBreakCalculator {
    private int $n;
    private int $l;
    private int $a;
    private int $s = 0;
    private int $lb = 0;

    public function __construct(int $n, int $l, int $a) {
        $this->n = $n;
        $this->l = $l;
        $this->a = $a;
    }

    public function calculate(array $breakTimes): array {
        foreach ($breakTimes as $timePair) {
            [$t, $l] = $timePair;
            $this->lb = $this->s + $this->a;
            if ($this->lb < $t) {
                $this->s = $t;
            } else {
                $this->s = $this->lb;
            }
            $this->s += $l;
        }
        
        return [
            'final_time' => $this->s - $this->a - $this->l,
            'last_break_time' => $this->lb - $this->a - $this->l
        ];
    }
}

<?php

namespace Research\Pathfinding;

use Ds\Queue;

class MinimumMoves
{
    public function calculate(array $grid, int $startX, int $startY, int $goalX, int $goalY): int
    {
        $n = count($grid);
        $directions = [[0, 1], [0, -1], [1, 0], [-1, 0]]; // right, left, down, up
        $queue = new Queue();
        $queue->push([$startX, $startY, 0]); // (x, y, moves)
        $visited = [[$startX, $startY] => true];

        while (!$queue->isEmpty()) {
            [$x, $y, $moves] = $queue->pop();

            if ($x === $goalX && $y === $goalY) {
                return $moves;
            }

            foreach ($directions as [$dx, $dy]) {
                $nx = $x + $dx;
                $ny = $y + $dy;

                while ($this->isInBounds($nx, $ny, $n) && $grid[$nx][$ny] !== 'X') {
                    $key = "{$nx},{$ny}";

                    if (!isset($visited[$key])) {
                        $queue->push([$nx, $ny, $moves + 1]);
                        $visited[$key] = true;
                    }

                    $nx += $dx;
                    $ny += $dy;
                }
            }
        }

        return -1; // no path found
    }

    private function isInBounds(int $x, int $y, int $n): bool
    {
        return $x >= 0 && $x < $n && $y >= 0 && $y < $n;
    }
}

// Example usage
$grid = [
    ['.', '.', '.', 'X'],
    ['.', 'X', '.', '.'],
    ['.', '.', '.', '.'],
    ['X', '.', 'X', '.']
];

$minMoves = new MinimumMoves();
$result = $minMoves->calculate($grid, 0, 0, 2, 3);
echo "Minimum moves to reach the goal: $result\n";
?>

namespace Research\Algorithms;

use SplPriorityQueue;

class MinOperations
{
    public static function minOperations(array $nums, int $k): int
    {
        $pq = new SplPriorityQueue();
        
        foreach ($nums as $num) {
            $pq->insert($num, $num);
        }
        
        $operations = 0;
        while ($pq->count() > 1 && $pq->top() < $k) {
            $x = $pq->extract();
            $y = $pq->extract();
            $pq->insert(2 * min($x, $y) + max($x, $y), 2 * min($x, $y) + max($x, $y));
            $operations++;
        }
        
        foreach (iterator_to_array($pq) as $num) {
            if ($num < $k) {
                return -1; // This will not happen according to the constraints
            }
        }
        
        return $operations;
    }

    public static function main(): void
    {
        $nums1 = [2, 11, 10, 1, 3];
        $k1 = 10;
        echo self::minOperations($nums1, $k1) . PHP_EOL; // Output: 2

        $nums2 = [1, 1, 2, 4, 9];
        $k2 = 20;
        echo self::minOperations($nums2, $k2) . PHP_EOL; // Output: 4
    }
}

MinOperations::main();

<?php

namespace Research;

class LabDivider
{
    private array $groups;

    public function __construct(int $n)
    {
        $this->groups = array_fill(0, $n, []);
        $this->divideLabs($n);
    }

    private function divideLabs(int $n): void
    {
        for ($i = 0; $i < $n; $i++) {
            for ($j = 0; $j < $n; $j++) {
                if ($i % 2 === 0) {
                    // Fill normally for even rows
                    $labNumber = $i * $n + $j + 1;
                    $this->groups[$j][] = $labNumber;
                } else {
                    // Fill in reverse for odd rows
                    $labNumber = $i * $n + ($n - $j - 1) + 1;
                    $this->groups[$n - $j - 1][] = $labNumber;
                }
            }
        }

        $this->printGroups();
    }

    private function printGroups(): void
    {
        foreach ($this->groups as $group) {
            // Debug print - could be replaced with logging
            echo implode(' ', $group) . PHP_EOL;
        }
    }
}

$n = 3;
new LabDivider($n);

namespace Research;

class TreeNode {
    public int $val;
    public ?TreeNode $left;
    public ?TreeNode $right;

    public function __construct(int $x) {
        $this->val = $x;
        $this->left = null;
        $this->right = null;
    }
}

class Solution {
    public function maxDepth(?TreeNode $root): int {
        if ($root === null) {
            return 0;
        } else {
            $leftHeight = $this->maxDepth($root->left);
            $rightHeight = $this->maxDepth($root->right);
            return max($leftHeight, $rightHeight) + 1;
        }
    }
}

function countSubarraysWithSum(array $nums, int $k): int {
    $count = 0;
    $sum = 0;
    $sumCount = [];

    foreach ($nums as $num) {
        $sum += $num;

        if ($sum === $k) {
            $count++;
        }
        
        if (isset($sumCount[$sum - $k])) {
            $count += $sumCount[$sum - $k];
        }
        
        if (isset($sumCount[$sum])) {
            $sumCount[$sum]++;
        } else {
            $sumCount[$sum] = 1;
        }
    }

    return $count;
}

<?php

namespace Research;

class MonsterStonesSolver {
    private array $prefixSum;

    public function __construct(array $costs) {
        sort($costs);
        $this->prefixSum = array_fill(0, count($costs) + 1, 0);
        for ($i = 1; $i <= count($costs); ++$i) {
            $this->prefixSum[$i] = $this->prefixSum[$i - 1] + $costs[$i - 1];
        }
    }

    public function querySum(int $start, int $end): int {
        return $this->prefixSum[$end + 1] - $this->prefixSum[$start];
    }

    public function queryCheapestSum(int $start, int $end): int {
        $rankSum = $end - $start + 1;
        $targetSum = (int)(($rankSum * $start) / (count($this->prefixSum) - 1)); // similar to costs.size()
        return $this->querySum($targetSum, $rankSum - $targetSum);
    }
}

for ($i = 0; $i < $n; ++$i) {
    $costs[] = (int)readline();
}

while ($m-- > 0) {

namespace Research;

class RankCalculator {
    private array $ranks;

    public function __construct(array $ranks) {
        $this->ranks = $ranks;
    }

    public function getNumber(int $onSite): int {
        $realNum = $onSite;
        $rankCount = count($this->ranks);
        
        for ($i = 0; $i < $rankCount; $i++) {
            if ($rankCount !== 0) {
                if ($this->ranks[0] <= 7) {
                    array_shift($this->ranks);
                    $realNum++;
                } elseif (($this->ranks[0] >= 10 && $this->ranks[0] < 100) ||
                          ($this->ranks[0] >= 1000 && $this->ranks[0] < 10000) ||
                          ($this->ranks[0] >= 100000 && $this->ranks[0] <= 1000000)) {
                    array_shift($this->ranks);
                }
            } 
        }

        $realNum -= (count($this->ranks) - 1);
        return $realNum;
    }
}

namespace TriangleResearch;

class TriangleFinder {
    
    public function maximumPerimeterTriangle(array $sticks): array {
        // Sort the sticks in ascending order
        sort($sticks);
        $count = count($sticks);

        // Iterate from the largest to the smallest stick
        for ($i = $count - 1; $i >= 2; $i--) {
            // Check if the current triplet forms a triangle
            if ($sticks[$i] < $sticks[$i - 1] + $sticks[$i - 2]) {
                return [$sticks[$i - 2], $sticks[$i - 1], $sticks[$i]];
            }
        }
        // Return -1 if no triangle can be formed
        return [-1];
    }
}

namespace Research;

class UniqueWeightCounter
{
    private array $weights;
    private int $count;

    public function __construct(array $weights)
    {
        $this->weights = $weights;
        $this->count = 0;
    }

    public function countUniqueWeights(): int
    {
        sort($this->weights);
        $uniqueWeights = [];

        foreach ($this->weights as $index => $weight) {
            if ($index === 0 || $weight !== $this->weights[$index - 1]) {
                $uniqueWeights[] = $weight;
            }
        }

        $this->count = count($uniqueWeights);
        
        return intdiv($this->count, 2);
    }

    public static function benchmark(array $weights): void
    {
        $start = microtime(true);
        
        $counter = new self($weights);
        $result = $counter->countUniqueWeights();
        
        $end = microtime(true);
        echo "Unique Weight Count: $result\n";
        echo "Execution Time: " . ($end - $start) . " seconds\n";
    }
}

{

    {

        $this->results = [];

            $this->evaluateTarget($N, $M, $K, $x);
        }
    }

    private function evaluateTarget(int $N, int $M, int $K, int $x): void
    {

    {
        foreach ($this->results as $result) {
            echo $result . PHP_EOL;
        }
    }
}

function benchmark(callable $function, int $iterations = 100): float
{
    $start = microtime(true);
    for ($i = 0; $i < $iterations; $i++) {
        $function();
    }
    return (microtime(true) - $start) / $iterations;
}

namespace Research;

class MaxMatches {
    private int $n;
    private int $m;
    private array $containers;

    public function __construct(int $n, int $m, array $containers) {
        $this->n = $n;
        $this->m = $m;
        $this->containers = $containers;
    }

    public function calculate(): int {
        $items = [];
        
        // Populate items from containers
        foreach ($this->containers as [$a, $b]) {
            for ($i = 0; $i < $a; $i++) {
                $items[] = $b;
            }
        }

        // TODO: Consider using a more memory-efficient structure
        heap_push_array($items);
        
        // Maintain the top n items
        while (count($items) > $this->n) {
            array_pop($items);
        }

        return array_sum($items);
    }
}

namespace Research;

class MaxGoodPairSum
{
    public static function calculate(array $arr, int $d): int
    {
        sort($arr);
        $heap = [];
        $prev = [];

        foreach ($arr as $n) {
            if (isset($prev[$n - 2 * $d])) {
                $heap[] = -($n - ($n - 2 * $d)); // Store as negative for max-heap behavior
            } else {
                if (!empty($heap)) {
                    $heap[] = -$n;
                } else {
                    $heap[] = 0;
                }
            }
            $prev[$n] = true; // Using array as a set
        }

        return -array_sum($heap);
    }
}

<?php

namespace Research;

class TableProcessor
{
    private array $table;
    private int $totalSum;

    public function __construct(array $table)
    {
        $this->table = $table;
        $this->totalSum = 0;
    }

    public function processTable(): array
    {
        $rowSums = [];
        $processedTable = [];
        
        foreach ($this->table as $row) {
            $rowSum = array_sum($row);
            $rowSums[] = $rowSum;
            $processedTable[] = array_merge($row, [$rowSum]);
        }

        $colSums = $this->calculateColumnSums();
        $this->totalSum = array_sum($rowSums);
        
        $processedTable[] = array_merge($colSums, [$this->totalSum]);
        return $processedTable;
    }

    private function calculateColumnSums(): array
    {
        $colCounts = count($this->table[0]);
        $colSums = array_fill(0, $colCounts, 0);

        foreach ($this->table as $row) {
            foreach ($row as $colIndex => $value) {
                $colSums[$colIndex] += $value;
            }
        }

        return $colSums;
    }

    public function printResults(array $results): void
    {
        foreach ($results as $row) {
            echo implode(' ', $row) . PHP_EOL;
        }
    }
}

<?php

namespace Graph;

class GraphBuilder
{
    public static function buildGraph(array $a): array
    {
        $graph = [];
        for ($i = 0; $i < count($a[0]); $i++) {
            $graph[$i] = [];
        }
        for ($i = 0; $i < count($a); $i++) {
            for ($j = 0; $j < count($a[$i]); $j++) {
                if ($a[$i][$j] === '>') {
                    $graph[$i][] = $j;
                } elseif ($a[$i][$j] === '<') {
                    $graph[$j][] = $i;
                }
            }
        }
        return $graph;
    }
}

class TopologicalSorter
{
    private $values = [];
    private $currentValue;

    public function dfs(int $u, array $graph, array &$visit): bool
    {
        if ($visit[$u]) {
            return false;
        }
        $visit[$u] = true;
        foreach ($graph[$u] as $v) {
            if ($this->dfs($v, $graph, $visit)) {
                return true;
            }
        }
        $this->values[$u] = $this->currentValue;
        $this->currentValue--;
        return false;
    }

    public function sort(array $graph): array|bool
    {
        $this->currentValue = count($graph);
        $visit = array_fill(0, count($graph), false);
        foreach ($graph as $u => $value) {
            if (!$visit[$u]) {
                if ($this->dfs($u, $graph, $visit)) {
                    return false;
                }
            }
        }
        return $this->values;
    }
}

class ProblemSolver
{
    public static function solve(int $n, int $m, array $a): array|string
    {
        $graph = GraphBuilder::buildGraph($a);
        $sorter = new TopologicalSorter();
        $values = $sorter->sort($graph);
        if ($values === false) {
            return "No";
        }
        return [
            "Yes",
            array_map(fn($i) => $values[$i], range(0, $n - 1)),
            array_map(fn($i) => $values[$i], range(0, count($a[0]) - 1))
        ];
    }
}

function readInput(): array
{
    [$temp, $n, $m] = explode(' ', trim(fgets(STDIN)));
    $a = [];
    for ($i = 0; $i < $n; $i++) {
        $a[] = str_split(trim(fgets(STDIN)));
    }
    return [$n, $m, $a];
}

function main(): void
{
    [$n, $m, $a] = readInput();
    $result = ProblemSolver::solve($n, $m, $a);
    if (is_array($result)) {
        echo implode(' ', $result);
    } else {
        echo $result;
    }
}

main();
?>

        $this->a = $a;
        $this->b = $b;
        $this->f = $f;
        $this->k = $k;
    }

    public function execute(): int {
        if ($this->f >= $this->a) {
            echo -1 . PHP_EOL;
            return -1;
        } else {
            if ($this->k === 1) {
                echo 0 . PHP_EOL;
                return 0;
            } else {
                if ($this->k % 2 === 0) {
                    echo intdiv($this->k, 2) . PHP_EOL;
                    return intdiv($this->k, 2);
                } else {
                    if ($this->b >= $this->f) {
                        echo intdiv($this->k, 2) . PHP_EOL;
                        return intdiv($this->k, 2);
                    } else {
                        echo intdiv($this->k, 2) + 1 . PHP_EOL;
                        return intdiv($this->k, 2) + 1;
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

<?php

namespace Research\TripletProduct;

class TripletProductCalculator {
    public function maxTripletProduct(array $nums): int {
        if (count($nums) === 0) return 0;
        if (count($nums) === 1) return $nums[0] === 0 ? 0 : PHP_INT_MIN;
        if (count($nums) === 2) return $nums[0] * $nums[1];

        $og = array_fill(0, count($nums), []);
        $vg = array_fill(0, count($nums), []);
        foreach ($og as $i => $_) {
            $og[$i] = [];
            $vg[$i] = [];
        }

        foreach ($og as $i => $_) {
            $vg[$i][$i] = $og[$i][$i] = $nums[$i];
        }

        $max = PHP_INT_MIN;

        for ($x = 1; $x < count($og); $x++) {
            for ($y = count($og) - 1; $y >= 0; $y--) {
                if ($x < $y) {
                    $i = count($og) - 1 - $x + $y;
                    if ($y === $i) {
                        $og[$i][$i] = $nums[$y] * $nums[$i];
                        $vg[$i][$i] = $nums[$y] * $nums[$i];
                    } else {
                        $og[$i][$i] = PHP_INT_MAX;
                        $og[$i][$y] = $og[$y][$i] = max(
                            $nums[$i] * $nums[$y],
                            max($og[$y + 1][$i] * $nums[$y], max($vg[$i - 1][$y - 1] * $nums[$y], $vg[$y][$i - 1]) * $nums[$i])
                        );
                        $vg[$i][$i] = PHP_INT_MAX;
                        $vg[$i][$y] = $vg[$y][$i] = min(
                            $nums[$i] * $nums[$y],
                            max(
                                max($nums[$i] * $nums[$i - 1], $nums[$i - 1] * $vg[$i - 1][$i - 1]) * $nums[$i],
                                min(max($nums[$y] * $nums[$y], $nums[$y] * $og[$y + 1][$y + 1]), max($nums[$y] * $og[$y][$i - 1], $nums[$y] * $vg[$i - 1][$y]))
                            )
                        );
                    }
                    if ($y === count($og) - 1) {
                        $max = max($max, $og[$y][$i]);
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        return $max === PHP_INT_MIN ? 0 : (int)$max;
    }
}

namespace NumberToWords;

class NumberConverter
{
    public function numberToWords(int $n): string
    {
        if ($n >= 0 && $n < 20) {
            return $this->basicNumbers()[$n];
        } elseif ($n >= 20 && $n < 100) {
            $tensPlace = $this->tensPlace()[$n / 10 - 2];
            $onesPlace = $n % 10 !== 0 ? $this->numberToWords($n % 10) : "";
            return trim($tensPlace . ($onesPlace ? '-' . $onesPlace : ''));
        }

        // TODO: Handle numbers 100 and above
        return "";
    }

    private function basicNumbers(): array
    {
        return [
            "zero", "one", "two", "three", "four", 
            "five", "six", "seven", "eight", "nine", 
            "ten", "eleven", "twelve", "thirteen", 
            "fourteen", "fifteen", "sixteen", "seventeen", 
            "eighteen", "nineteen"
        ];
    }

    private function tensPlace(): array
    {
        return [
            "twenty", "thirty", "forty", "fifty", 
            "sixty", "seventy", "eighty", "ninety"
        ];
    }
}

class FibonacciCalculator {
    public function printFibb(int $n): array {
        // Your code here
        $ans = [];
        
        $fib = function ($n) use (&$fib) {
            if ($n === 0) {
                return 0;
            }
            if ($n === 1) {
                return 1;
            }
            return $fib($n - 1) + $fib($n - 2);
        };

        for ($i = 0; $i < $n; $i++) {
            $ans[] = $fib($i);
        }

        return $ans;
    }
}

namespace Research\Sequences;

use Ds\Map;

class LongestSubsequence
{
    public function findLongestSubsequence(array $arr, int $d): int
    {
        $seqLength = new Map();
        $maxLength = 0;
        
        sort($arr);
        
        foreach ($arr as $num) {
            $length = 0;
            $key = $num - $d;

            if ($seqLength->hasKey($key)) {
                $length = $seqLength->get($key);
            }

            $length += 1;
            $maxLength = max($maxLength, $length);
            $seqLength->put($num, $length);
        }

        return $maxLength;
    }
}

<?php

namespace Research\Prototyping;

class QuerySolver
{
    private array $A;

    public function __construct(array $A)
    {
        sort($A);  // Ensure A is sorted
        $this->A = $A;
    }

    private function findVal(int $val): bool
    {
        $idx = $this->bisectLeft($val);
        return ($idx < count($this->A) && $this->A[$idx] === $val);
    }

    private function bisectLeft(int $val): int
    {
        $low = 0;
        $high = count($this->A);

        while ($low < $high) {
            $mid = (int)(($low + $high) / 2);
            if ($this->A[$mid] < $val) {
                $low = $mid + 1;
            } else {
                $high = $mid;
            }
        }
        return $low;
    }

    public function solve(array $queries): array
    {
        $ans = [];

        foreach ($queries as $query) {
            $ans[] = (int)$this->findVal($query);
        }

        return $ans;
    }
}

class StringAnalyzer
{

        echo "Surrounding Characters: $surroundingChars\n";

declare(strict_types=1);

namespace Research;

use function ceil;

class OptimalCombination
{
    private array $inputValues;

    public function __construct(array $inputValues)
    {
        $this->inputValues = $inputValues;
    }

    public function calculate(): void
    {
        [$a, $b, $c, $d, $e, $f] = $this->inputValues;
        $e = (int)($f * $e / 100);
        $f = (int)($f / 100);

        $result = [0, 0, 0];

        for ($x = 0; $x < ceil($e / $c); $x++) {
            for ($y = 0; $y <= ceil($e / $d); $y++) {
                if ($x === 0 && $y === 0) {
                    continue;
                }
                if ($c * $x + $d * $y > $e) {
                    break;
                }
                for ($p = 0; $p <= ceil($f / $a); $p++) {
                    for ($q = 0; $q <= ceil($f / $b); $q++) {
                        if ($a * $p + $b * $q < $c * $x + $d * $y) {
                            continue;
                        } elseif ($c * $x + $d * $y + $a * $p + $b * $q > $f) {
                            break;
                        }
                        $w = ($c * $x + $d * $y) * 100;
                        $s = (int)(($c * $x + $d * $y) * 100 / ($a * $p + $b * $q));

                        if ($s > $result[1] || ($s === $result[1] && $w > $result[0])) {
                            $result = [$w, $s, $c * $x + $d * $y];
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        echo sprintf("%s %s\n", $result[0], $result[2]);
    }
}

        $this->qAnswer = array_values(array_filter($this->qAux));

    private function debugOutput(): void
    {

namespace Research;

class TimeToReach
{
    public static function minTimeToReach($s, $x1, $x2, $t1, $t2, $p, $d)
    {
        return self::timeToMeet($x1, $x2, $t1, $t2, $p, $d);
    }

    private static function timeToMeet($x1, $x2, $t1, $t2, $p, $d)
    {
        if ($x1 === $x2) {
            return 0;
        }

        // Time to walk directly
        $walkTime = abs($x2 - $x1) * $t2;

        // Time to wait for the tram
        if ($d === 1) {
            $tramTime = $p <= $x1 ? ($x1 - $p) * $t1 : ($s - $p + $x1) * $t1;
        } else {
            $tramTime = $p >= $x1 ? ($p - $x1) * $t1 : ($p + $x1) * $t1;
        }

        // Time to reach the meeting point by tram
        $tramReachTime = abs($x2 - $x1) * $t1;

        // Total time if using the tram
        $tramTime += $tramReachTime;

        return min($walkTime, $tramTime);
    }
}

// Example usage
function main() {
    $input = explode(' ', trim(fgets(STDIN)));
    list($s, $x1, $x2) = array_map('intval', $input);

    $input = explode(' ', trim(fgets(STDIN)));
    list($t1, $t2) = array_map('intval', $input);

    $input = explode(' ', trim(fgets(STDIN)));
    list($p, $d) = array_map('intval', $input);

    echo TimeToReach::minTimeToReach($s, $x1, $x2, $t1, $t2, $p, $d) . PHP_EOL;
}

namespace Research\OptimalSequence;

class OptimalSequenceCalculator
{
    public function optimalSequence(int $n, int $B, int $x, int $y, int $Bx, int $By): int
    {
        $current = [0, min($B, $Bx), min($B, $By)];
        for ($i = 1; $i < $n; $i++) {
            $current = array_map(fn($m, $i) => $i % 3 === 0 ? $x * $m - $y * $n + 2 * $B : min($B, $B * $x, $By * $y), $current, array_keys($current));
        }
        return array_sum($current);
    }

    public function optimalSequenceV2(int $n, int $B, int $x, int $y, int $Bx, int $By): int
    {
        $dp = array_fill(0, $n + 1, 0);
        $b_min = $Bx < $By ? $Bx : $By;

        for ($i = 1; $i <= $n; $i++) {
            $dp[$i] = ($i % 3 === 0) ? $b_min + $x : min($B, $b_min);
            $b_min = $dp[$i];
        }
        
        for ($i = 3; $i <= $n; $i++) {
            $dp[$i] = min($dp[$i - 1] + $x, $dp[$i - 2] - $y);
        }

        return $dp[$n];
    }

    public function optimizeSequence(int $n, int $B, int $x, int $y, int $Bx, int $By): int
    {
        $dp = function ($i, $b) use (&$dp, $n, $x, $y) {
            if ($i === $n + 1) {
                return $b[1] + $b[2];
            }
            if ($i % 3 === 0) {
                return min(
                    $dp($i + 1, [$b[0] + 1] + $b),
                    $dp($i + 1, [$b[0] + $x] + $b),
                    $dp($i + 1, [$b[0] - $y] + $b)
                );
            }
            if ($i % 3 === 1) {
                return min(
                    $dp($i + 1, [$b[0]] + $b),
                    $dp($i + 1, [$b[0] + $x] + $b),
                    $dp($i + 1, [$b[0] - $y] + $b)
                );
            }
            if ($i % 3 === 2) {
                return min(
                    $dp($i + 1, [$b[0] - $b[2] + $y] + $b),
                    $dp($i + 1, [$b[0] - $b[2] * $x] + $b)
                );
            }
        };

        return max(array_map(fn($b) => $dp(1, $b), [[0], [$Bx], [$By]]));
    }
}

namespace Research;

class GCD
{
    public static function compute($a, $b)
    {
        if ($a === 0) {
            return $b;
        }
        return self::compute($b % $a, $a);
    }

    public static function reduceFraction($a, $b)
    {
        $d = self::compute($a, $b);
        return [$a / $d, $b / $d];
    }
}

class Main
{
    public static function run()
    {
        $input = trim(fgets(STDIN));
        [$a, $b] = array_map('intval', explode(" ", $input));
        
        if ($a < $b) {
            [$a, $b] = [$b, $a];
        }

        while ($a > $b) {
            $temp = $b;
            $b = $a - $b;
            $a = $temp;
        }

        $gcd_val = GCD::reduceFraction($a, $b);
        echo json_encode([$gcd_val[0], $gcd_val[1]]) . PHP_EOL;
    }
}

namespace Research\MatrixProblem;

class MatrixSolver
{
    public function solve(int $n, int $k): ?array
    {
        for ($i = 0; $i < $n; $i++) {
            for ($j = 0; $j < $n; $j++) {
                for ($x = 0; $x < $n; $x++) {
                    for ($y = 0; $y < $n; $y++) {
                        $table = array_fill(0, $n, array_fill(0, $n, 0));
                        
                        for ($i = 0; $i < $n; $i++) {
                            for ($j = 0; $j < $n; $j++) {
                                $table[$i][$j] = abs($i - $x) + abs($j - $y);
                            }
                        }
                        
                        $sum_row = array_map('array_sum', $table);
                        $sum_col = array_map('array_sum', array_merge(...$table));
                        
                        if ($sum_row === $sum_col && $sum_row[0] === $k) {
                            return $table;
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        return null;
    }
}

namespace CandleTransformation;

class MinOperations
{
    public function calculate(int $t, array $cases): array
    {
        $results = [];
        foreach ($cases as [$n, $a, $b]) {
            $n = (int)$n;
            $ops_count = 0;
            $i = 0;

            while ($i < $n || $a[$n - 1] !== $b[$n - 1]) {
                $min_ops = PHP_INT_MAX;

                for ($j = 0; $j < $n; $j++) {
                    if ($a[$j] === $b[$j]) {
                        $min_ops = min($min_ops, abs($j - $i));
                    }
                }

                if ($min_ops === PHP_INT_MAX) {
                    $ops_count = -1;
                    break;
                }

                $i += $min_ops;
                $ops_count += $min_ops;
            }

            $results[] = $ops_count;
        }

        return $results;
    }

    // TODO: Add testing functions to validate transformations
    // Debug print for analyzing operations
    public function debugPrint(array $results): void
    {
        foreach ($results as $index => $result) {
            echo "Test Case " . ($index + 1) . ": Minimum Operations Required = $result\n";
        }
    }

    // Benchmarking method (optional)
    public function benchmark(int $t, array $cases): float
    {
        $start = microtime(true);
        $this->calculate($t, $cases);
        return microtime(true) - $start;
    }
}

namespace Research;

class LeafAnalyzer
{
    private int $n;
    private array $data = [];
    private array $lastAwayLeafs = [];
    private array $uniqueData = [];

    public function __construct(int $n)
    {
        $this->n = $n;
        $this->data = array_fill(0, $n, [0, 0]);
        $this->lastAwayLeafs = array_fill(0, $n, 0);
    }

    public function inputData(): void
    {
        for ($i = 0; $i < $this->n; $i++) {
            $temp = explode(' ', trim(fgets(STDIN)));
            $this->data[$i] = [(int)$temp[0], (int)$temp[1]];
        }
    }

    public function process(): void
    {
        foreach ($this->data as $i => [$x, $h]) {
            $this->uniqueData[$x] = $this->lastAwayLeafs[$i] = [$h, 1];
        }

        $keys = array_keys($this->uniqueData);
        foreach ($keys as $i => $x) {
            if ($i == 0) continue;
            if ($i == $this->n - 1) {
                $this->lastAwayLeafs[$i][0] = 1 << 30;
            } else {
                $this->lastAwayLeafs[$i][0] = min($this->uniqueData[$keys[$i + 1]][0], $this->data[$i][1]);
            }
        }

        $answer = [];
        for ($i = $this->n - 2; $i >= 0; $i--) {
            $awayAt = $i + 1;
            $lastAway = $this->lastAwayLeafs[$i];
            $addEff = min($this->data[$i][1], $lastAway[0]) - $lastAway[1];

            if ($addEff < 0) continue;

            while (!empty($answer) && end($answer)[0] < $awayAt + 1) {
                array_pop($answer);
            }

            while (!empty($answer) && end($answer)[1] + $addEff - ($lastAway[0] - $lastAway[1]) <= end($answer)[0] - $awayAt) {
                array_pop($answer);
            }

            if (!empty($answer) && end($answer)[1] + $addEff > end($answer)[0] - $awayAt) {
                array_pop($answer);
            }
        }

        // TODO: Handle output of results
        // Debug print
        print_r($answer);
    }
}

$analyzer->inputData();
$analyzer->process();

namespace Research;

class SockDaysCalculator
{
    private int $a;
    private int $b;

    public function __construct(int $a, int $b)
    {
        $this->a = $a;
        $this->b = $b;
    }

    public function calculateDays(): array
    {
        // Maximum number of days when Vasya can wear different socks
        $daysDifferentSocks = min($this->a, $this->b);
        
        // Maximum number of days when Vasya can wear the same socks
        $remainingSocks = $this->a + $this->b - 2 * $daysDifferentSocks;
        $daysSameSocks = intdiv($remainingSocks, 2);

        if ($remainingSocks % 2 !== 0) {
            $daysSameSocks--;
        }

        return [$daysDifferentSocks, $daysSameSocks];
    }
}

{

    $data = explode(' ', $input);

    $a = (int)$data[0];
    $b = (int)$data[1];

    $calculator = new SockDaysCalculator($a, $b);
    [$daysDifferentSocks, $daysSameSocks] = $calculator->calculateDays();

    echo "$daysDifferentSocks $daysSameSocks\n";
}

namespace Research\Algorithms;

class Solver {
    private int $result;

    public function __construct() {
        $this->result = 10000000000;
    }

    public function solve(array $nums): int {
        $redis = [];
        $distinctValues = [];

        foreach ($nums as $i => $num) {
            if (!in_array($num, $distinctValues)) {
                $distinctValues[] = $num;
                $redis[$num] = [$i + 1, -1];
            }

            $redis[$num][1] = $i + 1;

            if ($redis[$num][1] - $redis[$num][0] + 1 < $this->result && $redis[$num][0] !== $redis[$num][1]) {
                $this->result = $redis[$num][1] - $redis[$num][0] + 1;
            }
        }

        return $this->result !== 10000000000 ? $this->result : -1;
    }
}

namespace DiggitClock;

class TimeCalculator
{
    private array $onlyFine = [11, 22, 33, 44, 55, 66, 77, 88, 99];
    private array $correctAnswer = [4, 0, 1, 1, 7, 5];
    private array $wouldWaistTime = [6, 6, 3, 3, 3, 3, 0, 0];

    public function countF(int $H, int $M): int
    {
        $counter = 0;
        foreach ($this->onlyFine as $num) {
            $counter += intdiv($M, $num) + intdiv($H, (24 / $num));
        }
        return $counter;
    }

    public function specialF(int $H, int $M): int
    {
        return $H * $M * 60;
    }

    public function countF1(int $H, int $M): int
    {
        foreach ($this->onlyFine as $index => $hour) {
            if ($M % $hour !== 0 || $H % ($hour ** 2) !== 0) {
                return $this->wouldWaistTime[$index];
            }
            return $this->correctAnswer[$index];
        }
        return 0; // Default return

namespace Research;

class BinaryProcessor
{
    private int $testCases;

    public function run(): void
    {
        $this->testCases = (int)readline("Enter number of test cases: ");
        while ($this->testCases--) {
            $input = readline("Enter n and s: ");
            list($n, $s) = explode(" ", $input);
            $n = (int)$n;
            $result = $this->processBinaryString($n, $s);
            echo $result . PHP_EOL;
        }
    }

    private function processBinaryString(int $n, string $s): string
    {
        $countZeroes = substr_count($s, '0');
        $output = '';

        for ($i = 0; $i < $n; $i++) {
            if ($countZeroes >= $n - $i) {
                $output .= '0';
            } else {
                $output .= '1';
            }
        }

        return $output;
    }
}

namespace Research;

class LetterChecker {
    private int $ph1 = 0;
    private int $ph2 = 0;
    private array $l1 = [];
    private array $l2 = [];
    
    public function __construct() {
        $this->l1 = range('a', 'z');
        $this->l2 = range('A', 'Z');
    }

    public function checkString(string $input): string {
        foreach (str_split($input) as $char) {
            if (in_array($char, $this->l1)) {
                $this->ph1++;
            }
            if (in_array($char, $this->l2)) {
                $this->ph2++;
            }
            if ($this->ph1 === 26 || $this->ph2 === 26) {
                break;
            }
        }
        
        // Debug print
        echo "Lowercase count: {$this->ph1}, Uppercase count: {$this->ph2}\n";

        if ($this->ph1 === 26 || $this->ph2 === 26 || ($this->ph1 + $this->ph2) === 26) {
            return 'YES';
        } else {
            return 'NO';
        }
    }
}

namespace Research;

class UglinessCalculator
{
    public function calculateUgliness(array $sequence): int
    {
        $ugliness = 0;
        for ($i = 1; $i < count($sequence); $i++) {
            if ($sequence[$i] !== $sequence[$i - 1]) {
                $ugliness++;
            }
        }
        return $ugliness;
    }
}

class TestCaseProcessor
{
    private UglinessCalculator $calculator;

    public function __construct()
    {
        $this->calculator = new UglinessCalculator();
    }
    
    public function processTestCases(): void
    {
        $input = fgets(STDIN);
        $data = explode(' ', trim($input));
        
        $index = 0;
        $T = (int)$data[$index];
        $index++;
        $results = [];
        
        for ($t = 0; $t < $T; $t++) {
            $N = (int)$data[$index];
            $K = (int)$data[$index + 1];
            $index += 2;
            $sequence = array_map('intval', array_slice($data, $index, $N));
            $index += $N;
            $uglinessValues = [];
            
            for ($k = 1; $k <= $K; $k++) {
                $filteredSequence = array_filter($sequence, fn($x) => $x !== $k);
                $uglinessValues[] = $this->calculator->calculateUgliness($filteredSequence);
            }
            
            $results[] = implode(' ', $uglinessValues);
        }
        
        echo implode("\n", $results) . "\n";
    }
}

namespace Research\Algorithms;

class ArrayManipulator
{
    public function reverseArray(): void
    {
        // Initialize array
        $elements = [];
        
        // Total number of test cases
        $n = (int)readline("Enter the number of elements: ");
        
        // Read elements
        for ($i = 0; $i < $n; $i++) {
            $elements[] = (int)readline("Enter element " . ($i + 1) . ": ");
        }
        
        // Reverse the elements in-place
        for ($i = 0; $i < $n / 2; $i++) {
            $temp = $elements[$i];
            $elements[$i] = $elements[$n - 1 - $i];
            $elements[$n - 1 - $i] = $temp;
        }

        // Output reversed array
        foreach ($elements as $element) {
            echo $element . " ";
        }
        echo PHP_EOL; // New line after output
    }
}

    {

            if ($n % 10 == 4 || $n % 10 == 7) {
                $count++;
            }
            $n = (int)($n / 10);
        }
        return $count;

    {
        $luckyDigitCount = $this->findDigits($n);
        if ($luckyDigitCount == 4 || $luckyDigitCount == 7) {
            return "YES";
        } elseif (is_numeric($luckyDigitCount)) {
            return "NO";
        } else {
            // TODO: Handle unexpected cases
            return (string) $this->findDigits($luckyDigitCount);
        }
    }
}

<?php

namespace Research;

class WordDistance
{
    private function distance(string $x, string $y): int
    {
        $dist = 0;
        for ($i = 0; $i < strlen($x); $i++) {
            $diff_x = min(
                abs(97 - ord($x[$i])) - abs(ord($x[$i]) - ord($y[$i])), 
                abs(ord($x[$i]) - abs(ord('a') - ord($y[$i])))
            );
            if ($diff_x) {
                $dist++;
            }
        }

        if (ord($x[0]) === ord($y[0])) {
            if ($x === $y) {
                $dist = 0;
            }
        }
        return $dist;
    }

    public function compute(array $strings): int
    {
        $result = -INF;
        $count = count($strings);

        for ($i = 0; $i < $count; $i++) {
            $temp = -INF;

            for ($j = 0; $j < $count; $j++) {
                if ($i === $j || $result === -INF) {
                    $temp += $this->distance($strings[$i], $strings[$j]);
                    if ($j < $i - 1) {
                        $temp = $result = min($temp, $result);
                    }

                    if ($result === $i - 2) {
                        if ($temp > 0) {
                            $result = $temp;
                        }
                    }
                }
            }

            if ($i > 1) {
                $pairs = array_slice($strings, $i);
                $distances = [];
                for ($p1 = 0; $p1 < count($pairs); $p1++) {
                    for ($p2 = $p1 + 1; $p2 < count($pairs); $p2++) {
                        $distances[] = $this->distance($pairs[$p1], $pairs[$p2]);
                    }
                }

                if ($result === -INF || $result <= min($distances)) {
                    $result = $temp;
                }
            }
        }
        return (int)$result;
    }
}

function main()
{
    fscanf(STDIN, "%d %d", $n, $m);
    $strings = [];
    for ($i = 0; $i < $n; $i++) {

    }

    echo ($m > 1) ? $wordDistance->compute($strings) : count($strings);
}

namespace Research\BozoProblem;

class BozoSolver
{
    private array $data;

    public function __construct(string $input)
    {
        $this->data = explode(" ", trim($input));
    }

    public function solve(): void
    {
        $T = (int) $this->data[0];
        $index = 1; // Start after the first element
        
        for ($i = 0; $i < $T; $i++) {
            $L = (int) $this->data[$index++];
            $B = (int) $this->data[$index++];
            $H = (int) $this->data[$index++];

            $shortestDim = min($L, $B, $H);
            $radius = $shortestDim / 2.0;
            
            // Debug print
            echo "Test case {$i}: L={$L}, B={$B}, H={$H}, Radius=".round($radius, 1)."\n";
        }
    }
}

namespace Research;

class BeautifulArraySolver
{
    public function solve(int $n, int $k, array $a): array|int
    {
        $uniqueElements = array_unique($a);
        
        if (count($uniqueElements) > $k) {
            return -1;
        }
        
        $missingElements = range(1, $n);
        $uniqueElements = array_merge($uniqueElements, array_diff($missingElements, $uniqueElements));
        
        // Generate the beautiful array
        $beautifulArray = array_fill(0, $n, $uniqueElements);
        $beautifulArray = array_merge(...$beautifulArray);
        
        return [count($beautifulArray), $beautifulArray];
    }
}

class Main
{
    public function run(): void
    {
        $t = (int)trim(fgets(STDIN));
        $solver = new BeautifulArraySolver();

        for ($i = 0; $i < $t; $i++) {
            list($n, $k) = array_map('intval', explode(' ', trim(fgets(STDIN))));
            $a = array_map('intval', explode(' ', trim(fgets(STDIN))));

            $result = $solver->solve($n, $k, $a);

            if ($result === -1) {
                echo -1 . PHP_EOL;
            } else {
                echo $result[0] . PHP_EOL;
                echo implode(' ', $result[1]) . PHP_EOL;
            }
        }
    }
}

namespace PhoneFormatter;

class Formatter {
    private int $length;
    private string $phoneNumber;

    public function __construct(int $length, string $phoneNumber) {
        $this->length = $length;
        $this->phoneNumber = $phoneNumber;
    }

    public function format(): string {
        $result = [];
        $i = 0;

        while ($i < $this->length) {
            // Debug print for current index and slice
            echo "Current index: $i\n";

            if ($i === $this->length - 2) {
                $result[] = substr($this->phoneNumber, $i);
                break;
            } elseif ($i === $this->length - 1) {
                $result[count($result) - 1] .= $this->phoneNumber[$i];
                break;
            } else {
                $result[] = substr($this->phoneNumber, $i, 2);
                $i += 2;
            }

            // Debug print for current result state
            echo "Current result: " . implode(', ', $result) . "\n";
        }

        return implode('-', $result);
    }
}

namespace Research;

class CostCalculator
{
    public function calculateCost(int $n): float
    {
        if ($n < 1 || $n === 0) {
            return 0;
        }

        $table = [
            $this->calculateCost((int)($n / 3)),
            $this->calculateCost((int)(2 * $n / 3)),
            $this->calculateCost((int)($n / 2))
        ];

        rsort($table);
        return end($table);
    }

    public function calculateAlternativeCost(int $n): float
    {
        if ($n < 1) {
            return 0;
        }

        $table = array_fill(0, $n + 1, 0);
        $table[0] = $n;

        for ($ind = 1; $ind <= $n; $ind++) {
            $l = 0;
            $table[$ind] = $l + min((int)($ind / 3) + 1, $l + min((int)($ind / 2) + 1, (int)($ind / 3) + 1) + 1);
        }

        return end($table);
    }

    public function calculateLogCost(int $n): float
    {
        if ($n < 1 || $n === 0) {
            return 0;
        }

        $tables = [
            sqrt($n / 3),
            sqrt(($n / 2) + 3),
            sqrt($n / 3)
        ];

        rsort($tables);
        return end($tables) - 1;
    }

    public function debugCostCalculation(int $n): float
    {
        if ($n < 1 || $n === 0) {
            return 0;
        }

        $table = [$n, 3, 2];
        rsort($table);
        return end($table);
    }

    public function calculateAdvancedCost(int $n): float
    {
        if ($n === 1 || $n === 0) {
            return 0;
        }

        $T = [
            (int)($n / 3) + ((int)(($n - 1) / 3) + 2 + ((int)(($n - 1) / 3))) * ((int)(($n - 1) / 3) + 2) / 3),
            (int)(2 * $n / 3) + (($n === 1 || $n === 0) + 3 / 3) * ((int)($n / 3) - 1),
            (int)($n / 2) + (3 / 2 + (int)($n / 3)) * ($n - 1),
            (int)((($n + 2) / 3)) * ($n - ((int)(($n + 2) / 3)) + 1 / 3 + 2 / 3)
        ];

        rsort($T);
        return end($T);
    }
}

$calculator = new CostCalculator();
$result = $calculator->calculateCost($inputNumber);
echo "The calculated cost is: " . $result . PHP_EOL;

namespace Research;

class Transformation
{
    protected array $inputArray = [];
    protected array $outputArray = [];
    protected int $marker = 0;

    public function gatherInput(int $n): void
    {
        for ($i = 0; $i < $n; $i++) {
            $this->inputArray[] = trim(fgets(STDIN)); // Assuming input from CLI
        }
    }

    public function transformInput(): void
    {
        foreach ($this->inputArray as $line) {
            for ($j = 0; $j < strlen($line); $j++) {
                if ($line[$j] === "X") {
                    continue;
                } else {
                    if ($this->marker === 0) {
                        $this->outputArray[] = substr($line, 0, $j) . '+' . substr($line, $j + 1);
                        $this->marker = 1;
                    } else {
                        $this->outputArray[] = substr($line, 0, $j - 1) . '++' . substr($line, $j + 1);
                        break;
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }

    public function checkDuplicates(int $n): void
    {
        $duplicateFound = false;

        for ($i = 0; $i < $n; $i++) {
            for ($j = $i + 1; $j < $n; $j++) {
                if ($this->outputArray[$i] === $this->outputArray[$j]) {
                    echo "NO\n";
                    $duplicateFound = true;
                    break 2; // Break both loops
                }
            }
        }

        if (!$duplicateFound) {
            echo "YES\n";
            foreach ($this->outputArray as $line) {
                echo $line . "\n";
            }
        }
    }
}

namespace Research;

class Main {
    private int $mod = 1000000007;
    private array $dp;
    
    public function run($input) {
        list($h, $w, $k) = array_map('intval', explode(' ', trim(fread($input, 1024))));
        $this->dp = array_fill(0, $h + 2, array_fill(0, $w, 0));
        
        for ($i = 0; $i < $w; $i++) {
            $this->dp[0][$i] = 1;
        }
        
        for ($i = 1; $i <= $h; $i++) {
            for ($j = 1; $j < $w - 1; $j++) {
                $this->dp[$i][$j] = (
                    ($this->dp[$i][$j - 1] * $j * $this->factory($j) +
                    $this->dp[$i][$j] * ($j + 1) * $this->factory($j + 1) +
                    $this->dp[$i][$j + 1] * ($j + 1) * $this->factory($j + 1)) % $this->mod
                ) % $this->mod;
            }
            $this->dp[$i][0] = $j * $this->factory($j) % $this->mod;
            $this->dp[$i][$w - 1] = ($j + 1) * $this->factory($j + 1) % $this->mod;
        }
        
        echo $this->dp[$h][$k - 1] % $this->mod . PHP_EOL;
    }

    private function factory(int $i): int {
        $tmp = 1;
        for ($j = 2; $j <= $i; $j++) {
            $tmp = ($tmp * $j) % $this->mod;
        }
        return $tmp;
    }
}

$main = new Main();
$main->run(STDIN);

namespace Research;

class MinOpsCalculator
{
    public function minOps(int $n, array $a): int
    {
        $ops = 0;
        $prefixSum = 0;
        $signs = [$prefixSum];

        foreach ($a as $ai) {
            $prefixSum += $ai;

            if ($prefixSum === 0 || $this->operatingSigns(end($signs)) === 0) {
                $ops++;
            } elseif ($this->sign($prefixSum) !== $this->sign(end($signs))) {
                $signs[] = $prefixSum;
            } else {
                $prefixSum++;
                $ops++;
            }
        }

        return $ops;
    }

    private function operatingSigns(int $x): int
    {
        return ($x > 0) ? 1 : (($x < 0) ? -1 : 0);
    }

    private function sign(int $x): int
    {
        return ($x > 0) ? 1 : (($x < 0) ? -1 : 0);
    }
}

class FibonacciChecker {
    public static function minLengthNum(int $ordMax, int $numDig): array {
        $seq = [0, 1];
        $i = 2;
        
        // Generate Fibonacci sequence while the last number's length is within the limit
        while (strlen((string) end($seq)) <= $ordMax) {
            $seq[] = $seq[$i - 1] + $seq[$i - 2];
            $i++;
        }

        // TODO: Optimize search for index
        foreach ($seq as $index => $term) {
            if (strlen((string) $term) === $numDig) {
                return [true, $index];
            }
        }
        return [false, -1];
    }

    // Debugging information

        if ($result[0]) {
            echo "Term found at index: {$result[1]}\n";
        } else {

        }
    }

<?php

namespace Research\RoomBuilding;

use Countable;
use InvalidArgumentException;

class Solution {
    const MOD = 1000000007;

    public function waysToBuildRooms(array $prevRoom): int {
        $graph = $this->buildGraph($prevRoom);
        list($ways, ) = $this->dfs(0, $graph);
        return $ways;
    }

    private function buildGraph(array $prevRoom): array {
        $graph = [];
        foreach ($prevRoom as $i => $prev) {
            if ($prev !== -1) {
                $graph[$prev][] = $i;
            }
        }
        return $graph;
    }

    private function dfs(int $node, array $graph): array {
        $ways = 1;
        $rooms = 0;

        foreach ($graph[$node] ?? [] as $child) {
            list($childWays, $childRooms) = $this->dfs($child, $graph);
            $ways = ($ways * $childWays * $this->comb($rooms + $childRooms, $childRooms)) % self::MOD;
            $rooms += $childRooms + 1;
        }
        
        return [$ways, $rooms];
    }

    private function comb(int $n, int $k): int {
        if ($k > $n) return 0;
        $numerator = 1;
        $denominator = 1;

        for ($i = 0; $i < $k; $i++) {
            $numerator = ($numerator * ($n - $i)) % self::MOD;
            $denominator = ($denominator * ($i + 1)) % self::MOD;
        }

        // TODO: Use modular inverse if necessary
        return ($numerator * $this->modInverse($denominator, self::MOD)) % self::MOD;
    }

    private function modInverse(int $a, int $m): int {
        $m0 = $m;
        $y = 0;
        $x = 1;

        if ($m == 1) return 0;

        while ($a > 1) {
            $q = intdiv($a, $m);
            $t = $m;

            $m = $a % $m;
            $a = $t;
            $t = $y;

            $y = $x - $q * $y;
            $x = $t;
        }

        if ($x < 0) {
            $x += $m0;
        }

        return $x;
    }
}

<?php

namespace Research;

class AlternatingCounter
{
    private array $array;
    private int $length;
    private int $result;
    private int $alternating;
    private int $oddCount;

    public function __construct(array $inputArray)
    {
        $this->array = $inputArray;
        $this->length = count($this->array);
        $this->result = 0;
        $this->alternating = 0;
        $this->oddCount = 0;

        if ($this->length % 2 === 1) {
            $this->length -= 1;
        }
    }

    public function computeResult(): int
    {
        for ($i = 0; $i < $this->length; $i++) {
            if ($this->array[$i] % 2 === 1) {
                $this->oddCount++;
            }
            if ($this->alternating === 0) {
                if ($this->array[$i] % 2 === 1) {
                    $this->result++;
                } else {
                    $this->alternating = 1;
                }
            } else {
                if ($this->array[$i] % 2 === 0) {
                    $this->result++;
                } else {
                    $this->alternating = 0;
                }
            }
        }

        if ($this->oddCount > $this->result) {
            $this->result = $this->oddCount;
        }
        return $this->result;
    }
}

                $j += 2;

                $i++;
                $j++;
            }
        }

    }

namespace Research;

class StringProcessor {
    private array $inputs;
    private int $testCases;
    private int $count;

    public function __construct(array $inputs) {
        $this->inputs = $inputs;
        $this->testCases = count($inputs) / 2;
    }

    public function process() {
        for ($i = 0; $i < $this->testCases; $i++) {
            $n = (int)$this->inputs[$i * 2];
            $s = $this->inputs[$i * 2 + 1];

            $this->count = $n;
            $this->evaluateString($s, $n);
        }
    }

    private function evaluateString(string $s, int $n): void {
        $i = 0;
        $k = $n - 1;

        while (true) {
            $stat = '';

            for ($j = 0; $j < min($i + 1, $k); $j++) {
                if ($s[$i - $j] === $s[$i + $j]) {
                    $stat = 'y';
                    break;
                } else {
                    $stat = 'n';
                    break;
                }
            }

            if ($stat === 'y') {
                $i++;
            } else {
                break;
            }
        }

        if ($this->count - ($k - $i) > 0) {
            $this->handlePositiveCount($k);
        } else {
            $this->checkAndCount($s, $k, $i);
        }
    }

    private function handlePositiveCount(int $k): void {
        $result = '';
        $remaining = $this->count - $k;

        // TODO: Validate and define addr function
        if ($remaining > 99) {
            $result .= addr($remaining);
            $this->count -= $k;
            $remaining = $this->count;
            $result .= addr($remaining);
        } else {
            $result .= addr($remaining);
            $this->count -= $k;
            $result .= addr($this->count);
        }

        echo $result . PHP_EOL;
    }

    private function checkAndCount(string $s, int $k, int $i): void {
        for ($j = 0; $j < min($i + 1, $k); $j++) {
            if ($s[$i - $j] === $s[$i + $j]) {
                break;
            } else {
                $stat = 'n';
                $check_if = $s[$i - $j];
                
                for ($ll = 0; $ll < $k; $ll++) {
                    if ($i - $j + $ll >= 0 && $i + $j - $ll < strlen($s) && 
                        $s[$i - $j + $ll] === $s[$i + $j - $ll]) {
                        $check_if = $s[$i - $j + $ll];
                        $stat = 'y';
                        break;
                    }
                }

                if ($stat === 'y') {
                    $this->count++;
                    break;
                }
            }
        }
        echo $this->count . PHP_EOL;
    }
}

    // TODO: Implement addr logic

}

namespace Research;

class ArrayUtils 
{
    public static function divisibleSumPairs(int $n, int $k, array $arr): int 
    {
        $count = 0;
        $size = count($arr);

        for ($i = 0; $i < $size; $i++) {
            for ($j = $i + 1; $j < $size; $j++) {
                if (($arr[$i] * $arr[$j]) % $k === 0) {
                    $count++;
                }
            }
        }

        return $count;
    }

    public static function minimumDistance(int $n, array $arr, int $x, int $y): int 
    {
        $minDistance = PHP_INT_MAX;
        $xIndex = -1;
        $yIndex = -1;

        for ($i = 0; $i < $n; $i++) {
            if ($arr[$i] === $x) {
                $xIndex = $i;
                if ($yIndex !== -1) {
                    $minDistance = min($minDistance, abs($xIndex - $yIndex));
                }
            }

            if ($arr[$i] === $y) {
                $yIndex = $i;
                if ($xIndex !== -1) {
                    $minDistance = min($minDistance, abs($yIndex - $xIndex));
                }
            }
        }

        return $minDistance === PHP_INT_MAX ? -1 : $minDistance;
    }
}

class Test 
{
    public static function runTests() 
    {
        assert(ArrayUtils::divisibleSumPairs(10, 3, [1, 2, 3, 4, 5]) === 3);
        assert(ArrayUtils::divisibleSumPairs(11, 4, [1, 2, 3, 4, 5]) === 0);
        
        $testCases = [
            [[5, [1, 2, 3, 4, 1], 1, 2], 1],
            [[6, [1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 1], 1, 5], 4],
        ];

        foreach ($testCases as $case) {
            list($input, $expected) = $case;
            $result = ArrayUtils::minimumDistance(...$input);
            assert($result === $expected);
        }
    }
}

namespace Research;

class DigitSum
{
    public static function sumOfDigits(int $n): int
    {
        return array_sum(array_map('intval', str_split((string)$n)));
    }
}

class MaxSumDigitsProduct
{
    public static function maxSumOfDigitsProduct(array $arr): int
    {
        $maxSumDigits = 0;
        $count = count($arr);

        for ($i = 0; $i < $count; $i++) {
            for ($j = $i + 1; $j < $count; $j++) {
                $product = $arr[$i] * $arr[$j];
                $sumDigits = DigitSum::sumOfDigits($product);
                $maxSumDigits = max($maxSumDigits, $sumDigits);
            }
        }

        return $maxSumDigits;
    }
}

class Solution
{
    public function solve(): void
    {
        $data = explode("\n", trim(fgets(STDIN)));
        
        $T = (int)$data[0];
        $results = [];

        for ($t = 1; $t <= $T; $t++) {
            $N = (int)$data[$t * 2 - 1];
            $A = array_map('intval', explode(' ', $data[$t * 2]));

            $result = MaxSumDigitsProduct::maxSumOfDigitsProduct($A);
            $results[] = $result;
        }

        foreach ($results as $result) {
            echo $result . PHP_EOL;
        }
    }
}

namespace Research;

class Solution {
    public function maxSum(array $arr1, array $arr2): int {
        sort($arr1);
        sort($arr2);
        
        $i = 0;
        $j = 0;
        $ans = 0;
        
        while ($i < count($arr1) && $j < count($arr2)) {
            $currentMax = abs($arr1[$i] - $arr2[$j]) + abs($i - $j);
            $ans = max($ans, $currentMax);
            
            // Debug output
            echo "Comparing: arr1[$i] = {$arr1[$i]}, arr2[$j] = {$arr2[$j]}, currentMax = $currentMax, ans = $ans\n";

            if ($arr1[$i] < $arr2[$j]) {
                $i++;
            } else {
                $j++;
            }
        }
        
        return $ans;
    }
}

namespace RabbitResearch;

use Countable;
use Exception;

class FriendlyPairsCounter implements Countable
{
    private array $frequency;

    public function __construct(array $a)
    {
        $this->frequency = array_count_values($a);
    }

    public function countFriendlyPairs(int $n): int
    {
        $friendlyPairsCount = 0;

        for ($x = 0; $x < $n; $x++) {
            if ($this->frequency[$x] === 1) {
                // Counting self-friendly pairs
                $friendlyPairsCount += 0.5 * ($this->frequency[$x] * ($this->frequency[$x] - 1));
            } else {
                for ($y = $x + 1; $y < $n; $y++) {
                    if (isset($this->frequency[$y]) && $this->frequency[$y] === $x) {
                        // Counting friendly pairs with others
                        $friendlyPairsCount += min($this->frequency[$x], $this->frequency[$y]) * ($this->frequency[$x] - 1);
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        return (int) $friendlyPairsCount;
    }

    public function count(): int
    {
        return count($this->frequency);
    }
}

namespace Research;

class MinMovesCalculator
{
    public function minMoves(int $n): int
    {
        $a = [1];
        $moves = 0;

        while (array_sum($a) < $n) {
            $minIndex = array_search(min($a), $a);
            $a[$minIndex] += 1;
            $moves += 1;

            // Append a copy of the smallest element to the end of the array.
            $a[] = min($a);
            $moves += 1;
        }
        
        return $moves;
    }
}

    }
}

namespace Research;

class SumCalculator
{
    private array $var = [];
    private const MAX_SIZE = 10000;

    public function run(): void
    {
        while (true) {
            $n = (int)readline("Enter number of elements (0 to exit): ");
            if ($n === 0) break;

            if ($n > self::MAX_SIZE) {
                echo "Exceeds maximum size of " . self::MAX_SIZE . "\n";
                continue;
            }

            $this->readInput($n);
            sort($this->var);
            $result = $this->calculateSum($n);

            echo "Result: $result\n";
        }
    }

    private function readInput(int $n): void
    {
        $this->var = [];
        echo "Enter elements:\n";
        for ($i = 0; $i < $n; $i++) {
            $this->var[$i] = (int)readline();
        }
    }

    private function calculateSum(int $n): int
    {
        $sum = 0;
        for ($i = 1; $i < $n; $i++) {
            $sum += $this->var[$i - 1];
            $this->var[$i] += $sum;
        }
        return $this->var[$n - 1];
    }
}

$calculator = new SumCalculator();
$calculator->run();

<?php

namespace TreeTraversal;

class Node {
    public $data;
    public $left;
    public $right;

    public function __construct($data) {
        $this->data = $data;
        $this->left = null;
        $this->right = null;
    }
}

function createTrees(array $preOrder, array $inOrder, int $low, int $high, int $preIndex) {
    if ($preIndex >= count($preOrder) || $low > $high) {
        return null;
    }

    $rootVal = $preOrder[$preIndex];
    $root = new Node($rootVal);
    $mid = array_search($rootVal, $inOrder);

    $root->left = createTrees($preOrder, $inOrder, $low, $mid - 1, $preIndex + 1);
    $root->right = createTrees($preOrder, $inOrder, $mid + 1, $high, $preIndex + $mid - $low + 1);

    return $root;
}

function printPostOrder(?Node $node, array &$output) {
    if ($node === null) {
        return;
    }
    printPostOrder($node->left, $output);
    printPostOrder($node->right, $output);
    $output[] = $node->data;
}

function printPostOrderTraversals(array $inOrder, array $preOrder) {
    $n = count($inOrder);
    $rootIndex = array_search($inOrder[0], $preOrder);
    $root = createTrees($preOrder, $inOrder, 0, $rootIndex, 0);

    $output = [];
    printPostOrder($root, $output);
    echo implode(" ", $output) . PHP_EOL;
}

// Main execution point
$inOrderArrays = [
    [1, 2, 4, 5, 3, 6],
    [4, 2, 5, 1, 3, 6]
];

$preOrder = [1, 2, 4, 5, 3, 6];

foreach ($inOrderArrays as $inOrder) {
    printPostOrderTraversals($inOrder, $preOrder);
}

namespace AnagramFinder;

class Solution {
    public function Anagrams(array $arr, int $n): array {
        // TODO: Create a mapping of sorted word to anagrams
        $anagrams = [];

        foreach ($arr as $word) {
            $sortedWord = $this->sortString($word);
            // Group anagrams together
            if (!isset($anagrams[$sortedWord])) {
                $anagrams[$sortedWord] = [];
            }
            $anagrams[$sortedWord][] = $word;
        }

        // Prepare the final result
        $result = [];
        foreach ($anagrams as $group) {
            $result[] = $group;
        }

        // Debug print the grouped anagrams
        print_r($result);
        
        return $result;
    }

    private function sortString(string $str): string {
        // Convert string to array, sort it, and join back
        $arr = str_split($str);
        sort($arr);
        return implode('', $arr);
    }
}

namespace Research\Gridland;

class GridlandMetro
{
    private array $grid;

    public function __construct(int $n)
    {
        $this->grid = array_fill(0, $n + 1, []);
    }

    public function populateGrid(array $track): void
    {
        foreach ($track as [$r, $c1, $c2]) {
            for ($i = $c1; $i <= $c2; $i++) {
                $this->grid[$r][$i] = true; // Using true to mark occupied cells
            }
        }
    }

    public function calculateUnoccupiedCells(int $n, int $m): int
    {
        $occupied = 0;
        for ($r = 1; $r <= $n; $r++) {
            $occupied += count($this->grid[$r]);
        }
        return $n * $m - $occupied;
    }
}

{
    $start = microtime(true);
    $func(...$params);
    return microtime(true) - $start;

class DetectionAnalyzer {

    public function __construct(array $testCases) {

        $results = [];
        
        foreach ($this->testCases as $testCase) {
            $n = $testCase['days'];
            $detectedCount = 0;
            $reactants = $testCase['reactants'];

            foreach ($reactants as $reactant) {
                list($h, $m) = explode(':', $reactant['time']);
                $r = $reactant['number'];
                
                // Calculate total minutes from 7:00
                $totalMinutes = (($h - 7) * 60) + ($m);

                if ($totalMinutes >= 0) {
                    if ($totalMinutes < 420) {
                        // TODO: Handle cases where time is less than full hours for proper count
                        continue;
                    }
                    $detectedCount += $r;
                }
            }

            $results[] = $detectedCount;
            // Debug output
            echo "Test case detected count: $detectedCount\n";
        }

        return $results;
    }
}

namespace Research;

class MaxIndexDiffCalculator
{
    public function calculate(array $arr): int
    {
        $n = count($arr);
        if ($n < 2) {
            return 0; // TODO: Handle edge cases effectively
        }

        $left = array_fill(0, $n, 0);
        $right = array_fill(0, $n, 0);
        $left[0] = $arr[0];
        $right[$n - 1] = $arr[$n - 1];
        
        for ($i = 1; $i < $n; $i++) {
            $left[$i] = max($left[$i - 1], $arr[$i]);
        }
        
        for ($i = $n - 2; $i >= 0; $i--) {
            $right[$i] = max($right[$i + 1], $arr[$i]);
        }
        
        $maxDiff = 0;
        for ($i = 0; $i < $n; $i++) {
            $maxDiff = max($maxDiff, $right[$i] - $left[$i]);
        }

        // TODO: Consider additional metrics to analyze performance

        return $maxDiff;
    }
}

namespace PyramidHeight;

class Pyramid
{
    /**
     * Finds the maximum height of a pyramid using n cubes.
     */
    public static function findHeight(int $n): int
    {
        $height = 0;
        $totalCubes = 0;

        while ($totalCubes < $n) {
            $height++;
            $totalCubes += $height;
        }

        return $height;
    }

namespace Research;

use function array_map;
use function count;
use function implode;
use function intval;
use function max;
use function preg_split;

function gcd($x, $y) {
    while ($y) {
        $temp = $y;
        $y = $x % $y;
        $x = $temp;
    }
    return $x;
}

function primeFactors($n) {
    $i = 2;
    $factors = [];
    while ($i * $i <= $n) {
        if ($n % $i) {
            $i++;
        } else {
            $n /= $i;
            $factors[$i] = true;
        }
    }
    if ($n > 1) {
        $factors[$n] = true;
    }
    return array_keys($factors);
}

function solveTestCase(array $a) {
    $n = count($a);
    $color = array_fill(0, $n, 0);
    $usedColors = [];
    $colorDict = [];
    $currentColor = 1;

    for ($i = 0; $i < $n; $i++) {
        $factors = primeFactors($a[$i]);
        $found = false;
        foreach ($factors as $factor) {
            if (isset($colorDict[$factor])) {
                $color[$i] = $colorDict[$factor][0];
                $usedColors[$color[$i]] = true;
                $colorDict[$factor][] = $color[$i];
                $found = true;
                break;
            }
        }
        if (!$found) {
            $color[$i] = $currentColor;
            $usedColors[$currentColor] = true;
            $colorDict[$factors[0]][] = $currentColor;
            $currentColor++;
            if ($currentColor > 11) {
                $currentColor = 1;
            }
        }
    }

    $m = count($usedColors);
    return [$m, $color];
}

function main() {
    fscanf(STDIN, "%d", $t);
    $results = [];
    for ($j = 0; $j < $t; $j++) {
        fscanf(STDIN, "%d", $n);
        $a = array_map('intval', preg_split('/\s+/', trim(fgets(STDIN))));
        list($m, $color) = solveTestCase($a);
        $results[] = [$m, $color];
    }

    foreach ($results as [$m, $color]) {
        echo "$m\n";
        echo implode(' ', $color) . "\n";
    }
}

main();

?>

namespace Research;

class ApocalypseFinder {
    private array $daysOfMonth = [31, 28, 31, 30, 31, 30, 31, 31, 30, 31, 30, 31];
    private ?string $apocalypse = null;

    public function findApocalypse(string $input): ?string {
        $n = explode(",", $input); // Assuming input is given as comma-separated dates

        for ($year = 2013; $year <= 2015; $year++) {
            for ($month = 1; $month <= 12; $month++) {
                for ($day = 1; $day <= $this->daysOfMonth[$month - 1]; $day++) {
                    $date = sprintf('%d-%02d-%02d', $year, $month, $day);
                    
                    if ($this->countOccurrences($n, $date) < $this->countOccurrences($n, substr($date, -4) . substr($date, 5, 2) . substr($date, 8, 2))) {
                        $this->apocalypse = $date;
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        return $this->apocalypse;
    }

    private function countOccurrences(array $array, string $date): int {
        return array_reduce($array, function ($carry, $item) use ($date) {
            return $carry + ($item === $date ? 1 : 0);
        }, 0);
    }
}

namespace ArrayOperations;

class ArraySolver {
    public function solve(int $n, array $a): int {
        $sum_a = array_sum($a);
        
        if ($sum_a % 3 !== 0) {
            echo "It is not possible to make all elements of array equal to zero\n";
            return -1;
        } else {
            $target = intdiv($sum_a, 3);
            $current = 0;
            $count = 0;
            $indices = [];
            
            for ($i = 0; $i < $n; $i++) {
                $current += $a[$i];
                if ($current === $target) {
                    $count++;
                    $indices[] = $i;
                    if ($count === 3) {
                        break;
                    }
                }
            }
            
            if ($count < 3) {
                echo "It is not possible to make all elements of array equal to zero\n";
                return -1;
            } else {
                $ops = [];
                for ($i = 0; $i < $count; $i++) {
                    $op = [
                        max(0, $indices[$i] - $i * intdiv($n, 3)),
                        min($n - 1, $indices[$i] + ($i + 1) * intdiv($n, 3) - 1),
                        -$target
                    ];
                    $ops[] = $op;
                }
                
                foreach ($ops as $op) {
                    echo ($op[0] + 1) . " " . ($op[1] + 1) . "\n";
                    for ($i = $op[0]; $i <= $op[1]; $i++) {
                        echo intdiv($op[2], $op[1] - $op[0] + 1) . " ";
                    }
                    echo "\n";
                }
            }
        }
        return 0;
    }
}

$a = array_map('intval', explode(' ', trim(fgets(STDIN))));

class MoveCalculator
{
    public function minMoves(int $n): int
    {
        $i = 1;
        $moves = 0;
        
        while ($i * $i <= $n) {
            if ($n % $i === 0) {
                $moves = max($moves, $i - 1 + ($n / $i) - 1);
            }
            $i++;
        }
        
        return $moves;
    }
}
